title: FAST PACED Executive Admin
description:
Our client is a for-profit social impact enterprise based in Atlanta, GA, operating at the intersection of talent, training, and technology. The company prepares professionals for placements in cybersecurity, technology, and data analytics, partnering with leading organizations. They also provide career development training programs and affordable tech advisory services for small businesses and nonprofits.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This is not a slow-ramp, ease-in kind of role. We are looking for a Virtual Executive Assistant who can walk into a fast-moving environment, absorb information quickly, and start producing results from day one. The CEO operates at a high pace with high expectations, and the right person for this role will thrive in that energy, not shrink from it.

 

You will manage the CEO’s inbox, calendar, meeting prep, and communications using AI-powered tools and established systems. The expectation is clear: deliverables completed before the start of each business day, every day. If you need hand-holding or step-by-step instructions for every task, this is not the right fit. If you are resourceful, fast on your feet, and energized by a leader who moves quickly, keep reading.

 

This is a part-time role (~20 hours/week, Monday through Thursday) with a clear growth path to full-time based on performance. You will start with core administrative functions and progressively take on AI-powered knowledge management, CRM operations, and social media engagement.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Tier 1: Core Administrative Support (Immediate — Month 1)

1. 
 Management: Manage the CEO’s inbox using Outlook and Superhuman. Categorize, color-code, and route
s into designated folders. Draft and send AI-assisted responses to low-priority
s. Escalate decision-required messages to priority folders.

2.  Calendar Management: Maintain and color-code the CEO’s calendar daily. Ensure all events are properly categorized by end of day. Verify upcoming meetings have correct details and attendee information.

3.  Daily Output Standard: All administrative tasks must be completed before the start of the CEO’s business day (Eastern Time). Inbox sorted, calendar coded, drafts ready — every single day.



Tier 2: AI & Knowledge Management (Month 1–2)

1.  Meeting Transcription: Transcribe meeting recordings and extract key notes, action items, and quotes using custom ChatGPT Enterprise prompts.

2.  Knowledge Base: Input transcription summaries into the company’s custom GPT knowledge base to build a dynamic, searchable repository.

3.  Dossier Preparation: Prepare pre-meeting dossiers (up to 2 per day) using a provided research template. Answer standard questions about attendees, company size, meeting context, and relevant background. Delivered before the meeting, every time.



Tier 3: CRM, Social Media & Special Projects (Month 2+)

1.  CRM Management: Input new contacts into Zoho CRM following conferences and events. Send templated follow-up
s within 24 hours using GPT-generated messaging.

2.  Social Media: Monitor and respond to LinkedIn messages and social media engagement through Zoho Social. Pull testimonials from custom GPT testimonial generator as needed.

3.  Special Projects: Support survey creation, lead capture management, file organization, and community channel communications as assigned.



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF



1.  You thrive under pressure and in fast-paced environments. You don’t just survive the speed — you feed off of it.

2.  You have thick skin. Direct feedback doesn’t rattle you. You take it, learn from it, and come back stronger.

3.  You figure things out. When you’re dropped into something unfamiliar, you don’t freeze or wait for instructions. You research, you ask smart questions, and you move.

4.  You are output-obsessed. You measure your own day by what you produced, not how many hours you sat at your desk.

5.  You communicate proactively. If something is unclear, you speak up immediately. You never let confusion turn into missed deliverables.

6.  You can juggle ambiguity. Not every day will be perfectly structured. Sometimes priorities shift midstream. You adapt without losing 
ntum.

7.  You are genuinely mission-driven. You care about the work, not just the paycheck.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF

1.  You need detailed instructions for every task before you can begin.

2.  You take direct feedback personally or shut down when corrected.

3.  You are uncomfortable working independently for long stretches without check-ins.

4.  You prefer a slow, predictable workload with clear daily routines that never change.

5.  You struggle to learn new tools quickly or resist adopting new technology.

 

If any of the above describes you, we respect that — but this particular role will not be a good match.



REQUIREMENTS



Must-Have Qualifications

1.  2+ years of experience as a virtual assistant, executive assistant, or administrative professional

2.  Demonstrated ability to work in high-speed, high-expectation environments with minimal supervision

3.  Experience supporting a nonprofit, social enterprise, or mission-driven organization

4.  Proficiency with AI tools, particularly ChatGPT/GPT-based platforms — must be comfortable using custom prompts and workflows, not just basic prompt entry

5.  Excellent written communication skills — ability to draft professional, polished correspondence for partners, stakeholders, and social media audiences

6.  Strong
 and calendar management skills with experience using folder systems, categories, and color-coding

7.  Reliable internet connection and ability to overlap communication with U.S. Eastern Time zone



Preferred Qualifications

1.  Experience with Zoho CRM, Zoho Recruit, and/or Zoho Social

2.  Familiarity with Superhuman
 platform

3.  Background in staffing, recruiting, or workforce development industries

4.  Experience managing social media engagement (particularly LinkedIn) on behalf of executives or organizations

5.  Comfort with learning new tools and technologies quickly — a growth mindset is essential



TOOLS & PLATFORMS



Required:

Superhuman - 
 & Calendar

ChatGPT Enterprise - AI / Knowledge Mgmt

Microsoft Outlook -

Zoho CRM - Contact Management

LinkedIn - Social Engagement



Preferred:

Zoho Recruit - ATS

Zoho Social - Social Media



HOW TO APPLY

Interested candidates will complete a pre-recorded video interview and submit their resume for review. Top candidates will be shortlisted and forwarded to the client for final evaluation.

 

This is a tremendous opportunity to join a growing social impact company led by a CEO who moves fast, builds systems, and values your growth as much as your output. If you’re ready for it, we want to hear from you.

title: TikTok Short-Form Content Producer (Sourcing + Editing)
description:
We are looking for a long-term short-form content producer to create TikTok-style product videos for a growing TikTok Shop content operation.



This is not a raw-footage editing job. You must be able to source visuals and deliver full TikTok-ready videos.



We are looking for someone who can take:



- product links

- scripts

- style references

- product images



and turn them into finished short-form videos.



Your responsibilities:



- source the right stock / reference footage

- select the best visuals for each concept

- edit full TikTok-style videos

- add captions and structure the video for retention

- deliver final videos ready to post



Video style:



- organic TikTok-native feel

- not traditional ads

- strong hook in the first 1–2 seconds

- fast pacing

- clear product presentation

- 18–22 seconds average length



many videos will follow a “3 products” format



Content niches:



- home gadgets

- beauty

- useful products



What we provide:



- product links

- scripts

- format/style references

- product images when needed



 What you need to provide:



- footage sourcing

- full video production

- final edited videos



Volume:



- test phase: small batch first

- long-term goal: 5–8 videos per day



Important:

Please apply only if you are comfortable with both:



- sourcing footage

- editing the full video based on the concept provided



When applying, please send:



- your best TikTok-style product video examples

- examples that feel organic, not like classic ads

- your daily capacity

- your rate per video or per batch



Compensation:

Paid test first. Long-term compensation range: $650–$900/month, depending on experience, speed, quality, and ability to source footage and deliver full TikTok-ready videos.



To confirm you read the full job post, start your application with: “TikTok producer”

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description:
We are building a telemedicine program and application designed to transform patient care and wellness. We are looking for a creative and data-driven marketing professional to help us tell our story, reach the right audiences, and drive user acquisition as we grow our platform.

The Role As our Digital Marketing Manager, you will be the driving force behind our online presence and growth strategy. You will be responsible for creating compelling campaigns, managing our digital channels, and optimizing our outreach efforts to connect with both patients and healthcare partners.



Key Responsibilities * Campaign Management: Develop and execute digital marketing campaigns across various channels (social media,
, search) to drive app downloads and program sign-ups.

Content Strategy: Oversee the creation of engaging content that highlights the benefits of the NeuroKare Reset telemedicine platform, ensuring brand consistency across all touchpoints.



Analytics & Optimization: Monitor campaign performance, track KPIs, and adjust strategies to improve conversion rates and ROI.



Brand Development: Help refine our brand voice and visual identity across all marketing materials and external communications.



Qualifications * Experience: 3+ years in digital marketing, preferably with experience in health-tech, telemedicine, or app-based startups.

Platform Mastery: Proficiency in managing social media platforms,
 marketing software, and CRM/outreach tools.



Analytical Skills: Strong ability to interpret data and translate it into actionable marketing strategies.



Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a knack for translating complex health concepts into accessible consumer language.



Self-Starter: Ability to thrive in an early-stage environment, taking ownership of projects from conception to execution.

title: Operations Manager (Digital Marketing Agency)
description:
About Painter Marketing Pros

Painter Marketing Pros is a leading digital marketing agency specializing in growing revenues for painting contractors across the United States. Our mission is to generate consistent, qualified leads and deliver strategic marketing systems that help our partners scale predictable growth. We combine deep industry expertise, performance marketing, and operational excellence to deliver measurable outcomes and long term partnerships.



Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced and highly capable Operations Manager to oversee operational excellence across Painter Marketing Pros. This role is responsible for ensuring that our internal systems, fulfillment teams, and operational function efficiently, consistently, and at scale.



The Operations Manager plays a critical leadership role in ensuring that digital marketing services are delivered on time, at high quality standards, and in alignment with company performance goals. This role requires strong leadership of remote teams, structured operational thinking, and the ability to drive accountability across multiple departments.



The Operations Manager works closely with the Project Manager, department leads, and executive leadership to ensure operational alignment, resolve delivery bottlenecks, improve systems, and support the continued growth of the business.

This is a high ownership role requiring a proactive mindset, strong leadership presence, and the ability to balance operational execution with strategic improvement initiatives.



Key Responsibilities

- Oversee the daily fulfillment of digital marketing services across all non-customer facing departments to ensure quality, consistency, and timeliness

- Monitor fulfillment capacity and workload distribution across teams to ensure balanced productivity

- Escalate major operational issues and personnel matters to the Director of Operations when required

- Support the Partner Advocacy Manager with high priority client escalations and service recovery situations

- Maintain structured, organized workflows across departments and reinforce accountability for delivery outcomes

- Lead by example with a positive, solutions oriented approach to operational challenges

- Manage remote teams across multiple departments to ensure accountability and performance

- Conduct the Weekly Operations L10 meeting, and participate in the Leadership L10. 

- Identify workflow inefficiencies and implement practical improvements grounded in operational data

- Analyze team capacity and resource allocation to ensure teams are operating efficiently

- Prepare and deliver weekly operational reports, including completed tickets, new tickets, overdue items, progress on rocks, key highlights, and challenges

- Identify operational obstacles and provide recommended solutions

- Ensure SOPs are executed across all activities and work to improve SOPs.

- Work to find opportunities to automate processes or make them redundent. 



Qualifications

- 5 or more years of operations or team management experience

- Experienced in project management tools like Clickup

- Experience managing teams of 15+ people in remote work environments and across multiple countries

- Demonstrated ability to manage operational performance metrics and KPIs

- Ability to operate effectively at both strategic and execution levels

- Highly organized, structured, and solutions oriented

- Strong ownership mindset with high accountability for outcomes

- Working knowledge of SEO including on page optimization, content development, link building, and citations

- Understanding of PPC advertising including Google Ads campaign management and optimization

- Experience managing website builds including WordPress development, quality assurance, and launches

- Familiarity with analytics and tracking including Google Analytics, conversion tracking, and call tracking



Why Join Us?

Play a critical leadership role in driving operational excellence across a fast growing digital marketing agency

Work closely with executive leadership to strengthen systems, teams, and delivery workflows



Help shape the operational infrastructure of a company supporting more than 100 clients across the United States

Join a high trust, high accountability team with clear performance standards and measurable outcomes



Competitive compensation with opportunities for career growth as the agency scales

title: Social media video content editor
description:
Job Title:

Video Editor for Instagram Reels & TikTok – Investing & Personal Finance Content (3–5 Videos/Week, Paid Per Job)



Job Overview

We are looking for a skilled, fast, and reliable Video Editor to edit short 2–3 minute vertical videos focused on investing and personal finance. These videos will be posted on Instagram Reels and TikTok.

This is a per-job / per-video freelance role (not hourly). You will receive raw footage and deliver fully edited, ready-to-post videos. We need 3–5 videos per week on an ongoing basis.



Key Requirements

•  Strong experience editing Instagram Reels and TikTok videos is highly prioritized (please highlight this in your application).

•  Fast turnaround is very important — you must be able to deliver each edited video within 24–48 hours after receiving the raw files.

•  Proficiency in CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar editing software.

•  Ability to add engaging captions, text overlays, trending music, smooth transitions, sound effects, and simple graphics (e.g., charts or key stats for finance content).

•  Good eye for fast-paced, scroll-stopping social media style that works well in the personal finance/investing niche.

•  Reliable communication in English and consistent delivery.



What You’ll Do

•  Turn raw clips into polished, vertical 2–3 minute videos optimized for Instagram and TikTok.

title: Shopify Customer Support & Ecommerce Operations Assistant (Facebook Ads Brand)
description:
We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented **Ecommerce Operations Assistant** to help manage the backend operations of our growing Shopify store.



Our brand sells health supplements and generates sales through
 advertising. We need someone who can help ensure the **customer experience and operational side of the business run smoothly**.



This role goes beyond basic customer service. You will help monitor orders, resolve customer issues, communicate with suppliers, and help identify patterns or problems that may affect store performance.



We are looking for someone who is organized, calm under pressure, and capable of solving problems independently.



This position starts **part-time (15–20 hours per week)** with the opportunity to grow into a **larger role as the business continues scaling**.



---



# Responsibilities



• Respond to customer
s in a professional and helpful tone

• Handle order issues such as delayed shipments, tracking problems, address updates, refunds, and reships

• Monitor order tracking and identify shipments that may need attention

• Communicate with suppliers or fulfillment agents to resolve order issues

• Review
 and Instagram comment responses to ensure they are accurate and on-brand

• Escalate important issues quickly when necessary

• Keep internal notes organized and track recurring customer issues

• Help identify patterns in customer complaints, shipping delays, or operational problems

• Use AI tools to improve productivity, summarize issues, and help organize operational tasks

• Support general Shopify backend operations when needed



---



# Required Skills & Experience



• Experience working with **Shopify stores**

• Previous **ecommerce customer support experience**

• Strong written English communication

• Ability to handle **tracking issues, refunds, and reships**

• Familiarity with *
/Meta ad-driven ecommerce businesses**

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to work independently and stay organized

• Comfortable using **AI tools like ChatGPT or Claude** to improve workflow



---



# Preferred Experience



• Experience communicating with suppliers or fulfillment agents

• Familiarity with Shopify apps related to tracking, fulfillment, or customer support

• Experience reviewing
 or Instagram comments for ecommerce brands

• Understanding of ecommerce metrics like refund rate, shipping delays, and customer satisfaction

• Experience improving workflows or SOPs



---



# What Success Looks Like in This Role



• Customer
s are answered quickly and professionally

• Tracking issues are caught early and handled smoothly

• Supplier communication is organized and consistent

• Customer complaints are reduced because issues are addressed faster

• Backend store operations remain organized and efficient



---



# Growth Opportunity



We are building a long-term team. As the business grows, this role has the potential to grow into a **larger operations position with increased hours and responsibilities**.



---



# How to Apply



To apply, please include:



1. Your experience working with **Shopify stores**

2. Any experience you have with **ecommerce customer support**

3. Any experience communicating with **suppliers or fulfillment agents**

4. The **AI tools you use** and how they help your workflow

5. A short paragraph explaining **how you would handle an upset customer whose order is delayed**

6. Your **favorite Shopify app and why**



Please include the phrase **“Operations Ninja”** at the top of your application so I know you read the full job description.

title: Marketing Strategist
description:
About Boost Media Group:

Boost Media Group is a full-service digital marketing agency dedicated to helping businesses grow their online presence and achieve their marketing objectives. We offer a comprehensive range of services including SEO, content marketing, social media management, and paid advertising campaigns. Our team of experts works collaboratively to deliver tailored strategies that drive results for our diverse client base.



Job Overview:

As a Marketing Strategist at Boost Media Group, you will be responsible for researching, developing, and communicating strategic marketing plans to achieve our company's and clients' business goals. You will lead and optimize marketing efforts for both company and client campaigns, collaborating with cross-functional teams to execute them effectively.



Key Responsibilities



Strategy Development and Implementation

- Set specific marketing goals aligned with overall business targets

- Design and implement cohesive marketing strategies across various channels

- Develop digital campaigns to increase web traffic and brand awareness

- Ensure brand consistency across all marketing initiatives



Market Research and Analysis

- Conduct in-depth market research to identify new opportunities and trends

- Analyze sales and marketing metrics to inform decision-making

- Forecast market trends and provide insights to guide future strategies

- Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of marketing campaigns



Collaboration and Communication

- Liaise with internal teams to ensure brand consistency

- Collaborate with external stakeholders for successful execution of marketing plans

- Communicate marketing strategies and results to leadership teams

- Address advertising needs and provide recommendations to the marketing team



Qualifications and Skills



Education and Experience

- Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field

- Minimum of 2-5 years of experience as a marketing strategist or in a similar role

- Proven track record of successful marketing strategy implementation



Technical Skills

- Proficiency in CRM software and Content Management Systems

- Experience with SEO/SEM and Google Analytics

- Understanding of web design principles

- Familiarity with HTML-5 and website metadata

- Experience with Google Search Console

- Experience with SEMRush is a plus



Soft Skills

- Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities

- Strong communication skills, both verbal and written

- Creative thinking and innovative approach to marketing

- Leadership and team management capabilities



Additional Requirements

- In-depth knowledge of digital and traditional marketing channels

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team

- Strong attention to detail and project management skills

- Must be willing to work and attend meetings during normal business hours in the United States

- Must be comfortable speaking with and working with clients directly in zoo
etings



Position Details

- This is a remote position

- Applicants must have computer or laptop with reliable high-speed internet

- Part-time position averaging 20+ hours per week, with potential for full-time

- Compensation is based on experience



By fulfilling this role, you will play a vital part in increasing our company's and clients' market share, ensuring brand consistency, and driving overall business growth through effective marketing strategies.

title: Bookkeeping Expert
description:
Bookkeeping Expert Needed



We are looking for a reliable Bookkeeper with a Bachelor of Science in Accountancy (BSA) and at least 1–2 years of bookkeeping experience to help manage and organize our financial records.



The goal of this role is to ensure our financial records are accurate, organized, and easy to understand, while creating a simple system our team can follow.



1?? Review and Clean Up Financial Records

Task



The bookkeeper will review and organize our existing financial data.



Responsibilities include:



• Reviewing financial transactions

• Identifying uncategorized or incorrectly categorized transactions

• Reconciling bank and credit card accounts

• Ensuring financial records match bank statements

• Cleaning up historical bookkeeping records if needed



Goal



All financial records should be accurate, organized, and reconciled.



2?? Maintain Accounting System



The bookkeeper will maintain our accounting software and ensure it is properly structured.



This may include:



• Managing QuickBooks Online or similar accounting software

• Maintaining the Chart of Accounts

• Ensuring bank feeds are working properly

• Categorizing transactions

• Recording income and expenses

• Managing vendor and contractor payments



Goal



Our accounting system should remain clean, organized, and updated regularly.



3?? Monthly Financial Reports



The bookkeeper will generate monthly financial reports to help leadership understand the company’s financial performance.



Reports may include:



• Profit & Loss Statement (P&L)

• Balance Sheet

• Cash Flow Summary

• Expense category breakdown

• Revenue tracking



Goal



Provide clear monthly financial insights to support business decisions.



4?? Expense and Revenue Tracking



Ensure all financial activity is properly recorded.



This may include tracking:



• Business expenses

• Contractor payments

• Software subscriptions

• Marketing expenses

• Client payments and revenue streams



Goal



Ensure all incoming and outgoing funds are properly tracked and categorized.



5?? Documentation and Training



The bookkeeper will help document the financial process so other tea
mbers understand how the system works.



Deliverables



Provide:



1?? Short Loom Training Video



Explaining:



• How the accounting system works

• How transactions are categorized

• How reports are generated



2?? Written SOP (Google Doc or Trainual Format)



Training should cover:



Step 1 — Log into the accounting system

Step 2 — Review and categorize transactions

Step 3 — Reconcile bank accounts

Step 4 — Generate monthly financial reports

Step 5 — Export reports for management review



Goal



Our team should understand how to access and review financial reports easily.



Qualifications Required



Applicants must have:



• Bachelor of Science in Accountancy (BSA)

• At least 1–2 years of bookkeeping experience

• Experience with QuickBooks Online or similar accounting software

• Strong attention to detail

• Good communication skills

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Preferred Qualifications



• Experience working with U.S.-based companies

• Experience preparing financial reports

• Familiarity with SaaS or technology companies

• Experience creating financial SOP documentation



Deliverables



The selected bookkeeper will provide:



• Organized and reconciled financial records

• Maintained accounting system

• Monthly financial reports

• Process documentation and training materials



How to Apply



Please include:



• Your BSA credentials

• Your bookkeeping experience (1–2+ years)

• The accounting software you specialize in

• Examples of bookkeeping work you’ve done

title: Technical Customer Support
description:
Role title. Technical Customer Support.



Role summary.

You will provide technical support for FibreMax business voice and internet services, with a strong focus on VoIP and Australian NBN environments. You will own tickets end to end, keep customers updated, and work with suppliers to resolve faults.



What you will do.



1. Respond to support requests promptly, diagnose issues, and communicate the next steps clearly.

2. Troubleshoot VoIP issues, including registration, call routing, one way audio, call quality, and device setup.

3. Support NBN connectivity basics, including router setup, WiFi troubleshooting, and LAN configuration.

4. Provision and change services, extensions, numbers, call flows, IVR menus, queues, voi
 to
, and after hours routing.

5. Manage number porting tasks and service transfers, including checking forms and required details.

6. Escalate to suppliers with good diagnostics, follow up until resolved, confirm fixes with customers.

7. Keep accurate ticket notes, update documentation, improve runbooks and FAQs.



Must have skills and experience.



1. Experience in VoIP, ISP, PBX, or technical customer support.

2. Solid understanding of SIP basics, NAT, codecs, DIDs, and common PBX features.

3. Basic networking knowledge, IP addressing, DHCP, DNS, WiFi, and routers.

4. Clear written and verbal communication, strong attention to detail, calm under pressure.

5. Ability to work independently, manage priorities, and take full ownership of outcomes.



Nice to have.



1. Familiarity with Australian NBN processes and supplier fault handling.

2. Experience with PBX administration and handset support, Grandstream, Yealink, softphones.

3. Comfort reading logs, using portals, and working across multiple systems.



Work requirements.

Remote full time role aligned to AWST. Reliable internet, quiet workspace, and a USB noise cancelling headset.



Performance expectations.

Fast acknowledgement during rostered hours, high quality escalation notes, accurate provisioning, low ticket reopen rates, and regular documentation improvements.

title: Media Buyer
description:
We’re looking for a highly capable Media Buyer who will take full responsibility for launching, managing, and scaling Meta advertising campaigns for our E-commerce fashion dropshipping stores.



This is not a role for someone who simply turns campaigns on and off. We’re looking for a true A-player: someone who understands that media buying is one of the most critical functions inside the business, because it directly determines revenue, profitability, and the overall performance of our stores.



In this role, you will be responsible for creating campaigns, monitoring performance throughout the day, cutting underperforming ads, and scaling winning campaigns. You will help us maintain a healthy and profitable advertising operation across our stores by ensuring campaigns are monitored closely and adjusted when necessary.



Media buying in our company requires continuous attention. Campaign performance can change quickly, which means ads must be monitored consistently during the day. Because of this, you must be available and active throughout the day to check campaigns, react when needed, and keep everything running smoothly.



You will also be responsible for maintaining the quality and stability of the ad accounts. This includes removing negative comments from ads when necessary, keeping the ad environment clean and professional, and acting quickly if restrictions, warnings, or other account issues occur.



Discipline and consistency in daily operations are extremely important. You will update important internal sheets every day, such as our Profit & Loss sheet and Scaling sheet. Accuracy and reliability are essential, because these sheets are used to make important decisions within the business.



You must already have strong hands-on experience running Meta Ads for Shopify fashion dropshipping stores. You should understand campaign structure, creative testing, scaling strategies, and the daily management required to run ads for fast-moving fashion brands.



You should be highly familiar with Meta Ads Manager and understand how Shopify stores operate. Because media buying directly affects store performance, you must be available throughout the day and able to actively monitor campaigns seven days per week.



We are not looking for someone who treats this as just another job. We are looking for someone who is hungry to grow, open to feedback, committed to excellence, and serious about performance. Someone who takes ownership, stays focused, works with discipline, and wants to become an important part of a high-performing E-commerce company.



Please answer the following questions in your application.

1.What is your experience with Meta Ads for Shopify fashion dropshipping stores, and for how long?

2. Have you worked for other fashion dropshipping stores before? If yes, which ones?

3. What is your experience with launching, managing, and scaling Meta campaigns?

4. Are you familiar with Shopify and Meta Ads Manager?

5. Do you have experience updating daily sheets such as Profit & Loss sheets or scaling sheets?

6. What are your main strengths, and how can you make the company better? What knowledge or ideas can you bring?

7. Are you currently working for another company?

8. How many hours and days per week are you available?

9. Can you stay active throughout the whole day to monitor and manage campaigns consistently?

10. Do you always have a stable Wi-Fi connection?

11. What’s your favorite dish?



Please include your phone number in your application so we can contact you directly through WhatsApp.

title: Senior Backend PHP Engineer - Remote
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Backend PHP Engineer to design and build the scalable backbone of HelloPrint’s e-commerce platforms. You’ll work on APIs, integrations, and core backend services while mentoring peers and elevating engineering standards across the organization.



You will play a key role in shaping our API-first architecture, optimizing system performance, and ensuring our infrastructure scales globally. Beyond implementation, you will influence technical direction and contribute to a high-performance engineering culture.



What You’ll Do

- Architect Our API-First Platform: Design, develop, and maintain a high-performance API layer that powers our headless commerce ecosystem. 

- Own Core Backend Services: Take end-to-end ownership of backend components—from system design and development to deployment and monitoring.

- Drive Platform Modernization: Lead the evolution of our legacy systems toward a clean, decoupled, API-first architecture, applying pragmatic engineering decisions over unnecessary complexity.

- Mentor and Elevate: Coach backend engineers on API design, performance optimization, and maintainable code practices.

- Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Partner with frontend engineers, product managers, and stakeholders to translate business objectives into robust API specifications.

- Champion Engineering Excellence: Advocate for modern development standards, including OpenAPI specifications, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and strong documentation practices.



What We’re Looking For

- Senior-Level Experience: 5+ years of professional backend development experience, with a strong emphasis on PHP.

- API-First Expertise: Proven experience building scalable RESTful or GraphQL APIs and designing headless architectures.

- PHP 8 Proficiency: Deep hands-on experience with modern PHP (PHP 8+), design patterns, and testing methodologies such as TDD. Experience with Symfony or similar frameworks is strongly preferred.

- Strategic & Pragmatic Thinking: Ability to balance refactoring versus rebuilding while navigating large-scale modernization initiatives.

- Strong Ownership Mentality: Proactive in identifying technical debt, performance bottlenecks, and architectural improvements.

- Database Mastery: Extensive experience with relational databases (MySQL/MariaDB), including schema design, query optimization, and performance tuning in API-driven environments.

- Agile & Version Control: Experience working with Git and agile methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban.

- AI-Accelerated Development: Comfortable leveraging AI tools to enhance productivity, code quality, and development velocity.



Nice to Have

- Experience in e-commerce or high-traffic consumer platforms.

- Familiarity with cloud environments (AWS or GCP) and containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).

- Experience with asynchronous processing or message queues (e.g., GCP Pub/Sub).



What We Offer

- Growth & Ownership: A high-performance culture where you gain responsibility early and accelerate your development, supported by AI-driven learning.

- International Environment: Collaborate with 150+ HelloPrinters from 34+ nationalities across multiple countries.

- Impact & Innovation: Work in a fast-scaling, tech-driven company where your contributions directly influence product evolution.

- Collaborative Culture: Learn from experienced leaders and contribute to meaningful, high-impact projects.

- Celebration & Recognition: From team events and milestone celebrations to company-wide keynotes and awards, we recognize and celebrate achievements.



Ready to Build the Future?

We are looking for bold thinkers, decisive executors, and engineers who embrace AI-first development.



If you're interested, apply here:

title: Senior PHP Engineer
description:
We’re looking for a Senior Backend PHP Engineer to help design and build the scalable backbone of HelloPrint’s ecommerce platforms. You’ll work on microservices, APIs, and integrations, while mentoring others and driving technical excellence.



You’ll take a leading role in shaping the architecture of our ecommerce infrastructure. You’ll build reliable APIs, optimize performance, and ensure our systems scale as we expand globally. Beyond coding, you’ll mentor teammates, influence technical direction, and contribute to a high-performance engineering culture.





What You’ll Do:



Architect Our API-First Future: Design, develop, and maintain a robust and high-performance API layer that will serve as the core of our headless platform.



Own the Backend: Take full ownership of key backend services, from design to deployment, ensuring they align with our API-first strategy.



Drive Modernization: Lead the modernization of our existing system, with a clear focus on decoupling the frontend from the backend and creating a clean, API-first architecture. We prefer a pragmatic approach over the complexity and overhead of microservices.



Mentor and Lead: Guide and mentor other backend developers, sharing your expertise in API design, performance, and best practices.



Collaborate and Innovate: Work closely with frontend engineers, product managers, and business stakeholders to translate ambitious goals into practical, well-engineered API specifications and solutions.



Champion Best Practices: Introduce and advocate for modern API development tools, standards, and methodologies (e.g., OpenAPI, CI/CD, comprehensive testing).













Requirements

What We’re Looking For:



Proven Seniority: At least 5+ years of professional experience in backend development, with a strong focus on PHP.



API-First Mindset: Demonstrated experience designing and building scalable, RESTful or GraphQL APIs. You have a deep understanding of what it means to build a headless system.



PHP8 Expertise: Deep, hands-on experience with modern PHP, including PHP8 and modern design patterns like TDD. You are comfortable with frameworks like Symfony and understand the nuances of the PHP ecosystem.



Strategic & Pragmatic: You are a problem-solver who prioritizes impact and understands the challenges of a large-scale modernization project. You know when to refactor and when to build new, all while avoiding unnecessary complexity.



Ownership Mentality: You are proactive about identifying and fixing issues and feel a strong sense of responsibility for the performance and health of the codebase.



Data Savvy: Strong experience with relational databases (MySQL/MariaDB) and a solid understanding of database design, optimization, and query performance in an API context.



Experience with Git and agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban).



AI-Accelerated Development: You are knowledgeable about and in favor of using AI to accelerate the software development lifecycle. You're keen on exploring how AI can be leveraged to generate code, improve quality, and maximize output.





Nice to Have:



Experience with e-commerce or high-traffic consumer environments.



Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).



Experience with message queues (e.g., GCP PubSub) or other asynchronous processing technologies.







What We Offer:





- Growth & Ownership: A performance culture where you grow fast, take ownership early, and design your own path: with access to AI learning and real responsibility.



- International Experience: Join a diverse team of 150+ HelloPrinters from 34+ nationalities, collaborating across countries, cultures, and functions.



- Impact & Innovation: Work in a fast-paced, tech-driven scale-up where your ideas shape the future of customised products.



- Collaboration: Learn from experienced leaders, contribute to meaningful projects, and thrive in a team that’s serious about performance and people.



- Celebrations & Culture: From work anniversaries and team events to monthly Keynotes and seasonal awards, we make time to celebrate wins and give back through volunteering.



Ready to Build the Future?

We are looking for bold thinkers, decisive executors, and engineers who embrace AI-first development.



If you're interested, apply here:

title: Full-Stack Developer (PHP+JS) | Remote
description:
Are you a creative and experienced developer eager to make an impact in a fast-paced, high-performance environment? At HelloPrint, we’re revolutionizing online printing by developing innovative solutions that make ordering easy worldwide.



As a Full-Stack Developer, you’ll collaborate with a driven and diverse team, pushing the boundaries of technology and building features that elevate the HelloPrint experience. This role offers the chance to grow, innovate, and thrive in our vibrant and inclusive culture.



What You’ll Do:

Develop & Innovate: Design and build impactful features that enhance HelloPrint’s products and user experience.

Collaborate & Create: Work closely with multidisciplinary teams, including developers, designers, and product owners, to bring ideas to life.

Drive Excellence: Continuously improve processes, tools, and systems to ensure high-quality outcomes.

Learn & Share: Stay ahead of industry trends and share insights to foster growth and knowledge within the team.

Embody Our Culture: Live our core values, including ownership, raising the bar, and doing it together, to deliver exceptional results.



Job requirements

What You’ll Bring:



Expertise in Full-Stack Development: 7+ years of experience working with PHP and  JavaScript frameworks (preferably Vue.js).

Creative Problem-Solving: A pragmatic approach and a passion for finding innovative solutions.

Collaborative Spirit: Strong communication skills and a team-first mindset.

Curiosity & Adaptability: A hunger for learning and the ability to thrive in a dynamic, fast-changing environment.

Results-Driven Approach: A focus on delivering high-quality outcomes and making an impact.



Bonus Points If You Have:

Background in startups or high-growth environments.

A track record of leading small teams or mentoring peers.



If you're interested, apply here:

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Start your application here: 



Compensation & Benefits

Salary: USD $500–$700 per month (depending on experience)

Employment Type: Full-time

Paid Time Off (PTO): 2 days PTO per month after successful completion of the 30?day trial period

Monthly KPI Bonuses: Performance-based incentives tied to account growth and productivity metrics

Career Growth: Long-term role with advancement opportunities



Working Schedule

Instagram SMM Shift: 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM (Manila time)

Workdays: 6 days per week

Daily Hours: 8 hours per day



Note: This position is open to applicants fro
tro Manila and nearby cities only.





Role Overview

We are looking for a dedicated Social Media Account Manager to join our growing agency. This role involves creating, growing, and managing multiple social media accounts across platforms including Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
/Threads, and more. The ideal candidate will have strong technical skills, excellent English proficiency, and the ability to maintain consistent posting schedules across multiple accounts.

 

Key Responsibilities

- Create and manage social media accounts across multiple platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
/Threads, etc.)

- Develop and implement content posting strategies for each platform

- Maintain daily posting schedules across all managed accounts

- Understand and navigate platform-specific algorithms to maximize growth

- Monitor account performance and adjust strategies accordingly

- Maintain organized records of account credentials and performance metrics

- Ensure accounts appear authentic and follow natural growth patterns

- Implement best practices for account security and growth

- Capcut Editing Required





Technical Requirements

- Must have a personal computer, not shared with family or partners, dedicated to EMF work during shifts

- Computer must reliably support work tracking software (Gastime / DeskTime equivalent)

- Strong understanding of proxy usage for account management

- Reliable high-speed internet connection

- Back-up Internet for power outage or internet issues

- Basic troubleshooting abilities

- Experience with social media management tools

- Comfortable using CapCut for video editing (basic navigation and operations required)



Required Skills

- Excellent English proficiency (high B or C level)

- Proven experience managing multiple social media accounts

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Ability to work independently and maintain consistent productivity

- Technical aptitude with computers and mobile devices

- Reliability and punctuality in meeting posting schedules

- Experience with Apple products (MacBooks and iPhones)



Preferred Skills

- Previous experience in social media growth strategies

- Understanding of content curation and platform-specific best practices

- Familiarity with social media analytics

- Ability to adapt to changing platform guidelines and algorithms

- Experience managing multiple accounts simultaneously



Professional Development

- Comprehensive training in social media growth strategies, trends, and platform algorithms

- Hands-on experience with proven growth methods across multiple platforms

- Regular upskilling in emerging social media tools and practices

- Career Advancement Opportunities

title: Senior Google Ads Manager - €3M/year account needing hands-on management (+Microsoft)
description:
Please note: We will reply to applications starting the first week of April, so please only expect a response then. Thank you!



We’re a fast-growing eCommerce brand with our own warehouse and factory in the Netherlands. 2-3x year on year growth for 5 years straight with 100k+ customers.



We sell houseplant-specific products across Europe and are now scaling our Google Ads hard across multiple European markets.

Google Ads is a critical growth channel for us, and we’re looking for someone senior to take full ownership of the advertising across Google Ads and Microsoft Ads. 



We already have a strong setup in place, built with support from a high-level advisor, so this is not junior setup work.



 This is detailed, high-level maintenance, optimization, and deeper testing work across a large multilingual European account.

This account is expected to drive around €3M this year, and we need someone who knows how to manage that level of complexity with precision and scale to €5M, €10M and beyond.



Our Mission

At Sybotanica, a small, high-growth startup, we wake up every day to make plants happy!

 To do that, we need to act fast, take ownership, and take pride in our work as a team.

 If we succeed, we’ll become Europe’s #1 houseplant brand, and we’ll know we’ve made it when we can proudly call 500,000 plant lovers our customers.



You will be working closely with the founder and the rest of our 20-person team, including 10 PH-based employees.

Working Hours: available during EU business hours (08:00–17:00 Amsterdam time) for meetings.

What You’ll Be Responsible For

You fully own Google Ads and Microsoft Ads performance and are responsible for the growth of the channel.



1. Advertising / PPC (Google Ads + Microsoft Ads)

 ? Fully manage and optimize our multilingual European Google Ads account across 10+ language-market combinations

 ? Fully own Microsoft Ads as well, making sure both channels are managed

 ? Maintain and improve the campaign structure already in place

 ? Handle detailed optimization work across search, shopping, and feed-driven campaign environments

 ? Focus on deeper-level testing, refinement, and performance improvements, not basic account setup





2. Feed / Merchant Center management

 ? Manage and improve product feed quality and structure

 ? Own feed-related advertising improvements across Google Merchant Center and related systems

 ? Work on feed optimization as part of improving campaign performance



3. Strategic collaboration

 ? Work closely with the founder

 ? Take over the ongoing detailed management and optimization work from the current setup

 ? Bring senior judgment, structure, and precision to account maintenance and scaling



Requirements (Read Carefully, No Exceptions)

? Proven Google Ads experience is a must, Microsoft Ads experience is also required

 ? Proven experience managing multilingual European ad accounts is a must

 ? You must have handled accounts at meaningful scale, this is not a beginner or small-account role

 ? Feed management experience is a must

 ? Shopify experience is strongly preferred

 ? Proof required, don’t just claim experience, show it.

 ? You’re excited to work in a fast-moving, remote-friendly team where ownership and initiative are valued.



Perks & Benefits

? 13th-month pay (pro-rated if yearly)

 ? Raises based on KPI targets every 6–12 months

 ? Flexible schedule

 ? Real-life team events with our PH team!



How to Apply

Send a short message explaining:

 ? The proof outlined above. The more the better.

 ? A time you solved a tough Google Ads challenge, the more details the better

 ? Detailed specifications of size of Google Ads account(s) handled, annual revenue, adspend, which countries / languages, what parts you were responsible for + results you delivered

 ? Your experience with Microsoft Ads

 ? Your experience with feed management

 ? Your CV in .PDF

 ? What motivates you



Add “lets gro w” so I know you read the whole thing. Also add a ????somewhere.

title: Expert eCommerce Customer Support Specialist (Permanent Position)
description:
We are a European eCommerce company running multiple Shopify dropshipping stores and expanding into new markets over time. We're looking for one sharp, experienced Customer Support Specialist to grow with us long-term.

This is not a temporary project. If you perform well and stay loyal, your pay grows with the business.



We're starting at approximately 2 hours per day as we scale. Hours and pay will increase directly as our stores grow our goal is to bring the right person to full-time once he handles everything good. 



What this role looks like

- You'll handle all customer communication for our Shopify stores — questions, complaints, shipping delays, refund requests, and disputes. Right now the ticket volume is low (we're scaling), but you'll be building the foundation of how support runs across every store we open.

- You won't be micromanaged. But we do expect a short daily/weekly update so we always know what's happening on the support side.

-All internal communication with our team is done in English, both written and spoken, so an advanced level of English is equally required.



What we're looking for



- Minimum 2–3 years experience in eCommerce or dropshipping customer support

- Proven experience handling refunds, partial refunds, chargebacks, and shipping disputes

- Comfortable working in Shopify and a helpdesk tool (Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar)

- Advanced English. All team communication, reporting, and internal processes are in English

- Self-managed, but communicates proactively, we shouldn't have to chase you for updates

- Someone who thinks like an owner: protect store reputation and profit at the same time



Compensation & Growth



Starting rate: $4/hour

Pay increases based on tenure and performance we reward loyalty and results

Long-term position with more responsibility as we open new stores

Flexible schedule (as long as response times stay professional)



All applications are screened manually and run through AI detection software. If your response is flagged or feels templated, your application will not be considered no exceptions.!!!!

title: Ecommerce Administrative Assistant (Operations + Notion + Shopify) — Full-Time
description:
We are a category-leading women’s eCommerce brand on a mission to create premium, affordable, and 100% waterproof jewelry that enhances our customers’ everyday lives. We’ve served over 1,000,000 customers worldwide in more than 145 countries!



We’re hiring one or more sharp, proactive Administrative Assistants to support operations and execution across the business.



This is not a “basic VA role.” If you need reminders, struggle with details, or prefer slow-paced work, this role will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who is:



• fast, organized, and detail-obsessed

• proactive (you spot issues before being asked)

• fluent in Notion (databases + task systems + SOPs)

• fluent in Shopify (orders + products + inventory fields)

• able to work reliably with Dubai time (Gulf Standard Time, UTC+4)



Working Hours (Dubai Time Requirement)



This is a full-time role with consistent daily coverage. To be considered, you must have consistent availability in Dubai time (UTC+4). Required working hours: 8 am – 4 pm Dubai time (UTC+4), Monday–Friday. Please do not apply if you cannot reliably cover these hours.



What You’ll Own (Core Responsibilities)



1) Operations Execution + Coordination



• Maintain internal task systems in Notion (databases, assignees, due dates, SOPs)

• Support daily operations tracking (orders, stock, shipments, urgent issues)

• Create structure: checklists, templates, and systems to keep execution clean



2) Shopify Admin Support



• Process and monitor orders, returns, and exchanges

• Update product listings and key Shopify admin fields accurately

• Maintain operational accuracy across inventory / pricing / product details (basic Shopify fluency is required — this is not optional)



3) Admin & Team Support



• Scheduling, calendar coordination, meeting agendas, notes, follow-ups

• Document management, data entry, reporting, and structured file organization

• Ensure tasks don’t slip through cracks (high ownership required)

• You will be expected to spot problems, propose solutions, and keep execution moving without needing constant direction



Additional Support Areas (As Needed)



This is primarily an operations + admin role. If you have additional skill, you may also support:



• light marketing coordination (uploading, scheduling, simple assists)

• invoice tracking / basic bookkeeping support

• research projects (suppliers, competitor scans, simple analysis)



Requirements (Must-Haves)



• 2+ years of experience as an admin assistant, operations assistant, or eCommerce VA

• Strong Notion fluency (databases, templates, task systems, SOP organization)

• Strong Shopify fluency (orders, products, admin navigation, accuracy)

• Extremely strong attention to detail

• Excellent English communication (written + verbal)

• Able to work full-time and maintain Dubai time coverage



Bonus if you have:



• Richpanel or other helpdesk tools

• eCommerce fulfillment coordination experience

• spreadsheet reporting experience



If you’re a high performer, this role can become a long-term, career-defining growth path inside our company.



Competitive pay based on experience.



How to Apply



Please complete this application carefully (we will not review low-effort submissions):




/to/KJxNMqNS

title: HR Virtual Assistant – Healthcare Recruiting (Telehealth)
description:
About Us

At Total Life, we believe that the later chapters of life should be defined by growth, dignity, and emotional strength. We are on a mission to improve mental health access for adults age 65 and older by delivering high-quality, affordable behavioral health services through telehealth.



We focus exclusively on the senior population. Our work centers on empathy, evidence-based care, and strong collaboration. We support older adults navigating dementia, depression, anxiety, and complex life transitions. We also stand beside caregivers, who often carry the weight of care alone.



When you join Total Life, you become part of a team that is reshaping how geriatric behavioral health is delivered—making support proactive, structured, and deeply human.



Position Summary:

We are seeking a highly organized and proactive HR Virtual Assistant (VA) to support our healthcare recruiting efforts. In this role, you will play a key part in identifying, engaging, and helping onboard qualified healthcare professionals for our growing telehealth platform.



You will assist with candidate outreach, screening coordination, and pipeline management, while also supporting various administrative and backend tasks. This is a full-time position ideal for someone with strong communication skills, attention to detail, and an interest in healthcare or recruiting.



Key Responsibilities:

Source and identify qualified healthcare professionals (e.g., therapists, counselors, psychologists)

Conduct outreach via
, job boards, and professional platforms

Manage and track candidates through the recruitment pipeline

Schedule interviews and coordinate communication between candidates and hiring managers

Maintain accurate and organized records of applicants

Assist in posting job ads and updating listings

Follow up with candidates and maintain engagement

Support onboarding processes for new contractors

Perform general administrative and backend support tasks as needed



Qualifications:

5+ years of experience as a Virtual Assistant, Recruiter, Human Resources or in a similar administrative role

3+ Experience in healthcare recruiting or Telehealth 

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines

Proficiency with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Gmail) and/or similar tools

Experience with applicant tracking systems (ATS) or CRM tools is a plus

Comfortable working independently in a remote environment

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For:

Proactive and resourceful mindset

Strong follow-through and accountability

Professional and respectful communication style

Interest in healthcare, mental health, or mission-driven work

Can work in EST timezone (Monday - Friday)

Strong work ethic and highly trustworthy. 



Please include the following in your application:

Your updated resume

A brief introduction about your experience with recruiting or HR work

Your internet speed and equipment details

title: Full-Time AI Video Creator & Editor — DTC E-Commerce (US Market)
description:
We're a fast-growing DTC e-commerce company selling physical products to the US market. We operate 2 brands and we're scaling aggressively. We need a dedicated, full-time AI Video Creator & Editor to join our team and own the entire video production process — from concept to final cut.



This is NOT a traditional video editing role. We produce 100% AI-generated video ads and content. You will be responsible for creating the full assets (images, characters, scenes) and turning them into polished, high-converting video ads using AI tools.



?



WHAT YOU'LL DO:



- Create AI-generated video ads from scratch (concept, asset creation, animation, editing, final delivery)

- Use AI video tools daily: Veo, Kling, Higgsfield, Nano Banana Pro, Runway, and others as they emerge

- Edit and assemble AI-generated clips into scroll-stopping short-form ads 
, Instagram, TikTok style)

- Stay on top of US trends, viral formats, and what's working RIGHT NOW in DTC paid media

- Understand direct response marketing — you know what makes people stop, watch, and buy

- Produce high volume: we need speed AND quality, not one perfect video per week

- Proactively suggest new concepts, angles, and formats based on what's trending in the US market



?



WHO YOU ARE:



- You have PROVEN experience creating and editing AI-generated videos — portfolio/samples REQUIRED (no samples = no interview, zero exceptions)

- You understand DTC e-commerce and direct response advertising (you know the difference between a "cool" video and one that actually converts)

- You follow US market trends obsessively — you know what's blowing up on TikTok, what ad styles are winning on Meta, what hooks are working

- You're fast, autonomous, and don't need hand-holding — we're not looking to train someone from scratch

- You have strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

- You're hungry, reliable, and want to grow with a company that's scaling fast



?



IMPORTANT — READ THIS:



? You MUST include a portfolio or examples of AI-generated videos you've created. Applications without samples will be ignored.

? A paid test task will be part of the hiring process.

? This is a FULL-TIME, dedicated position. No side gigs, no juggling 5 clients. You're all in with us.

? Schedule is flexible — we care about output and results, not hours logged. That said, you must be responsive and available during reasonable overlap with US business hours.



?



Compensation is competitive and based on your experience and skill level. The right person will be very well taken care of. If you crush it, there's room to grow into a leadership role as we scale the team.



Ready? Send your application WITH your best AI video samples. Let's build something big.

title: Smartwatch Customer Support
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and proactive **Smartwatch Customer Support Specialist** who has hands-on experience handling customer inquiries related to *smartwatch* products.



The ideal candidate should have practical experience responding to customer
s or conducting phone consultations specifically regarding smartwatch features, setup, and troubleshooting. Please note that applications without relevant product experience will not be considered.



**Requirements:**

- Handle customer inquiries via
 or phone related to smartwatch setup, usage, and troubleshooting.

- Accurately maintain and update customer records using Excel and Word.

- Perform basic data operations, including using Excel formulas (e.g., SUM) and filtering data.

This role is closer to:

not

title: Chief Operating Officer - SaaS · Trading Tools
description:
We're a fast-growing SaaS company in the trading tools space — building a direct competitor to LuxAlgo — and we're looking for a sharp, adaptable operator to work directly alongside the CEO. You'll be the second most important person in the company, owning execution across every corner of the business.



What you'll own



Digital marketing operations:

Managing and scaling paid campaigns, funnels, affiliate programs, influencer partnerships, and growth initiatives across all channels.



Product & dev coordination:

Reviewing designs and Figmas, managing project timelines, keeping the dev team unblocked, and translating between business needs and technical execution.



Hiring & team management:

Sourcing, vetting, and onboarding contractors and full-time hires across support, marketing, and operations. Managing performance and keeping the team aligned.



Customer support operations:

Building and overseeing the support function — hiring agents, setting up systems and workflows, and ensuring customer experience stays sharp as we scale.



Tools, systems & community:

Setting up and managing the platforms we run on — 
 servers, SaaS tools, internal dashboards, automations, and anything else the business needs to operate smoothly.



Everything else:

If it needs to get done and doesn't belong to another team, it belongs to you. This role requires someone who is highly intelligent, endlessly flexible, and energized by variety rather than intimidated by it.



This position requires a commitment of 6+ hours per day, 7 days a week.



If you would like to be considered for this position please send an
 to:





Make the subject line of your
 "COO - I can work 7 days per week", so I know you read the post.

 please include:

- A copy of your CV

- A brief summary of your past experience & why you would be a good fit for the role

title: Philippine Lawyer (Small Claims Case Preparation – Florida Filing)
description:
Looking for a Philippine-based lawyer to review and finalize a Small Claims case (Florida, USA).



Documents are already prepared — your role is to refine, strengthen, and make everything ready for filing. Client will file the case personally.



Scope

- Review & improve:

- Statement of Claim

- Demand Letter

- Evidence summary & exhibits

 -Ensure documents are clear, accurate, and court-ready

- Provide a simple filing checklist



Case Context:

- Mechanic kept client’s boat and is now unresponsive

- Police unable to locate the boat

-Claim value: $5000



Requirements



- Licensed Philippine Lawyer

- Strong legal drafting skills

- Excellent written English

- U.S. legal exposure = plus



Screening Questions (REQUIRED)



1. Are you a licensed lawyer? (Send credentials)

2. Have you worked with U.S. legal documents before?

3. How long will it take you to complete this?

4. A mechanic accepted a client’s boat for repair, is now unresponsive, and cannot return the boat. He billed under an LLC that is already dissolved. What are the top 3 legal issues or risks you would check before filing the case?

title: Video Editor – Final Cut Pro (Real Estate & Social Media)
description:
## **Job Type:**



Part-Time / Freelance (Task-Based to Start, Long-Term Potential)



## **Salary:**



???? **\$30–\$50 per video (depending on experience & skill)**

? **Bonuses available** for fast delivery, creativity, and innovation

???? **Opportunity for salary growth & partnership expansion**



---



## **Work Schedule:**



* **Task-based** to start (flexible hours)

* Must meet **24–48 hour turnaround time per project**

* As workload grows, opportunity to shift to **part-time or full-time hours**



---



## **Job Overview:**



I’m looking for a **creative and skilled video editor** who uses **Final Cut Pro** to help me create **short-form real estate and branding content for social media** (Instagram Reels, TikTok,
, YouTube Shorts).



This is **not your typical editing job**—I’m looking for someone who can:



? **Match my editing style**

? **Elevate the quality of the edits**

? **Innovate and bring fresh creative ideas to the table**



I’ll personally **train you on my editing workflow**, provide references, and show you examples of my past work. But I also want a **proactive editor who will grow with me and help take the content to the next level**.



---



## **Responsibilities:**



* Edit short-form videos (45–90 seconds) from **60–100 raw clips per project**

* Use modern editing techniques:



  * Speed ramps & zooms

  * Transitions & masking

  * Motion blur

  * Sound design: music syncing, smooth transitions, sound effects

* Add 3D text & simple 3D tracking (when required)

* Use **Ryan Nangle effects & Motion VFX plugins** (If you don’t have them yet, I can provide depending on fit)

* Do basic color grading (minor adjustments; no LOG footage)

* Create text animations and captions (template provided)

* Start with **single-cam edits**; move into **multi-cam editing** as the role expands

* Communicate through **Slack, WhatsApp, or
**



---



## **Requirements:**



* **Final Cut Pro (REQUIRED)**

* Experience with:



  * Ryan Nangle effects

  * Motion VFX plugins

  * 3D text & 3D tracking

* **Sound design experience** (music syncing, SFX, audio transitions)

* **Basic color correction / grading**

* Fluent in **English (spoken, written, and reading)**

* High-speed internet connection

* Ability to meet **24–48 hour deadlines**

* **Proactive and creative mindset**—not just a button pusher



---



## **Perks & Benefits:**



? Direct feedback & mentorship fro

? **Long-term partnership opportunity**

? Flexible task-based work at first, with potential to shift to **part-time or full-time salary**

? Bonuses for **speed, creativity, and innovation**

? **Growth potential into a leadership role** as my editing and media team expands



---



## **Expansion & Growth Path:**



As my business grows, so will your role.

I’m not just looking for a freelancer—I’m looking for someone who can eventually:



 **Take on more creative control**

 Help lead and innovate editing workflows

 Possibly manage other editors in the future

 Grow into a **partner-level role** with higher pay, bonuses, and the option for **part-time or full-time salary**



If you’re looking for a **long-term career move with creative freedom**, this is it.



---



## **Pay & Bonuses:**



* Starting at **\$30–\$50 per video or $7-8 an hour**

* **Bonuses available** for innovation, speed, and proactive contributions

* **Higher pay and part
-time salary available** as the workload increases



---



## **Hiring Process:**



### **Step 1: Paid Test Edit**



I’ll provide:



* Raw footage (60–100 clips)

* A completed sample edit I made



Your task is to edit the video your way while **matching my style**. This will help me evaluate your current skill level and potential.



### **Step 2: Interview & Review**



If your test edit fits what I’m looking for, we’ll review it together and discuss the next steps for ongoing work and growth.



---



## **How to Apply:**



Send me the following:



1?? **Your video editing portfolio or reel** (real estate or branding content preferred)

2?? Confirm that you use **Final Cut Pro**

3?? Share your experience with **Ryan Nangle effects, Motion VFX, and 3D tracking**

4?? Tell me **why you’re the right editor for this role**

5?? Provide your **WhatsApp, Slack, or
 contact info** for communication



---



## **About Me:**



I’m a U.S.-based content creator focusing on **real estate media and branding videos** for social media.

My style is **modern, fast-paced, and built to grab attention**. I’m looking for a **creative partner** who can grow with me and help push the boundaries of social media video editing.



---



### **READY TO APPLY?**



If you’re serious about growing with a company that values your creativity, apply now and let’s build something great together.
salary: US $30-$50 per video or $7-8 an hour

title: Sales Account Manager
description:

About Haulla

Haulla, a smart waste collection service by Ecube Labs, operates in major U.S. markets including Dallas, Houston, Austin, Denver, and Chicago — with plans for further expansion across North America. We help small and mid-sized businesses across the U.S. find better, more affordable waste solutions.



What You'll Do

- Build and maintain a full sales pipeline

- Conduct outbound sales calls and
s to potential clients, qualifying and advancing leads

- This is a full-time remote position

- Proven success in outbound sales

- Strong communication and objection-handling skills

- Native-level English fluency

- Familiarity in CRM tool (e.g., HubSpot) is a plus

- Base salary plus uncapped commission and performance-based bonuses

COMPANY INFO

We’re a small but rapidly expanding eCommerce store, specializing in selling fire pits, fireplaces, and a variety of fire and heat products. As our revenue grows, so does our need for a versatile individual to handle sales and customer service.

As we scale, our sales team and customer support team both need help. We’re looking for a Support Guru who can juggle a variety of tasks and can confidently support both sides of the business. Your role will be crucial as we continue to grow.

This is an exciting long-term opportunity for you! As you develop your skills, your role can evolve based on your interests and strengths. We’ll provide you with the training and resources you need to thrive.

 and phone

Self-Starter

Entrepreneurial mindset - MUST

Fast typist

Open to constructive criticism

Committed to a long-term role - MUST

Bold, confident, and personable - MUST

Sales/BPO experience  - MUST

At the top of your cover letter, please write "It is snowing in Canada.” all applicants without this message will immediately be skipped over



COMPANY CULTURE

We value transparency—ask questions if something isn’t clear and feel free to express your opinions. We work hard, but we also know how to have fun.



PAY

$5/hour for this full-time role to start + growth opportunities.



CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS

Honest, reliable, and confident

Engaging and fun personality

Near-native English speaker

Type at least 50 WPM

Shopify experience is a plus

Sales experience is a big plus



ADDITIONAL DETAILS

Internet: Must have a fast, stable connection that isn’t interrupted.

Work Environment: Must work from a professional environment.



WORKING HOURS

Full-time position (40 hours/week): Monday - Friday, 9 AM - 5 PM US Eastern time.



HOW TO APPLY

Send us a video introducing yourself and briefly tell us about any prior sales or customer support experience. The video should be under 2 minutes.

We look forward to working with you!

title: YouTube Video Quality Assurance (QA) / Reviewer
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented Video Quality Assurance (QA) Reviewer to ensure the quality of our YouTube tutorial videos. Your main task will be watching submitted videos (5 to 10 minutes each) from start to finish and identifying areas that need correction based on our specific checklist.



Key Responsibilities & QA Checklist: You will review each video and provide feedback on the following points:

1. Audio-Visual Sync: Do the screen actions (such as mouse clicks, screen transitions) perfectly match the timing of the voiceover?

2. Pronunciation & Intonation: Does the voiceover sound like natural, standard American English? You must check for awkward intonations, incorrect word stress, robotic sounds, or unnatural pauses.

3. Highlights: Are the video highlights properly included and appropriately placed?

4. Pacing & Flow: Is the cut editing fast-paced and engaging? You need to point out any unnecessarily dragged-out sections or long silences.

5. Script Variation (When reviewing multiple videos on the same topic): Are the scripts slightly modified for each video to ensure they are not exactly identical?

Workload & Compensation:

• Video Length: 5 to 10 minutes per video.

• Work Volume: We will start with 1~2 videos initially. If the work is satisfactory, the volume will gradually increase to reviewing batches of 30~40 videos at once.

• Payment: $1.25 / video reviewed (based on a 5-minute video).

Requirements:

• Excellent ear for standard American English pronunciation and natural pacing.

• Strong attention to detail, especially for screen-recording tutorials.

• Reliable communication and ability to strictly follow the checklist.
