title: Marketing Manager – Australian Telehealth & Wellness
description:
Important: To ensure your application is reviewed, please carefully follow all instructions provided.



Role: Marketing Manager

Reports to: Head of Marketing



Role Overview:

The Marketing Manager is responsible for planning, executing, and optimising marketing initiatives across multiple Australian telehealth brands. The role focuses on strengthening brand awareness, supporting patient engagement, and driving sustainable growth across all brands. You will oversee end-to-end marketing activities, including digital channels, content creation, campaign management, and performance reporting, while ensuring strict compliance with Australian healthcare advertising regulations.

You will work closely with internal stakeholders, including clinical teams and leadership, to deliver clear, consistent, and compliant messaging that reflects the values of each brand. This role requires flexibility to manage multiple brands and adapt to changing priorities across campaigns and projects.



Key Responsibilities:

Strategy & Planning

- Develop, implement, and manage integrated marketing strategies across multiple telehealth brands, aligned with business objectives, brand positioning, and service offerings.

- Help plan and execute campaigns to drive brand awareness, patient enquiries, and service growth.

- Contribute to annual and quarterly marketing plans, including channel strategy and timelines.



Digital & Channel Management

1. Manage the digital marketing ecosystem for multiple brands, including:

- Website content and updates

- Organic and paid social media 
, Instagram, LinkedIn, Reddit, TikTok, YouTube, Meta, and other relevant platforms)

- SEO and SEM (Google Ads and paid search): monitor performance, track results, and report insights to optimise campaigns.

-
 marketing (EDMs) and SMS campaigns: provide support and assist when needed

2. Support campaign setup, optimisation, and ongoing performance across paid and organic channels.



Content & Brand Messaging

1. Develop clear, engaging, and compliant messaging for multiple brands that resonates with diverse patient audiences.

2. Create(when needed), review, and coordinate content across various formats, including:

- Social media posts and short-form videos

- Blog articles and educational content

-
 and SMS campaigns

- Flyers, digital ads, and other marketing assets

3. Ensure brand consistency across all touchpoints for each brand, including tone, visuals, and messaging.



Collaboration & Stakeholder Management

- Work closely with clinical, operations, and leadership teams to ensure marketing campaigns accurately reflect services and business priorities.

- Coordinate with internal & external partners and suppliers (e.g., designers, videographers, agencies) as required.

- Provide marketing insights, updates, and campaign reporting to internal stakeholders.



Performance, Reporting & Optimisation

- Track, analyse, and report on campaign performance using tools such as Google Analytics, ad platforms, and internal dashboards.

- Monitor key metrics including traffic, enquiries, conversions, and campaign ROI.

- Use data and insights to continuously optimise marketing activity and improve performance.

- Reporting and analysing marketing data to inform future marketing activity





Market & Industry Awareness

- Stay up to date with digital marketing trends, patient behaviour, and competitor activity.

- Identify opportunities to improve campaign effectiveness, content formats, and channel performance.





Skills & Experience

1. Proven experience in a marketing role; prior experience in healthcare or a regulated industry is advantageous but not required.

2. Foundational knowledge of:

- Website content management systems (WordPress)

-
 marketing platform (MailChimp)

- SEO and SEM principles

- Organic and paid social media channels (Google Analytics, Google Ads, and Meta Ads Manager)

3. Proven experience with Meta Business Suite and Ads Manager

4. Design skills preferred but not essential

5. Ability to plan, execute, and support multi-channel marketing activities across multiple brands.

6. Exposure to marketing budgets, spend tracking, or reporting.

7. Strong written and verbal communication skills.

8. High attention to detail and strong organisational skills.

9. Flexible and adaptable, with a willingness to take on new tasks and learn new skills as priorities evolve.



How to Apply:

Send us:

2. Your portfolio (showcasing your best campaigns or content creations)

3. A short video introduction - share a bit about you, your marketing experience, and why this role excites you!

Let’s shape the future of healthcare marketing together!

title: Backend Developer Coding + Replit
description:
Do you love building real products, not just writing code that goes nowhere?



Are you obsessed with backend systems, logic, and actually shipping things people use and pay for?



Do you want to work inside a fast-moving AI SaaS company where your work directly turns into real products for real clients?



You might be exactly who we’re looking for.



About Us



My name is Greg, and I’m the founder of Enterix.



We build and launch AI-powered SaaS businesses for existing business owners. This isn’t theory or templates — we create real software products that people use, pay for, and scale.



Our work sits at the intersection of AI + product + business, not just coding for the sake of coding.



We’re now looking for a full-time backend developer to join us long-term and grow into a lead developer role as we scale.



The Role



You’ll be working on:



- Building AI-powered SaaS applications (client + internal products)

- Backend systems, APIs, and integrations

- User authentication, dashboards, and subscription systems

- Developing primarily inside Replit



You’ll be working on real SaaS products, not test projects.



We provide:



- Clear product direction

- Defined feature requirements

- Ongoing support and communication



But we are not looking for someone robotic.



We want someone who:



- Thinks like a builder, not just a coder

- Understands how backend systems connect to real products

- Can suggest improvements or better ways to structure things

- Takes ownership of what they build



You’ll work closely with me and the team to ship fast and improve continuously.



What We’re Looking For



Required:



- Strong backend development experience (not just “vibe coding”)

- Experience building APIs, databases, and logic-heavy systems

- Comfortable working with AI tools / APIs (or willing to learn fast)

- Experience using Replit or similar environments

- Ability to build and ship features independently

- Good English and clear communication



Nice to Have (Big Plus):



- Experience building SaaS products

- Understanding of subscriptions, payments, and user systems

- Experience with AI integrations (OpenAI, etc.)

- Product thinking (not just coding tasks)



We want developers who care about building real products, not just completing tickets.



Growth & Opportunity



This is not a dead-end dev role.



If you perform well:



- You’ll work on multiple SaaS products across different industries

- You’ll grow into a lead developer position

- You’ll be involved in product decisions, not just execution

- You’ll gain real startup/product experience



Pay & Commitment



Pay: $1,500/month

Schedule: Full-time, Monday–Friday

Hours: 8 hours per day



This is a long-term role. Please don’t apply if you’re only looking for short-term freelance work.



How to Apply



Send:



- Examples of projects you’ve built (especially backend or SaaS-related)

- A short explanation of your experience with backend systems



Include the word “BUILDER” in your subject line so we know you read everything.



Start date: ASAP



If you’re hungry to build, want stability, and care about working on products that actually get used, I’d love to see your application.



Thanks,

Greg

title: Social Media VA — Short Form Video Editor + Influencer Manager
description:
We're building Instasnatch, a mobile app that helps people save and organise recipes and social content from Instagram and TikTok. We're growing fast and need a creative, organised VA to help us run our social media and influencer program.



Video editing tasks:

— Edit raw founder footage into 15–30 second TikToks and Reels using CapCut

— Add captions, text overlays, trending sounds, and transitions



Influencer tasks:

— Find and qualify micro-influencers (3K–50K followers) in food and recipe niches

— Send outreach DMs using pre-approved templates (personalised per creator)

— Track all outreach in our Google Sheet CRM

— Follow up with non-replies on day 4

— Flag interested creators to founder immediately

title: Part-Time Website & Product Listing Assistant for Luxury Wallpaper Brand (Interior Design / E-Commerce Focus)
description:
I am looking for a part-time assistant to help restructure and elevate my wallpaper website as my business moves into a new high-end direction.



My wallpaper collection is being completely refreshed with a new supplier and a new offering of specialty finishes, including:



sisals



grasscloths



faux suede



faux silk



hessian



metallic finishes



These new finishes will replace my current product range, so I need someone who can help present them beautifully, clearly, and strategically to customers.



WHAT I NEED



I am looking for someone who:



* Is highly confident navigating my website platform and understands what the platform can offer beyond basic listing work



* Can build elegant, efficient, and informative product listings



* Understands how luxury products should be presented online



* Has strong attention to visual detail



* Preferably has experience in interiors, wallpaper, textiles, or interior design-related products



* Can advise me on ways to improve website structure, customer experience, and conversion



* Can think independently and suggest improvements rather than simply follow instructions



IMPORTANT TASKS



Your role will include:



* Replacing existing wallpaper listings with new specialty-finish products



* Writing or refining product descriptions so they feel premium and informative



* Organising collections logically and attractively



* Improving navigation and customer experience



* Advising on how to elevate the overall website presentation



* Helping implement useful features such as a wallpaper calculator plugin similar to the one used by Arte International



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who:



* Has worked with e-commerce product listings before



* Understands visual presentation and customer psychology



* Is comfortable making suggestions



* Notices what looks polished versus what looks amateur



* Communicates clearly in English



* Has initiative and can solve problems without constant supervision



Bonus If You Have Experience With



* Luxury interiors



* Wallpaper or textile businesses



* Product page optimisation



* Plugin installation and website enhancement



* Advising small design brands on digital presentation



Hours / Arrangement



Part-time, ongoing work.

Flexible hours, but reliability matters.



To Apply



Please send:



* A short introduction about your relevant experience



* Examples of websites or product listings you have worked on



* Any interior design / luxury product experience



* Your hourly rate



* A brief suggestion: if you landed on a wallpaper website selling luxury finishes, what immediately makes it feel high-end vs ordinary?



I am looking for someone thoughtful, capable, and visually intelligent — not just someone who can upload products.



Important- Applications will not be considered unless the following are done.

Start your application with the words: "Velvet Wall.”

“Tell me one thing my current website likely needs if I want to position as luxury.”



Shortlisted applicants will be given a paid task to determine whether you have the skills I am looking for.



website- 

THANKS FOR READING TO THE END- THIS WILL DETERMINE YOUR NEXT STEP.

title: Client Call Coordinator
description:
We are a fast-growing structural engineering firm based in Australia and is currently looking for a confident and composed Client Call Coordinator with a strong direct background in client calls and client meetings and has worked in a coordinator project management before. A full-time role from 7:00 AM to 3:30 pm Philippines time, weekdays only.



This role involves direct communication with clients— particularly those related to project delays, drawing status, or technical concerns. Your key responsibility is to act as the first point of contact on the phone, provide a warm and professional experience for the client, and coordinate internally with our design team to ensure timely resolutions.



We are ideally looking for someone who is comfortable under pressure, has excellent communication skills, and enjoys solving  in a fast-paced environment.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



Answer incoming client phone calls regarding project updates, delays, or technical questions.



Reassure and guide clients calmly and professionally — especially in high-pressure or escalated situations.



Gather relevant information from clients to assist internal design teams.



Follow up on requests with the design team and ensure clients receive timely responses.



Maintain detailed records of calls and follow-ups using internal systems.



Escalate urgent or complex issues to the appropriate internal tea
mbers.



Build and maintain strong client relationships through consistent and reliable communication.



Assist in improving call-handling procedures and response workflows.



SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:



A university degree or diploma



Previous experience in a client-facing or coordination role is highly desirable.



Excellent verbal communication skills with a calm and empathetic phone manner.



Ability to handle pressure, de-escalate tense situations, and remain composed under stress.



Strong organizational and time management skills.



Comfortable with regular phone interaction as the core part of the role.



Basic understanding of engineering or construction drawings is a PLUS.



Proficient in using collaboration tools (e.g., Teams, CRM systems, call logging software).



NICE TO HAVE:



Familiarity with the design and construction industry.



Experience working with internal engineering or design teams.



Prior work in a support or help desk-style role involving technical discussions.



To apply and be considered, please follow the below: 



1. Please send a link to your most updated CV and a short recording link explaining your relevant experience to the role.

2. Use 3 apply points.



Only those applicants who follow the above instructions will be contacted.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
**Location:** Remote  

**Type:** Part
-time

** PAYS via Western Union/Apple Pay



**About Us:**  

We are a dynamic and growing company dedicated to making a positive impact through networking, social media, and community involvement. We are looking for a highly motivated and versatile Virtual Assistant to join our team. If you are proactive, organized, and have a passion for social media, networking, and community service, we want to hear from you!



**Key Responsibilities:**



- **Social Media Management:** 

  - Develop and implement social media strategies across various platforms.

  - Create engaging content and graphics to enhance our online presence.

  - Monitor and respond to comments and messages in a timely manner.

  - Analyze social media metrics to track performance and make data-driven adjustments.



- **Writing Prompts and Contracts:**

  - Draft, review, and edit various types of documents including prompts, contracts, and agreements.

  - Ensure all written materials are clear, concise, and professional.



- **Event Networking:**

  - Research and identify events and opportunities for networking relevant to our business.

  - Schedule and coordinate attendance at networking events.

  - Follow up with contacts made at events to foster relationships and partnerships.



- **Volunteer Work Coordination:**

  - Identify and organize volunteer opportunities that align with our company values.

  - Coordinate and manage volunteer schedules and activities.

  - Maintain relationships with nonprofit organizations and community groups.



- **Advertising:**

  - Develop advertising campaigns to promote our services and products.

  - Create compelling ad copy and visuals.

  - Monitor and analyze the performance of advertising campaigns to ensure ROI.



- **Team Recruitment and Management:**

  - Assist in the recruitment process for new tea
mbers.

  - Onboard and train new hires.

  - Manage and coordinate the efforts of the team to ensure productivity and cohesion.



- **Follow-up Reminders:**

  - Regularly remind the employer to reach out to contacts, clients, and partners.

  - Keep track of important follow-ups and deadlines.



**Qualifications:**



- Proven experience as a Virtual Assistant or in a similar role.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Strong understanding of social media platforms and analytics.

- Proficient in content creation tools (e.g., Canva, Adobe Suite).

- Ability to draft clear and professional documents.

- Exceptional organizational and multitasking abilities.

- Proactive approach to problem-solving and decision-making.

- Experience in event planning and volunteer coordination is a plus.

- Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

-English Proficient

 

**What We Offer:**



- Flexible working hours.

- Opportunity to work remotely.

- Collaborative and supportive team environment.

- Opportunities for professional development and growth.



**How to Apply:**



Please send your resume, a cover letter detailing your relevant experience, and examples of your social media management work to 
 look forward to hearing from you!



---



We are committed to creating a diverse environment and are proud to be an equal-opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

description:
Start your application here: 
/

Compensation & Benefits

Salary: USD $500–$700 per month (depending on experience)

Employment Type: Full-time

Paid Time Off (PTO): 2 days PTO per month after successful completion of the 30?day trial period

Monthly KPI Bonuses: Performance-based incentives tied to account growth and productivity metrics

Career Growth: Long-term role with advancement opportunities



Working Schedule

Instagram SMM Shift: 7:00 AM – 3:00 PM (Manila time)

Workdays: 6 days per week

Daily Hours: 8 hours per day



Note: This position is open to applicants fro
tro Manila and nearby cities only.





Role Overview

We are looking for a dedicated Social Media Account Manager to join our growing agency. This role involves creating, growing, and managing multiple social media accounts across platforms including Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
/Threads, and more. The ideal candidate will have strong technical skills, excellent English proficiency, and the ability to maintain consistent posting schedules across multiple accounts.

 

Key Responsibilities

- Create and manage social media accounts across multiple platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
/Threads, etc.)

- Develop and implement content posting strategies for each platform

- Maintain daily posting schedules across all managed accounts

- Understand and navigate platform-specific algorithms to maximize growth

- Monitor account performance and adjust strategies accordingly

- Maintain organized records of account credentials and performance metrics

- Ensure accounts appear authentic and follow natural growth patterns

- Implement best practices for account security and growth

- Capcut Editing Required





Technical Requirements

- Must have a personal computer, not shared with family or partners, dedicated to EMF work during shifts

- Computer must reliably support work tracking software (Gastime / DeskTime equivalent)

- Strong understanding of proxy usage for account management

- Reliable high-speed internet connection

- Back-up Internet for power outage or internet issues

- Basic troubleshooting abilities

- Experience with social media management tools

- Comfortable using CapCut for video editing (basic navigation and operations required)



Required Skills

- Excellent English proficiency (high B or C level)

- Proven experience managing multiple social media accounts

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Ability to work independently and maintain consistent productivity

- Technical aptitude with computers and mobile devices

- Reliability and punctuality in meeting posting schedules

- Experience with Apple products (MacBooks and iPhones)



Preferred Skills

- Previous experience in social media growth strategies

- Understanding of content curation and platform-specific best practices

- Familiarity with social media analytics

- Ability to adapt to changing platform guidelines and algorithms

- Experience managing multiple accounts simultaneously



Professional Development

- Comprehensive training in social media growth strategies, trends, and platform algorithms

- Hands-on experience with proven growth methods across multiple platforms

- Regular upskilling in emerging social media tools and practices

- Career Advancement Opportunities

title: Chief Operating Officer (COO)
description:
Compensation

USD $5,000 – $6,000 per month, depending on experience

Work Setup: Remote

Reports To: CEO



How to Apply:

To apply, please complete this form:


/
/f/2kz0ma3h-1156/MHHLY4BOXCKVXG8CCW



We are seeking an experienced Chief Operating Officer (COO) to lead overall business operations, revenue performance, and organizational execution across client accounts and internal teams.



This role is responsible for driving operational strategy, scaling systems, improving profitability, and ensuring strong leadership across department heads. The COO will work closely with the CEO and leadership team to optimize performance, team structure, and operational efficiency.



Teams Overseen: Operations, Sales, Messaging, Support, and Department Managers



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Strategy

- Lead day-to-day company operations and ensure execution aligns with business goals

- Build scalable systems, workflows, and SOPs to improve efficiency and profitability

- Monitor key business metrics including revenue growth, operational efficiency, retention, and cost control

- Identify operational risks and implement solutions proactively

- Drive monthly and quarterly initiatives with clear KPIs and accountability



Leadership & Team Management

- Lead and mentor department heads, supervisors, and operational leaders

- Build strong accountability structures and performance management systems

- Oversee hiring strategy, leadership development, and organizational structure

- Improve cross-team collaboration and communication

- Maintain high team morale while enforcing performance standards



Performance, Quality & Reporting

- Establish dashboards and reporting systems for leadership visibility

- Ensure operational quality, compliance, and account security standards

- Oversee revenue optimization strategies and performance improvements

- Present weekly and monthly performance insights with actionable recommendations

- Support decision-making through data-driven analysis



Qualifications

Required Experience

- Minimum 4+ years of leadership experience in operations, business management, or scaling teams

- Proven experience managing managers or department leaders

- Background in digital businesses, online sales, creator platforms, or subscription-based environments is a strong advantage



Skills & Traits

- Strong strategic thinking with hands-on execution ability

- Excellent leadership, coaching, and decision-making skills

- Data-driven with strong business and revenue awareness

- Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple departments

- Clear communicator with strong accountability and ownership mindset

- Strong focus on compliance, risk management, and operational stability

title: Sales Representative
description:
Application Link: 



We’re looking for experienced and confident sales representatives who can build rapport with international clients, drive conversations, and convert engagement into revenue.



This role is not just customer support  we want strong communicators who know how to keep conversations flowing, identify opportunities, and upsell naturally. If you are persuasive, engaging, and competitive about hitting targets, you’ll thrive here.



You’ll receive industry-leading training, but we’re especially interested in candidates who already understand online sales, engagement psychology, and closing techniques through.



Working Hours

- 8 hours per day

- 6 days per week

- Fully remote



Earnings & Benefits

- Competitive base pay with strong earning potential:

- $700 – $1,500 per month depending on performance

- Top performers can earn additional incentives and bonuses based on engagement, conversions, and upselling success.



Additional benefits include:

- 2 days of paid holiday per month

- 4 days of paid sick leave per year

- Fully remote – work from anywhere

- Performance-based incentives for top sales representatives

- Comprehensive training in sales psychology, engagement, and closing techniques

- High-performing representatives can significantly exceed base earnings through incentives.





Key Responsibilities

-Engage international clients through chat support, building rapport and maintaining engaging conversations

- Identify opportunities to upsell and promote premium services naturally during conversations

- Keep conversations active, interesting, and focused on conversion

- Handle multiple conversations simultaneously while maintaining quality and attention to detail

- Track interactions and performance using Google Sheets and Notion

- Maintain detailed logs and follow internal communication protocols

- Work toward daily and monthly revenue targets



Ideal Candidate

We are looking for candidates who are confident communicators and natural closers.

Preferred qualifications include:

title: Senior Accountant (Remote)
description:
PLEASE READ: If you would like to apply and learn more about the role, please use the link below.





----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Are you a detail-driven accounting professional who thrives on turning complex financial data into accurate, reliable insights that real businesses depend on?



We need a Senior Accountant who acts as the financial backbone of our mission to “Help small businesses play a bigger game.” Reporting to the Accounting & Compliance Lead, you are a trusted steward of our numbers,  someone who uncovers financial risks before they surface, builds airtight records, and maintains the kind of precision and integrity that makes itGenius a firm our clients and team can always rely on.



itGenius is a global, remote-first Google Workspace Partner dedicated to “helping small businesses play a bigger game.” We provide high-level IT support and strategic consulting to thousands of businesses globally. We are a distributed team of 60+ professionals across Australia, the Philippines, and Europe.



Join our team of A-players—if you’re one too, apply now!





? Why You’ll Love Working With Us



We don’t just offer a job—we offer a career with exceptional rewards, growth opportunities, and a people-first culture. Here’s what you’ll get:



???? Competitive Compensation & Bonuses

December Bonus 

Performance Incentive Bonus 

Regular Annual Salary Increases as you grow with us



????? Time Off That Matters

Paid Leaves after regularization 

Paid National/Local Holidays 



???? Work & Life Experiences You’ll Remember

Annual Team Conferences & Events – Travel, food and accommodations on us!



???? Investing in Your Growth

Budget for Training & Development

Career Growth Pathways



???? Support to Help You Thrive

HMO Allowance – Your health is our priority

Government-Mandated Benefits – SSS, PAGIBIG, PhilHealth

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Job Overview:

The Senior Accountant ensures accurate financial reporting, revenue recognition, and compliance within IT Genius’s subscription-based model. This role manages core accounting processes, including A/R, A/P, payroll, and month-end close, while maintaining precision across all financial records and reconciliations.

 

Accountabilities

- General Ledger Integrity & AP Oversight: Accountable for the overall accuracy and integrity of the general ledger and the accounts payable function, ensuring all transactions are correctly recorded and reconciled in a timely manner.



- Tea
ntorship: Accountable for overseeing the work of the Junior Staff Accountant, providing guidance and support to ensure their accuracy and professional development.



- Specialist Team Enablement: Accountable for providing accurate and timely financial data and schedules to enable the Tax & Compliance and Financial Analyst roles to perform their functions effectively.

Closing of books within 7 working days.





Key Responsibilities:



- Revenue Recognition & Contract Accounting:

Manage revenue recognition processes in strict compliance with accounting standards.

Track deferred/unearned revenue and unbilled receivables from subscription billing cycles.

Accurately account for contract changes (upgrades, downgrades, cancellations, renewals) and their impact on revenue schedules.



- Operational Accounting:

Maintain the general ledger and prepare journal entries and reconciliations.

Oversee and reconcile A/P, A/R, and payroll processes.

Reconcile data from the Bill Management Platform (WHMCS) with the general ledger.



- Reporting & Compliance:

Prepare detailed financial reports by subscription tier, product, or segment.

Support timely and accurate preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements (IFRS compliant).

Ensure accurate invoicing for all subscription and usage-based fees, including setup and promotional discounts.



- Month-End Close:

Execute and review journal entries, reconciliations, and variance analyses.

Support Controller in ensuring a smooth and timely monthly close process.



- Audit & Documentation:

Prepare documentation and analysis for revenue and customer contract audits.

Support internal and external audit requirements as needed.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Skills & Qualifications



Required:

- Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field

- Minimum of 3–5 years of progressive accounting experience (including FS preparation and GL review)

- Strong understanding of IFRS and revenue recognition principles

- Proficiency with accounting software (e.g., Xero, QuickBooks, NetSuite) and Google Sheets

- Strong attention to detail, accuracy, and organizational skills

- Excellent communication and time management abilities



It would be nice if you have:

- Experience working in a cloud technology, SaaS business, Web hosting, or reselling business

- Familiarity with subscription or recurring revenue models

- Hands-on experience with WHMCS or similar billing systems

- Knowledge of Google Workspace tools



Work Schedule

- 8-hour shift

- Philippine timezone, morning shift

- Monday to Friday

- Weekends off

- Observance of Philippine holiday

- Permanent Work Form Home



You’ll thrive here if you’re interested in:

- The evolving world of cloud-based work (Google Workspace, Google Drive, Gmail, etc.)

- Supporting small business growth (1–30 employees)

- Applying technology to improve productivity and collaboration

title: Amazon Content Specialist
description:
We are looking for a results-driven Amazon Listing Specialist who can elevate the performance of our product listings through strategic SEO and conversion optimization. In this role, you will analyze listing performance, optimize keywords and content, and ensure all listing components are aligned with customer search intent. Your work will directly contribute to improved keyword rankings, stronger indexing, and higher conversion rates across the Amazon marketplace.



Key Responsibilities

• Audit Amazon listings to identify issues affecting conversion

• Optimize titles, bullet points, descriptions, backend attributes, generic keywords, images and product video

• Main and new keywords are indexed and aligned with search intent

• Ensure listing content addresses customer questions and Rufus queries

• Track keyword ranking and indexing

• Conduct customer review & competitor analysis

• Understand product selling point, differentiation

• Maintain consistent brand voice across listing content

• Document and present actionable insights clearly

• To improve metrics, keyword ranking, conversion rate and accurate keyword indexing



Requirements:

• Experience working with Amazon Seller Central

• Strong understanding of Amazon ranking factors, keyword indexing, and listing conversion optimization

• Familiarity with conversion optimization frameworks

• Strong analytical skills with high attention to detail

• Proficient in Excel, Google Workspace, basic graphic editing, and productivity/AI tools

• Good command of written and spoken English with strong communication skills

• Strong time management and multitasking abilities

• Able to work independently while collaborating effectively within a team

• Proactive, self-motivated, and able to take ownership of tasks

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment

• Must have a stable internet connection and reliable equipment



Job Details:

• Working Hours: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM (Monday to Friday)

• Tools: Monitask is used for screen and time tracking



Include the following:

1. Title your message: "I want to be your next Amazon Content Specialist"

2. Attach your resume and sample task answers in the
. 



Note: Only shortlisted candidates with the sample task completed will be considered.

title: Customer Service Representative (Voice & Non-Voice) - Remote Opportunity!
description:
Are you a customer service superstar with a knack for seamless communication across multiple channels? Do you thrive in a fast-paced, remote environment while putting the customer first?



Join our dynamic team as a Customer Service Representative and become the vital link between our company and our valued customers! We are looking for a highly skilled professional with experience in both voice and non-voice support.



Key Responsibilities

- Multichannel Support: Deliver exceptional service via phone,
, and live chat.

- Issue Resolution: Handle all customer inquiries, complaints, and support requests with professionalism and empathy, ensuring efficient and positive resolution.

- Process Management: Accurately process orders, refunds, and account-related requests.

- Documentation: Maintain clear, concise, and accurate records of all customer interactions using CRM tools.

- Collaboration: Work closely with internal teams to escalate and successfully resolve complex issues.

- Process Improvement: Actively contribute to improving customer support processes and FAQs.

- Performance Driven: Meet and exceed key performance indicators (KPIs) such as Customer Satisfaction (CSAT), First Contact Resolution (FCR), and response time.



What We're Looking For (Minimum Qualifications)

- Experience: A minimum of 2 years of solid experience in Customer Service, specifically handling both voice and non-voice support channels.

- Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills—clear, articulate, and grammatically proficient.

- Tech Savvy: Proficient in using CRM systems (e.g., Shopify, Gorgias, Zendesk, or similar tools). Basic troubleshooting skills for common customer concerns is a plus.

- Mindset: Possesses a strong problem-solving mindset and an unwavering customer-first approach.

- Soft Skills: Demonstrates patience, empathy, and professionalism when managing difficult or sensitive conversations.

- Work Ethic: Highly organized with the proven ability to multitask and manage time effectively in a high-volume, remote setting.

- Integrity: Absolute commitment to handling confidential information with the utmost discretion.



Work Schedule & Environment

- Location: 100% Remote

- Availability: Must be willing to work a flexible and/or shifting schedule, including weekends, to cover our operational needs (potential adaptation to different time zones may be required).

- Hours: Minimum of 40 hours per week.



How to Apply

- If you meet these qualifications and are ready to contribute your expertise to a supportive remote team, please follow these instructions carefully:

- Submit your comprehensive resume AND a detailed cover letter outlining your relevant experience.

 your application to:

title: Ghostwriter Needed for Cacao Book / Ebook
description:
Hi, I'm Vish – a former real estate entrepreneur turned breathwork coach and men's empowerment mentor. I'm looking for an experienced ghostwriter to help create a compelling book about cacao that will be featured on our website as an ebook.

This book will introduce readers to the power, history, and use of cacao, while also connecting it to personal growth, mindfulness, and conscious living.



I'm looking for someone who can help:

• Research and write engaging content about cacao

• Structure the book in a clear, compelling way

• Turn ideas, notes, and conversations into polished chapters

• Maintain an authentic and inspiring tone

• Ensure the writing is clear, engaging, and easy to read

• Help shape the manuscript so it works well as a downloadable ebook for our audience



About the book

The book will explore topics such as:

• The history and cultural roots of cacao

• Cacao and their significance

• The connection between cacao, breathwork, and personal transformation

• Mindfulness, rituals, and conscious living

• Practical ways people can incorporate cacao into their lives



The goal is to create an inspiring and educational ebook that introduces people to cacao and supports the mission of our wellness work.



You are someone who:

• Has experience ghostwriting books or long-form content

• Can research topics and translate them into engaging storytelling

• Writes clearly while keeping a warm and authentic voice

• Can take ideas and shape them into a structured manuscript

• Communicates clearly and works independently



Bonus if you:

• Have experience writing about wellness, spirituality, or plant medicine

• Have worked with coaches, speakers, or personal development brands

• Understand storytelling that connects with readers emotionally



Timeline

Ideally within the next 4–6 weeks, though I'm flexible depending on scope and availability.



Next Steps

Please send to 

             1. A short video introduction about yourself and your relevant experience

             2. Samples of similar work (books, ebooks, wellness writing, etc.)

             3. Your rate (fixed or hourly)



Looking forward to working with someone who can help bring this vision to life and create something meaningful for our community.



Warmly,

Vish

title: E-commerce Operations & Support Specialist
description:
Location: Remote (Work-from-Home)

Schedule: 8 AM – 5 PM CST 

Salary: $8.5 per hour (negotiable)



Overview:

1Vision is seeking a proactive, detail-oriented candidate to join our growing e-commerce and fulfillment team. We’re looking for someone who can quickly learn new systems, problem-solve independently, and take initiative even when detailed documentation isn’t available. This role requires the ability to follow instructions, work with minimal oversight, and ask the right questions to resolve issues efficiently.



Job Summary:

This position involves managing our e-commerce platform and backend fulfillment systems, handling daily portal operations, and assisting with customer service requests. The ideal candidate will act as a help-desk level support for order management, product setup, and data validation—ensuring accuracy, solving discrepancies, and pulling the right information from the system when needed.



Responsibilities

- Manage day-to-day portal operations:

- Create & upload thumbnails, add/update users, set approvals, and manage products/pricing.

- Create new items with correct client-specific settings.

- Run back-end reports and respond to client requests.

- Troubleshoot and resolve data/report discrepancies using Excel formulas, alternate reports, or system lookups.

- Oversee returned orders, inventory updates, and product releases.

- Assist with backend fulfillment tasks and special projects.



Qualifications

- Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently.

- Intermediate Excel (pivot tables, data correlation).

- Experience in client-facing roles, preferably in e-commerce or fulfillment.

- Positive attitude, strong work ethic, and attention to detail.

- 2–3 years’ relevant experience; commercial printing/fulfillment a plus.

- Familiarity with XMPie uCreate, uProduce, or uStore is an advantage.



How to Apply

- Send your updated resume and a 1-minute video highlighting your relevant experience.

title: Senior Cloud Accountant (Direct Hire / Work from Home)
description:
Join the Team as a Senior  Cloud Accountant at Bean Ninjas USA!

Philippine CPA license highly preferred.



Bean Ninjas USA is on the lookout for enthusiastic and skilled professionals to become part of our expanding team. If you're passionate about cloud accounting and meet the qualifications listed below, we’d love to connect with you!



Filipino candidate must possess the following (Please do not apply if you do not have the following):



~ 5+ years of full-time accounting experience within a BPO or similar environment.

- end-to-end bookkeeping experience including preparation of Balance Sheet and Income Statement

~ Proficient in cloud accounting software and platforms.

~ Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Bachelor's degree in Accounting or related field (preferred)

- Has Xero and/or QuickBooks Online experience



Qualifications for the role:



- Full-time work (Mon-Fri) for our US clients within the Philippines working hours of 8 am to 5 pm.

- We also offer flexibility on the schedule at work once you are familiar with the processes and client work.

- Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.

- Team player who would get along well with the rest of the Bean Ninjas team



Specific Responsibilities



In this role, you will look after management reporting and weekly/monthly transaction processing for a portfolio of Bean Ninjas bookkeeping clients.



Bookkeeping Service Delivery



-Uses Xero and QuickBooks Online

-Uses Xero and QBO add-ons and integrations like Hubdoc, A2X, Receipt Bank, Stripe, and Paypal.

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

title: Experienced Real Estate Acquisitions Closer (Warm Leads Only)

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

title: Customer Success Manager / Loan Processor
description:
About FINR Advisory

Watch our company video here:

FINR Advisory is a boutique Finance Broking firm offering Residential, Commercial and Asset Finance Broking services to investors who are looking to grow their portfolios or developers looking for their next development deal.



We are looking for a friendly and enthusiastic Customer Success Manager/ Loan Processor to join our growing team based out of Melbourne, Victoria, Australia. mory capacity to run various programs and applications.

title: Amazon Private Label and PPC Specialist
description:
About the role

We are an Australian owned business with a UK based private label brand on Amazon.

You will be managing a UK marketplace private label brand for an Australian client.

We are looking for an experienced Amazon specialist in the Philippines to manage our advertising campaigns, support A plus content, and stay on top of performance every week. You will work closely with our creative team to brief and improve images and video so the brand stays competitive and profitable.



Key responsibilities

1. Campaign and ad management

Set up, manage, and optimise Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display campaigns.

Monitor Amazon Ads and Ad Console several times per week within your agreed hours.

Adjust bids, budgets, and targeting to reach ACOS and TACOS targets.

Manage keyword research, search term reports, and negative keywords.

Run regular tests on creatives, headlines, and placements.

2. Private label brand management

Work only on our private label listings, not arbitrage or wholesale.

Review competitor listings, pricing, and offers on the UK marketplace.

Suggest changes to offers, pricing, and promotions based on data.

Coordinate with the team on review strategy and listing quality.

3. A plus content and listings

Review current listings and A plus content for clarity, keyword coverage, and conversion.

Brief the creative team on images, infographics, comparison charts, and brand story modules.

Check uploads on Amazon once the creative team delivers the assets.

Suggest ongoing improvements based on performance data.

4. Creative and video ads

Plan what image and video assets are needed for ads and product detail pages.

Provide clear briefs to designers and video editors with examples and references.

Review final assets before upload and confirm they meet Amazon guidelines.

Monitor performance of video ads and propose changes when needed.

5. Reporting and optimisation

Prepare a short weekly performance summary with key numbers, including ACOS, TACOS, ad spend, sales, best and worst performers, and search terms.

Flag any issues early, including sudden drops in performance or policy warnings.

Keep simple dashboards or spreadsheets up to date.



Skills and experience

Strong experience managing Amazon Ads for private label brands, with at least one year of hands on experience in Amazon PPC and Ad Console.

Confident in managing Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, and Sponsored Display.

Confident in keyword research and search term analysis.

Experience with bid and budget optimisation and negative keyword strategy.

Good understanding of listing optimisation, including titles, bullet points, images, and A plus content.

Experience working with a creative team and giving clear, structured briefs.

Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills for basic reports and analysis.

Experience with tools such as Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Data Dive, or similar.

Strong English reading and writing skills, with a focus on UK marketplace wording.

Personal qualities

Proactive and organised, always aware of campaign performance.

Detail focused, especially with numbers, bids, and budgets.

Comfortable working independently with light supervision.

Clear and direct communicator, able to explain needs and findings to the creative and leadership team.

Strong sense of ownership for results and ad spend.



Hours and working pattern

Approximately 3 to 5 hours per week to start.

Flexible schedule, as long as agreed weekly tasks and reporting are completed on time.

Potential for more hours as the brand grows and results improve.

Benefits

Work from home, long term role for the right person.

Stable client based in Australia with growth plans in the UK marketplace.

Opportunity to grow hours and responsibilities over time.

title: Accountant (Multi-Entity)
description:
Role Purpose

To manage the daily accounting function across multiple TBD entities, ensuring invoices are processed, payments are collected, accounts are reconciled, and financial statements are prepared accurately and on time.

The Arrangement

This is a results-based engagement, not an hours-based one. The work needs to be completed each morning once Xero has updated overnight. As long as the work is done and I can see results, the exact timing within the morning window is flexible.

•Service window: 8:00am - 10:00am AEST (approximate)

•Flexibility within that window based on workload

•What matters: work is complete, accurate, and I can see the results

•No micromanagement of hours if outcomes are delivered



Primary Values



Highest Standards : Every figure is correct. Every reconciliation balances. Every statement is accurate. No sloppy work, no assumptions, no 'it's probably right'.



Ownership: You own the numbers. If something doesn't balance, you find out why. If a payment is missing, you chase it. You don't wait to be told there's a problem.



Deliver Results:  The work gets done every morning. Reports are ready when needed. Queries are resolved, not parked. Outcomes matter more than hours logged.





1 Accounts Receivable Generate and send all client invoices across multiple entities via Xero. Ensure accuracy of amounts, services, and client details. Chase overdue payments.

2 Accounts Payable Process supplier invoices, verify against purchase orders or approvals, schedule payments, and maintain accurate creditor records.

3 Debt Collection Actively chase outstanding debts. Request and follow up on statements. Resolve queries promptly. Escalate aged debt as per agreed thresholds.

4 Bank Reconciliation Reconcile all bank accounts daily once Xero updates. Identify and resolve discrepancies. No unmatched transactions left unaddressed.

5 Multi-Entity Management Manage accounts across Australian and UAE entities. Maintain clean separation between entities. Ensure intercompany transactions are properly recorded.

6 Statement Requests Request statements from suppliers and debtors as needed. Confirm balances. Identify and resolve any discrepancies between records.

7 Query Resolution Respond to and resolve queries from clients, suppliers, and internal stakeholders. Don't let queries sit. Own them until resolved.

8 Financial Statements Prepare monthly Profit & Loss and Balance Sheet for each entity. Ensure statements are accurate, complete, and delivered by agreed deadlines.

9 Month-End Close Complete month-end close procedures. Ensure all transactions are posted, accruals are recorded, and accounts are ready for reporting.



Requirements

Essential

•Strong Xero experience (this is non-negotiable)

•Experience managing accounts for multiple entities

•Ability to prepare financial statements (P&L, Balance Sheet)

•Experience with accounts receivable, accounts payable, and bank reconciliation

•Comfortable chasing payments and resolving queries professionally

•Reliable internet and quiet workspace

•Available within the 8:00am - 10:00am AEST service window

Desirable

•Accounting qualification (CPA, CA, or equivalent)

•Experience with Australian accounting standards (UAE experience a plus)

•Experience in a services or professional services business

What Success Looks Like

•Bank accounts reconciled daily, no unexplained items

•Invoices sent on time and accurately

•Debts chased proactively, not aged silently

•Queries resolved, not parked

•Financial statements ready when needed, accurate and complete

•I can see results each morning without having to ask

•Problems flagged early, not discovered later

The Non-Negotiables

•Accuracy is everything. If you're not sure, check. If you can't check, ask.

•Don't let things age silently. If a debt is overdue, chase it. If a query is unresolved, resolve it.

•Own your numbers. If something doesn't balance, it's your job to find out why.

•Communicate proactively. If there's a problem, I should hear it from you first.

•Results matter more than hours. Get the work done right, and the flexibility works both ways.

title: Quantitative Research Consultant

Qualifications & Experience

(e.g. Statistics, Economics, Business, Marketing, Data Analytics)

Why Join This Role

Opportunity to grow your analytical and consulting skillset

Remote-friendly, performance-focused culture

title: Experienced content writer with a passion for SEO
description:
About Us:

We’re a fast-growing digital agency helping service-based businesses scale through high-performing websites, SEO, and paid media.



Our focus is simple: build digital assets that convert and drive measurable growth.



We believe great agencies are built by developing great people. We invest heavily in our team’s growth and provide structured upskilling in SEO fundamentals, strategy, and performance marketing through curated educational videos, online tools, mentorship, and real-world implementation.



We’re now looking for an experienced Content Writer with a genuine passion for SEO, someone who doesn’t just write words, but understands strategy, search intent, and commercial outcomes.



This is not a “blog churn” role.

This is strategic, conversion-focused content.



The Role

As our SEO Content Strategist & Conversion Copywriter, you will play a key role in shaping the performance of our clients’ digital presence.



You’ll be responsible for creating high-converting landing pages, website copy, and strategic SEO content that drives rankings, leads, and revenue.



You’ll work closely with our SEO, Google Ads, and Web Design teams to ensure messaging aligns with strategy, UX, and performance goals.



You’ll also continue developing your own SEO capability — deepening your understanding of ranking strategy, search intent mapping, competitive positioning, and conversion psychology as part of your role.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Writing high-converting landing page copy for service-based businesses

- Creating full website content for web design projects

- Conducting keyword research and mapping content to search intent

- Developing SEO-driven content strategies

- Collaborating on SEO & Google Ads strategy (ad messaging, extensions, positioning)

- Optimising on-page elements (headlines, meta titles, descriptions, internal linking)

- Structuring content for UX, CRO, and readability

- Reviewing competitor positioning and identifying content gaps

- Continuously upskilling in SEO fundamentals and advanced strategy through internal training, educational content, and online tools



What We’re Looking For:

- 2+ years experience in SEO-focused content writing

- Proven experience writing landing pages for service-based businesses

- Strong understanding of keyword research and search intent

- Experience working alongside SEO or paid ads teams



Skills & Traits



Great Communicator - You can clearly articulate ideas, ask smart questions, and translate strategy into compelling copy.



Team Player - You collaborate well with designers, SEO specialists, and account managers.



Growth Mindset - You actively look to improve your craft, embrace feedback, and stay current with SEO trends and AI tools.



Strategic Thinker - You understand that content is part of a larger marketing system. You think beyond words — toward outcomes.



Commercially Aware - You understand that content must convert, not just rank.



What You’ll Get:

- Ongoing structured upskilling in SEO fundamentals and strategy

- Access to curated educational videos, tools, and learning resources

- Mentorship and practical implementation experience

- A collaborative, high-performance environment

- Exposure to diverse industries and growth strategies

- Real ownership and impact in a growing agency

- Flexible working hours 



How to Apply



Please include:

- 3–5 examples of landing pages you’ve written

- A brief explanation of the SEO strategy behind one of those pieces

- Write 'Cool Bananas' at the top of your reply



If you’re passionate about SEO, strategy, and writing content that drives measurable growth — and you’re excited to continuously level up your skillset — we’d love to hear from you.



Cheers - Mitch

title: Video Editor $10-$16 USD/hr (E-commerce Brand Experience REQUIRED)
description:
Video Editor - Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $10–$16+ USD Per Hour + Bonuses up to $250 per video!!



- MUST HAVE experience making ads for e-commerce brands

- Please list brands you have worked with and include work and ads that you have made :)



Hey there! We’re a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we’re looking for an eCommerce Video editor to join our team full-time. You’ll work closely with our ad strategists and creative teams to produce winning ads for our Shopify customers.



Why This Role is Crucial:

This is the most important role at our brand. If you're a skilled video editor who thrives on crafting ads that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your edits move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.



Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.



Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.



As a video editor, you'll bring our team's deep knowledge and insights to life through powerful visuals and storytelling. Your ability to craft scroll-stopping hooks, compelling pacing, and polished ad concepts will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your editing decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every edit reinforces the right message.

Crafting your visuals — Transforming raw footage, UGC, and creative briefs into high-converting video ads that stop the scroll and drive action.





Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Edit & create 1 batch of ads (3-5 videos) per day based on instructions from our creative team.

Add captions, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design that elevate ad performance.

Collaborate with our copy and strategy teams to ensure creative concepts are executed perfectly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Analyze ad performance weekly and apply learnings to future edits.

Maintain a fast turnaround while upholding a high standard of quality.

Attend or watch recordings of monthly client strategy calls to stay in sync.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes video ads win or lose.



More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

As a video editor, you'll receive performance bonuses under management up to $250 per video depending on performance.

You'll also have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

+ BONUSES!



Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, I’d love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $10-$16 USD per hour



Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to make ads from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology



Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday



Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience editing video ads for eCommerce?

What got you to start being a video editor?



Experience:

Video Editing: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience preferred. + Will to learn



How to Apply

Please include: A short video about yourself, any experience with sales, and video editing, and up to 5 videos MAX of past work (portfolio, social media, or case studies) Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day)





Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: Content Production Assistant (Short-Form / Instagram Reels)
description:
Overview:

We are looking for a fast and detail-oriented Content Production Assistant to help produce and scale short-form videos for Instagram. You will work with pre-selected viral content and transform it into new variations using AI tools and editing software.



This is an execution-focused role. You will follow clear workflows and replicate proven content formats with precision.



Responsibilities:



Create variations of provided “first frame” images (outfits, backgrounds, styling)



Use AI tools (Kling / Higgsfield) to apply motion control based on reference videos



Edit short-form videos using CapCut (subtitles, timing, formatting)



Ensure all outputs match the original reference in pacing, style, and quality



Export and organize videos for posting across multiple Instagram accounts



Follow structured SOPs and deliver content daily



Required Skills:



Experience with CapCut (short-form editing, subtitles, timing)



Experience with Kling AI (motion control / video generation)



Experience with Higgsfield (image generation / variation)



Understanding of Instagram Reels format



Strong attention to detail (must replicate content accurately)



Ability to follow instructions and workflows precisely



Fast execution and good time management



Nice to Have:



Experience working with viral short-form content



Basic understanding of hooks, pacing, and engagement



Familiarity with AI-generated content workflows



Important:



This is NOT a creative role.

You are not required to come up with ideas — your job is to execute and replicate high-performing content with precision and consistency.



Salary:



$4–$5 USD per hour



Full-time (40 hours/week): $640 – $800 USD per month



Part-time options available



Performance bonuses may be offered based on output and quality.



Daily Output Expectation:



Produce multiple video variations per day (10–30+ depending on speed and experience)



How to Apply:



Please include:



Examples of short-form videos you’ve edited (CapCut or similar)



Any experience using Kling AI or Higgsfield



Your daily availability and timezone



Your expected hourly rate

title: Video Editor / VA (AI Content)
description:
Hiring – Video Editor / VA (AI Content)



Job Overview:



I’m looking for a skilled and reliable Video Editor / VA who can take AI-generated visuals and turn them into smooth, engaging Instagram Reels. You will follow a clear, step-by-step workflow with Loom video explanations for each task  but you must execute quickly, pay attention to detail, and think ahead. You need to have an artistic and creative mind.



Responsibilities:





    Review provided images & propose animation ideas before starting 



    Create 2–3 animation variations per image 



    Combine and edit animations in CapCut



You’ll Get:



    Clear Loom/Miro video explanations for each step



    A consistent flow of projects



    The opportunity to work with influencers, be part of a marketing team, and collaborate with one of the top AI agencies in the market



Requirements:



    Eye for detail and commitment 



    Skilled in Capcut and AI tools.



    Ability to follow instructions and also propose ideas beyond “basic generation” you must have a CREATIVE mind



    Works independently and meets deadlines



Work Setup:





    Flexible schedule, but must meet deadlines





How to Apply:



Send me a message with:



    A short introduction about yourself



    Your portfolio 



You must have a computer, be tech savy, comfortable with Instagram

description:

***APPLICANTS MUST HAVE PROVEN VIRTUAL ASSISTANT EXPERIENCE WITH FACILITIES OR PROPERTY SERVICE BUSINESSES (E.G., PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, REAL ESTATE OPERATIONS, FACILITIES MANAGEMENT, TENANT SERVICES, OR BUILDING MANAGEMENT***



We're looking for a reliable, detail-focused Virtual Assistant to join us.



In this role, you’ll work closely with our office managers. Your job is to handle the day-to-day admin and documentation tasks so our managers can focus on higher-level client support and business growth.



If you enjoy structured work, staying organized, and helping small businesses run smoothly, this could be a great fit.



What You’ll Be Doing:

• Prepare and send invoices for services and products

• Process registrations, documentation, and related records

• Complete and submit required forms and paperwork

• Assist with permits, applications, and administrative documentation as needed

• Create simple, professional social media posts

• Organize digital files and maintain accurate records

• Provide general administrative support to managers and tea
mbers as needed

• Helping with customer-related follow-ups when needed



What We're Looking For:

• Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Solid experience as a Virtual Assistant or in an administrative support role

• Background supporting facilities or property service business

• Comfortable creating basic social media content

• Tech-savvy and confident, learning new systems quickly

• Highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable

• Able to work independently and manage multiple tasks without constant supervision

• Experience handling rebates, permits, or compliance paperwork is a big plus



Work Details:

• Full-time, remote position

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week



To apply for this position, please follow the steps below:

1. Use "VA" as the subject line of your application

2. Submit a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience

3. Include a link to your CV



****WE WILL NOT CONSIDER APPLICATIONS WITH NO CVS/RESUMES.***

title: Looking for short-form scriptwriter
description:
Requirements:

• Fast turnaround and reliable daily output

• Can start ASAP

• Applicants without a relevant portfolio will be ignored.



IMPORTANT:

• Every script must be exactly 10 words (no exceptions)

• You must be responsive and communicative with the team

• Consistency and speed are critical for this role



Role Overview:

• Write high-volume shortform scripts (10 words each) for social content

• Follow content style inspired by the reference channel

• Collaborate with tea
mbers for iterations and improvements

• Maintain consistency in tone, clarity, and engagement across scripts



To Apply:

Send a few examples of 10-word scripts you’ve written, along with any relevant portfolio work.



Also, we've had issues with bot applications lately. To help us filter, please start your message with a fruit that's yellow when ripe, and if you enjoy baking, feel free to share a quick recipe for something preferably something Georgian or your personal favorite!

title: Appointment Setter (B2B Cold Calling)
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



IMPORTANT: We are only looking for someone with specifically B2B cold calling experience.  If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or leads from an ad, please do not apply. 



----------  ----------  ----------  ----------  ----------



Hi — my name is Jordan, and I’m the founder of a company that helps small businesses never miss a call using an A.I. Receptionist. We help service businesses capture missed calls and turn them into real customers instead of losing them to competitors.



We are not a large corporate call center where employees are treated like numbers. We are looking for 1–2 experienced B2B cold callers who want a long-term role with the opportunity to make good money and grow with our business.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:

• Source B2B leads (small business owners)

• Make outbound cold calls

• Introduce our service in a clear and simple way

• Book qualified prospects for a free consultation

• Confirm that the appointments you book actually show up

• You do not close the deals, our team handles the sales calls. Your job is to start conversations and book quality appointments.



THIS ROLE IS A GOOD FIT IF YOU:

• Have real B2B cold calling experience

• Speak clear, confident English

• Have reliable internet and a quiet workspace

• Are comfortable making high-volume outbound calls

• Are consistent, disciplined, and reliable



COMPENSATION:

• $5 per hour base pay

• $25 for every attended appointment (show-up)

• $100 for every deal that closes

• Monthly performance bonuses available



HOURS:

• Part-time (20 hours per week) to start with the option to transition to full time

• Schedule: 1:00 AM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time



HOW TO APPLY:

• Please do not send a generic message or one written with chat GPT - those will be ignored.

• Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B

• Include the following 4 things in your application:

     1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling B2B 

     2) Describe in detail your experience:  What service/product were you offering and to who

     3) How did you find your leads?

     4) Put "Dial And Smile" in the subject line.
