title: Operations Virtual Assistant
description:
Full-Time Virtual Assistant (Operations & Integrator) – Vacation Rental Company



Remote (Philippines) | $8–$10/hour | 40 hours/week



About Us



We are a growing vacation rental management company based in Wisconsin (USA), focused on high-quality homes, strong systems, and exceptional guest experiences.



We manage unique properties in markets like Wisconsin Dells, Baraboo, and Lake Delton. Our focus is simple: quality, organization, and continuous improvement.



We are building a team that values:



Clear communication



Attention to detail



Ownership and accountability



Systems and efficiency



About the Role



We are looking for a full-time, dedicated Virtual Assistant to help build and improve our operations.



This is not a side job. We are looking for someone who is committed to this role as their primary focus and is excited to grow with us long-term.



You will work directly with the owner to turn ideas into completed systems and processes.



This role includes:



Operations support



System building



Communication



Project execution



Schedule (CST – U.S. Central Time)



30 Scheduled Hours:



Monday: 12:00 PM – 6:00 PM



Tuesday: OFF



Wednesday: OFF



Thursday: 12:00 PM – 6:00 PM



Friday: 11:00 AM – 7:00 PM



Saturday: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM



Sunday: 9:00 AM – 3:00 PM



+ 10 Flexible Hours Per Week



Flexible hours are used for:



Urgent guest or operational needs outside scheduled hours



Project work (SOPs, Notion organization, system building)



Busy periods and overflow support



Total: 40 hours/week



Overtime



Any approved hours worked beyond 40 hours per week will be paid at 1.5x the hourly rate.



Key Responsibilities



1. Project Ownership & Execution (VERY IMPORTANT)



Take ownership of projects and see them through to completion



Track progress and follow up until tasks are fully finished



Ensure nothing falls through the cracks



Example:

If we d
 to update property details across all listings, your role is to make sure it gets completed fully — including coordinating with tea
mbers to verify and implement updates.



2. Systems & SOP Development



Build and organize workflows inside Notion



Create and improve SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)



Turn ideas into clear, repeatable systems



3. Communication



Coordinate with:



Vendors (cleaners, maintenance, etc.)



Guests (when custom responses are needed)



Clients (after communication systems are established)



Help manage and improve messaging systems such as Hostbuddy AI



4. Tech & Platform Management



Work within tools such as:



Notion



Hospitable (or similar PMS)



Airbnb / VRBO



Google Workspace



Slack



Help improve and better utilize our tech stack



Who This Is Perfect For



Someone who:



Has excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)



Is highly organized and detail-oriented



Enjoys working with systems, tools, and organization



Is tech-savvy and learns new platforms quickly



Takes ownership and follows through until tasks are DONE



Enjoys turning ideas into finished, structured processes



Important Requirements



This is your primary full-time job (not one of several jobs)



You are available and responsive during scheduled hours



You are comfortable using a time tracking tool (OnlineJobs Timeproof)



Reliable internet and work setup



Bonus (Not Required)



Experience with Airbnb or vacation rentals



Experience with SOP creation or operations roles



Familiarity with AI tools or automation workflows



Compensation



$8–$10/hour depending on experience



40 hours per week



Long-term role with growth opportunities



Hiring Process



Application review



Short interview (15–20 minutes)



Paid test task (SOP creation based on a short video)



How to Apply



Please include:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience with tools like Notion or similar systems



An example of a project you completed from start to finish



Your current work situation (do you have other jobs?)



Include your favorite food within the application.  



Final Note



We are looking for someone who takes pride in their work and enjoys finishing what they start.



If you are someone who likes organization, systems, and seeing projects through to completion, you will do very well in this role.

title: Klaviyo Email Marketing Specialist (Part-time ? Full-time)

To apply, send your Klaviyo portfolio with revenue results. Applications without proof of results will not be considered.

title: Copywriter / AI Prompter (Funnels Experience Preferred)

title: AI PROMPTER / CREATIVE STORYTELLER (Images + Video)
description:
We are looking for a creative mind obsessed with visuals, storytelling, and AI — not someone with a perfect résumé.



This role is for someone who loves creating captivating images and videos, experimenting with AI tools, and turning ideas into scroll-stopping visuals. You do NOT need years of experience. You do NOT need to already know every tool. What matters most is creativity, imagination, taste, and the hunger to master AI prompting at a god-level.



You will be working with one of our partner agencies serving US-based clients across SaaS, Finance, Health & Wellness, Beauty, and Public Figures. Your job is to help create story-driven AI images and videos that feel emotional, premium, and memorable — not generic AI content.



What you’ll be doing:



- Creating story-based AI images and cinematic scenes

- Creating short AI videos and visual narratives

- Producing beauty, health, and wellness visuals that evoke emotion and transformation

- Supporting premium brand visuals for SaaS and finance products

- Building moods, worlds, and visual storytelling concepts

- You will work with advanced tools such as Minimax, VEO3, ComfyUI, and other AI image and video systems.



All tools, frameworks, prompts, training, and feedback are provided by us.



Who this role is for:



- Students or young creatives

- Self-taught designers, editors, or AI enthusiasts

- People experimenting with AI images, videos, or prompts for fun

- Creators obsessed with aesthetics, mood, and storytelling

- Hidden talents who have not had a real opportunity yet



Formal experience is NOT required. A strong creative eye IS required.



What matters most to us:



- Creativity and imagination

- Visual taste and storytelling ability

- Emotional awareness (mood, vibe, feeling)

- Curiosity and willingness to experiment

- Intelligence and ability to learn fast



What matters less to us:



- Degrees

- Years of experience

- Big company names



IMPORTANT – APPLICATION REQUIREMENT:



To apply, you MUST include sample work that shows your creativity.



This can be anything, including:



- AI-generated images

- Short AI videos



- Prompt experiments

- Mood boards or visual concepts

- Personal projects

- Beauty, health, or wellness visuals (preferred)



Client work is NOT required.



Personal experiments are 100% fine, as long as they show creativity and taste.



Applications without sample work will NOT be considered.



How to apply:



Please include:



- A short introduction about yourself

- Why this role excites you

- Links to your creative samples (Google Drive, Notion, Behance, Instagram, etc.)



We do not expect perfection.

We expect potential.



If you’re the type of person who thinks:



“Give me the tools and I’ll become insanely good,”

this role is for you.

title: HR Talent Partner (Marketing & Growth) – HYPETRIBE Portfolio Companies
description:
Talent Partner (Marketing & Growth) – HYPETRIBE Portfolio Companies

Remote (Manila-based) · Occasional meetings in BGC



HYPETRIBE is a US-based venture studio that builds and scales multiple portfolio companies across performance marketing, SaaS, AI, automation, and digital products. Our companies move fast, test aggressively, and care deeply about execution quality.



Because of that, hiring matters a lot. One wrong hire can slow an entire team down. One strong hire can compound results for months or years.



We are not looking for traditional HR.

We are looking for someone who understands how real marketing and product teams work and can help us consistently bring in the right people.



This role is a Talent Partner focused on scouting, screening, and placing talent across multiple HYPETRIBE portfolio companies. You will work closely with founders and team leads who are operators, not corporate managers.



You do not need to use marketing tools, ad platforms, or AI systems yourself. But you must understand how these roles differ in practice. You should clearly know the difference between a junior and a senior media buyer, between a product manager and a venture builder, and between a designer who can actually execute and one who only looks good on a CV.



Judgment matters more here than process.



This role is a strong fit for someone who has recruited for marketing agencies, startups, or performance-driven teams before. You should be comfortable looking at a CV or portfolio and quickly telling whether the experience is real or just buzzwords.



You should also be comfortable saying no. Not every candidate is good enough, and protecting standards is part of the job. Rate negotiation is part of the job as well — done firmly, respectfully, and with the long-term health of the company in mind.



You will recruit across a wide range of roles depending on what our portfolio companies need at the time. This includes performance marketing and growth roles like media buyers, funnel builders, and conversion specialists. It also includes product and design roles such as product managers, venture builders, and UI/UX or product designers. In addition, you will work on AI-enabled and content-driven roles like video editors, AI-assisted designers, and content creators using modern tools.



You are not expected to master these tools. What matters is your ability to pre-qualify candidates correctly and spot real potential early.



On a day-to-day level, you will source and scout candidates across multiple platforms, review CVs and portfolios critically, and conduct first-round screening interviews. Your goal is to shortlist only candidates who are genuinely worth a founder’s time.



You will coordinate interviews with founders and team leads, manage hiring pipelines clearly, and handle compensation discussions within defined ranges. Over time, you will also build long-term relationships with strong candidates, even when there is no immediate opening.



This is not an admin role.

We are not looking for someone who forwards candidates without proper screening, avoids difficult conversations about money, or treats recruiting as a checklist task.



We are looking for someone with high emotional intelligence, strong loyalty to the venture studio and its portfolio companies, and a long-term mindset. Someone who understands that protecting hiring standards and costs is just as important as filling roles.



The role is fully remote and Manila-based. The BGC office is used only for weekly or occasional in-person meetings. Working hours are flexible and depend on hiring activity rather than fixed shifts.



Compensation is not listed publicly. Please include your monthly salary expectation in your application.



When applying, please share the types of roles you have recruited for before and the kinds of companies, agencies, or industries you have worked with. If you want, you can also include a short example of a difficult or high-impact hire you successfully closed.



This role has real influence.

Hiring the wrong people slows everything down.

Hiring the right people compounds growth across the entire portfolio.



If you take pride in hiring quality and protecting standards, you’ll fit in well here.

title: Offer Architect / Direct Response Expert
description:
We are a global media company with a fast-growing Direct Response division. We create offers across Nutra, Dating, Survival, BizOpp, Finance, and Personal Development. Our work touches platforms like ClickBank, Digistore, Meta, YouTube, Native, and TikTok. We already have an amazing team in Manila and are now expanding.



We are hiring a REMOTE PH-based Offer Architect / Direct Response Copywriter, available part-time or full-time. This role is for someone who understands real DR fundamentals—offer architecture, VSL storytelling, big ideas, unique mechanisms, emotional triggers, and high-converting funnel structures—not traditional branding.



You will help shape complete offers from start to finish: big idea ? mechanism ? angles ? hooks ? VSL structure ? presells ? upsells. If you have experience in any direct response vertical, you’re welcome to apply.



Your responsibilities include:



• Creating offer architectures and mechanism-based positioning

• Writing long-form VSLs (8k–20k words) in clear Grade-5 English

• Building presell pages, advertorials, quiz funnels, and upsell paths

• Developing hook libraries, angle matrices, and curiosity-driven opens

• Collaborating with media buyers to optimize CPA, AOV, EPC, and funnel flow

• Studying competitor funnels and reverse engineering winners

• Creating compliant cold-traffic messaging for Meta & YouTube

• Using DR frameworks (RMBC, Agora principles, Todd Brown USP)

• Working with AI tools for research, ideation, and B-roll briefing



We offer long-term stability, weekly pay, and the chance to grow inside a global media ecosystem with a strong presence in Manila. You’ll join a supportive performance team that values speed, clarity, creativity, and execution.



If you have real DR experience and want to work on ambitious, high-impact offers, we would love to meet you.

title: Project Manager (Venture Studio Level)
description:
Project Manager / Product Manager





We're a multi-product venture studio moving at startup speed. We launch, test, and scale new businesses in weeks. To keep the machine running, we need a Strategic Project Manager who not only thrives on systems and automation but also values autonomy in their work. Without a strong PM, fast-paced ventures collapse into chaos. You will transform raw ideas into roadmaps, build automated workflows, and ensure execution across global teams.





Responsibilities:

1. Translate the founder's vision into structured roadmaps with milestones and accountability.

2. Build automated workflows (Zapier, Make, n8n) to eliminate bottlenecks.

3. Use AI to draft project briefs, reports, and updates.

4. Own product launches end-to-end, from validation to post-launch optimization.

5. Serve as the bridge between marketing, product, and tech.





Requirements:

1.2+ years in startups, SaaS, or agency environments.

2. Proven track record of launching products/campaigns.

3. Experience leading distributed, cross-functional teams.

4. Expert in Notion, ClickUp, and workflow automation.

5. Advanced AI user (ChatGPT, Claude, Notion AI).

6. Technical background or dev communication skills.

7. Experience with SaaS metrics (CAC, LTV, retention).

8. Prior work in venture studios or high-growth startups.





If you’re eager to move quickly and think like a founder while harnessing AI as your partner, this is the place for you. We seek innovative operators and problem-solvers who thrive in chaos and turn ideas into revenue. This role offers a unique opportunity for growth, allowing you to refine your skills and make a meaningful impact.





TO BE CONSIDERED, send us the following:

1. Your resume or LinkedIn profile

2. Work samples, portfolio, or case studies relevant to the role

3. Your AI workflow summary (3 sentences)





We look forward to meeting the talented individuals who will help us build the future. Your unique skills and experiences align perfectly with our needs, and we are eager to discover how you can contribute to our team.

title: Direct Response Marketing VA / Creative Ops Assistant
description:

2. Manage content libraries, version control, and naming conventions for hundreds of creatives.

4. Upload and organize campaigns to ensure all ads meet compliance, platform specifications, and tracking requirements.

5. Track creative performance daily and report on winning hooks, formats, and angles.

6. Brief designers, editors, and copywriters based on data insights and performance results.

7. Automate repetitive workflows and reports using tools like 
, Zapier, or Notion AI.

8. Research trending creatives, competitors, and ad angles using AI-assisted tools.





Requirements:

1. 1+ year experience in direct response marketing, media buying support, or creative operations.

2. Familiarity with ad platforms (Meta Ads Manager, TikTok Ads, or Native Ads).

3. Excellent organization and communication skills, able to coordinate multiple moving pieces.

4. Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, Runway, Jasper) for content generation and creative ideation.

5. Strong understanding of direct response principles, including hooks, problem-agitation-solution, and curiosity-driven storytelling.

6. Attention to detail, time management, and ability to work independently in a fast-paced, remote environment.

7. Bonus: experience with ClickUp, Notion, or automation platforms (Zapier, 
).





To be CONSIDERED, send us the following:

1. Your resume, portfolio, or LinkedIn profile

2. Examples of campaigns or ad creatives you’ve managed or helped produce

3. (Optional) A short Loom video or note describing your workflow and AI tools you use daily

title: [EXPERT] Video & Graphic Editor (High-End Ads | Long-Term Role)
description:

We provide:

- Hooks

You focus on execution that converts.

title: Ad Creative Speacilist
description:
We are looking for an Ad Creative Specialist to help us create better-performing ads for Machete Muay Thai.

This role is for someone who understands that good creative is not about making things look “nice.” It is about making ads that stop attention, speak to the right person, create emotion, and drive action.



You will be responsible for helping turn our offers, customer pain points, brand voice, and footage into ad creatives that are clear, sharp, and built to convert.



You should be strong in:

Writing hooks and ad copy

Creating ad angles from a clear avatar

Structuring video and image ad concepts

Understanding what makes people stop scrolling

Matching creative to the offer and market awareness level

Testing variations instead of guessing

Following brand tone without watering it down



This is not for someone who needs constant hand-holding or just wants to make “content.”

We want someone who can think, create, test, improve, and bring ideas to the table.



What you will be doing

Creating ad concepts for paid social campaigns

Writing hooks, headlines, primary text, and CTA variations

Turning raw ideas, offers, and footage into ad briefs

Researching the target market and identifying strong angles

Creating multiple variations for testing

Reviewing winning and losing creatives to improve output

Working within the Machete Muay Thai brand voice and standards

Helping us produce creatives that attract beginners, locals, and people ready for structure and change



What we are looking for

Strong understanding of direct response ad creative

Ability to write clearly and persuasively

Good instinct for hooks, pain points, objections, and emotion

Experience with Meta-style ad creatives is preferred

Ability to follow direction while still bringing ideas

Fast turnaround and strong communication

High attention to detail

Someone who cares about performance, not just aesthetics



To apply

Please do not send a generic application.

We want to see how you think.



Send through:

A short introduction video about who you are and your experience

Examples of ad creatives or copy you have made before

Any results you can share from past campaigns

Why you think you would be a good fit for this role

Your rate and availability



Application task

Please also complete the following test task:

Using the avatar of a beginner male in Penrith who feels unfit, lacks structure, and wants to do something that actually challenges him, create:

3 different ad hooks

2 ad angles

1 short primary text ad

1 video ad concept

1 image ad concept



Your work should feel direct, clear, and built for conversion, not fluffy or generic.



Important

We are looking for someone who can understand the difference between:

brand content vs ad creative

pretty vs persuasive

random ideas vs strategic angles

posting vs converting

If that sounds like you, apply properly.

title: Digital Marketing Manager
description:
Description

We are a US-based company seeking trained professionals based in the Philippines. Apex Health Management Group work directly with our clients to virtually help with their business office needs.

Our Digital Marketing Managers work with small businesses based in the USA.

We help our clients improve workflow, save time, and remove the burden of editing and producing digital content, allowing them to focus on future products and project planning.

Our goal is to help you succeed in this up-and-coming field of Multimedia Virtual Assisting. Join the Apex Health Management family and apply today!

Responsibilities:

Responsibilities may include one or a combination of the following. You do not need experience in all areas to be a strong candidate.

• Digital Marketing: Developing digital marketing strategies, running ad campaigns on platforms like Google,
, Instagram, and TikTok, and optimizing performance based on key metrics.

• Content Creation: Producing engaging and relevant materials such as blog posts, articles, social media content, graphics, and website copy.

• Social Media Management: Planning content calendars, creating social media strategies, and engaging with online communities.

• Search Engine Optimization (SEO): Conducting keyword research, optimizing web content for search engines, and analyzing performance to improve rankings.

• Photo & Video Editing: Editing photos and videos to produce visually appealing marketing materials.

• Audio Editing: Enhancing and editing audio for clarity and quality.

• Graphic Design: Designing visuals for both digital and print media while maintaining brand identity.

• Other Multimedia Skills: Motion graphics, animation, 2D/3D modeling, digital illustration, and voiceovers.

• Web Design: Building user-friendly and visually appealing websites.

• Web Development: Creating websites with expertise in front-end and/or back-end development.

• Administrative/Ad Hoc Tasks: Coordinating and communicating with clients via
, phone, or task management tools.

Requirements

Qualifications:

• At least a University school graduate.

• Minimum of 3 year of relevant professional experience, or 2 years of freelancing experience.

• Strong English speaking and writing skills, with the ability to communicate effectively with US-based clients via chat, phone, or video calls.

• Proficiency in at least one of the following tools:

o Video/Audio: Final Cut Pro, Adobe Premiere, Avid, Adobe Audition, Pro Tools, Logic Pro, Ableton Live, Reason, FL Studio.

o Image: Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Lightroom, Procreate, 3Ds Max, Maya, ZBrush.

o Social Media: Meta Business Suite, Buffer, Hootsuite, HubSpot, SocialPilot, Loomly.

Benefits

Work From Home

Have the ability to work from the comfort of your own home. No more commuting; spend more time with your family and friends



Long-Term Work Relationship

You will work with the same client or client groups consistently, leading to the development of a long-lasting work relationship

description:
We are aggressively scaling a portfolio of Shopify stores and need a highly autonomous Shopify expert to build stores end to end. You receive a reference site, you deliver a complete ready-to-launch store. No micromanagement, no hand-holding — we need someone who owns their work completely.



We currently need 1 store per month and are scaling to 3 to 6 stores per month fast. If you are good, we will keep you very busy.



What you will do



- Build Shopify stores from A to Z based on reference sites we provide

- Work exclusively with Prestige and Shrine Pro themes

- Install, configure, and troubleshoot all required Shopify apps

- Deliver fast, clean, conversion-optimized stores on deadline

- Scale with us as volume increases



What we need from you



- Expert-level knowledge of Prestige and Shrine Pro themes — non-negotiable

- Proven ability to replicate and build stores from scratch independently

- Comfortable using AI tools to work faster and smarter

- Zero need for micromanagement — you execute, you deliver

- Strong portfolio with live Shopify store links — mandatory, no exceptions

- 2+ years of hands-on Shopify development experience



What we offer

- $600 to $1,000/month based on experience and results 

- Open to freelance project-based or full-time — we adapt to the right person

- Steady and growing volume — 1 store now, 3 to 6 per month as we scale

- Async work, flexible hours, Philippine timezone

- Communication via WhatsApp

- Payment via Wise, on time every time

Portfolio with live store links is mandatory. If your application does not include a portfolio, it will not be reviewed. If you are good, we will keep you busy.

title: Experienced Editorial Outreach Specialist
description:
Now Hiring: Experienced Editorial Outreach Specialist

Remote Position | Long-Term Opportunity

Are you an experienced, detail-oriented writer with a strong commitment to producing measurable media results? Are you seeking a stable remote role with long-term growth potential—one that rewards high-quality, publication-ready content and the ability to build strong journalist relationships?

SimplyMedia is seeking a highly skilled Remote Editorial Outreach Specialist to join our expanding team. We are looking for a professional who understands editorial standards and can consistently deliver fast, compelling, and quotable pitches in response to media queries (HARO, Featured, etc.) while cultivating positive journalist relationships.

A writing background and portfolio/sample submissions are required.



What You’ll Receive

* Starting Pay: $450 per month

* Performance Bonuses: Top-performing specialists can advance from $450 to up to $1,000 per month in under six months by meeting our quality and speed KPIs (details provided upon hire).

* Paid Holidays (Philippine Official Holidays) & Paid Time Off: Available after regularization based on consistent, excellent performance.

* Targeted Training Provided: We will train you in our outreach tools and strategies; you must bring the foundational writing ability.

* Annual Bonuses for high-performing tea
mbers.



Who We’re Looking For

* Non-Negotiable: Proven writing experience (1+ years preferred) with the ability to submit a portfolio or relevant writing samples (e.g., media pitches, articles, marketing copy).

* Exceptional Writing Ability: Superb command of written English, strong grammar, and excellent editorial judgment. All outputs must be publication-ready.

* Relationship-Oriented Professional: Experience communicating politely and professionally, with the ability to build long-term rapport with journalists.

* Strategic Thinker: Understanding of media relations, PR strategy, or SEO link building is a significant advantage. You should know how to pitch a compelling angle—not just promote a company.

* Fast, Focused, and Reliable: Ability to respond quickly and deliver high-quality content under tight deadlines (e.g., targeting submission within the first 50 responses).



Key Responsibilities

As a Remote Editorial Outreach Specialist, your primary focus will be generating media coverage through expert communication and strong relationship management:

* Craft Quotable Pitches: Write clear, concise, expert-level responses with strong soundbites and quotable insights reporters can use immediately.

* Strategic Outreach & Follow-Up: Manage query platforms (HARO, Featured, etc.), ensuring fast submissions and timely, professional follow-ups to build journalist relationships.

* Communication Management: Organize, research, and respond to media correspondence with clarity, professionalism, and a focus on maintaining positive rapport.

This is a long-term, fully remote position focused on content quality, measurable media outcomes, and professional relationship building.?Regularization to permanent status is based on consistently excellent performance.



If You’re a Dependable, Skilled Writer Who Thrives Under Pressure—We Want to Hear from You

Multiple positions available. 



Leave us a message first, then apply here:

description:
***MINIMUM 1 YEAR EXPERIENCE IS A MUST, DO NOT APPLY IF YOU CANNOT SHOW ME PREVIOUS EXAMPLE LEADS. AS I WILL IGNORE YOUR APPLICATION***



Job Description:



We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant from the Philippines to join our team on a full-time basis. The ideal candidate will have proven experience in Amazon online arbitrage sourcing for the UK market, a bonus would be having A2A sourcing skills and A2A EU sourcing skills this will make you stand out compared to the other candidates. If you have A2A experience please highlight this in your application as well as when you send over your previous example leads



We are currently in search of 2 full time virtual assistants



Having experience with Keepa product finder is a must as this is the tool we use to find majority of the leads as well as experience with Seller amp as this is what we use to analyse the deals



Responsibilities:

• Source unique, high-profit and medium-profit deals on Amazon UK, focusing on high-ticket niches such as electronics, home & kitchen, toys, Computers and accessories. (Anything with a sell price of above £50 NO MAKEUP) 

• Ensure all leads are exclusive and not shared with other clients.

• Deliver high-quality, consistent sourcing leads in a timely manner.

• Present leads in a well-organized Excel sheet format with all necessary data points (e.g., cost price, Amazon selling price, profit, ROI, ASIN, etc.).

• Using coupons and taking into account student discount etc when sourcing. 

•Source from unique websites and ensure they are legit and not scam websites by checking trustpilot



Requirements:

• Proven experience in Amazon online arbitrage sourcing for the UK market – this is non-negotiable.

• Must be able to provide examples of previous sourcing work.

• Each deal should have a minimum profit of £10 and a minimum ROI of 20%.

•No oversaturated brands/websites such as Ryobi, Milwaukee, notino and etc

• Must be reliable, detail-oriented, and trustworthy – we value loyalty and hard work, and we take care of our tea
mbers who are committed and dedicated.

• Strong communication skills and the ability to follow instructions independently.

• All leads must be exclusive and not reused or recycled across other clients.



If you’ve read this far and would like to apply, please use the word “Ready” in your application title so I know you have read and understood everything, without this title I will ignore your application. You must also apply with your previous work/example of deal sheet. Without this we will not read your application.



Must also be able to find 5-10 high quality leads a day within the specified criteria above. Your previous work/deal sheet should highlight this.



To get a better understanding of what we require I have attached a training proposal below, please ensure you read it thoroughly to understand our expectations 









Thank you I look forward to your applications and viewing your previous results



Salary will be discussed once you apply. Starting is £250 a month with performance based bonuses and base salary increase out our discretion.

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Day Shift
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Short Form Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Senior GoHighLevel Specialist | CRM Admin, Funnel Builder, Systems Design, HighLevel
description:
Would YOU LOVE to work here? SEE WHAT OUR TEAM SAYS!

WATCH TEAM VIDEO: youtu.be/smT-w2M_TcQ



PLEASE READ ALL INSTRUCTIONS AND DESCRIPTION CAREFULLY BEFORE YOU APPLY!

Before we offer you a job, we will ask for people who know you (like an old boss or colleague) to tell us about you. We will check these before you can get a job offer.



WE ARE LOOKING FOR SOMEONE WHO:



- Pays close attention to ALL the little details in complex systems and campaign setups.

- Likes to build and optimize processes the RIGHT way, following all the steps for effective automation.

- Has reliable home internet. You'll be accessing our systems daily, though file sizes are generally small.

- Is a pro at building automations, connecting different tools, and figuring out how to make our GoHighLevel setup simpler and more effective, including recommending the best tools for the job.

- Understands how to design, build, manage, and improve our systems and processes.

- Knows GoHighLevel inside and out. You are an expert and a go-to problem solver!

- Is great at learning new GoHighLevel-related and similar funnel-building tools, and is happy to research and learn new tools as needed.

- MUST LOVE marketing automation, building efficient systems, and have a portfolio of GoHighLevel projects or campaigns you can share.

- Can tackle complex GoHighLevel tasks (like a test project we give you) pretty fast AND carefully. Doing things quickly and correctly is very important!

- Has a flexible work schedule but can be available for support during key times, like when we launch new automations or features.

--- ABOUT OUR TEAM ---



Want to work in a fun, exciting place?

Want to learn a lot, get paid fairly so you don't have to take on extra clients just to get by, and have the chance to earn bonuses if you do great?

Do you like to learn new skills, get along well with other people on your team (who are very cool people), and take pride that you finish your work on time (or early)?



This could be the place you have been dreaming of!



CORE VALUES:



DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We always try to do more than clients ask. We want every client to feel special and happy with our work and the systems we build.

MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We always try to learn new things about GoHighLevel and marketing automation. We share what we know and do every job carefully and well.

FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: If we say we will do something, we do it every time. We take care of all our tasks. If we make a mistake, we fix it and learn from it.

We want someone who likes these ideas. We are building a great team, not just managing marketing campaigns for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU (OUR FUTURE SENIOR GOHIGHLEVEL SPECIALIST!) ---



Are you careful and good with details, especially in CRM and automation platforms?

Do you like designing and implementing marketing systems that run smoothly?

Do you love creating powerful automations and sales funnels using GoHighLevel?

Do you know what makes a marketing campaign effective and how to track its success?

Do you want to help bring ambitious marketing strategies to life?

Do our Core Values sound good to you?



Then keep reading!



WHAT YOU WILL DO (YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES AS A SENIOR GOHIGHLEVEL SPECIALIST):



(Your main job will be to manage, optimize, and scale our marketing efforts using GoHighLevel. You will be the lead specialist for our GHL setup, ensuring it supports our business goals effectively by designing, implementing, maintaining, troubleshooting, and improving systems.)



DESIGN & IMPLEMENT GOHIGHLEVEL STRATEGIES:



Develop and build out comprehensive sales funnels, marketing automation sequences, and lead nurturing campaigns within GoHighLevel.

Configure and customize GoHighLevel accounts, including pipelines, calendars, triggers, workflows, and third-party integrations.

Manage and segment our contact database within GHL, ensuring data hygiene and effective targeting.

Advise on and implement best practices for GHL setup, potentially simplifying existing implementations or integrating third-party tools where beneficial.

OPTIMIZE & MAINTAIN SYSTEMS:



Monitor the performance of GHL campaigns and automations, identifying areas for improvement and implementing A/B tests.

Troubleshoot and resolve any technical issues or bugs within the GoHighLevel platform and connected tools.

Stay up-to-date with the latest GoHighLevel features and best practices, implementing them to enhance our marketing efforts.

Continuously look for ways to improve processes and system efficiency.

SUPPORT & COLLABORATE:



Create reports and dashboards to track key marketing metrics and provide insights to the team.

Provide expert-level support and guidance to tea
mbers on GoHighLevel functionalities and best practices.

Collaborate with the marketing team and other stakeholders to align GHL strategies with overall business objectives.

Document processes, workflows, and campaign setups within GoHighLevel.

WHAT YOU NEED (REQUIREMENTS):



GOHIGHLEVEL EXPERTISE:



Proven, in-depth experience managing and building complex setups in GoHighLevel. You should be able to demonstrate advanced proficiency. GoHighLevel certifications are a huge plus.

A portfolio showcasing successful GoHighLevel projects, funnels, or campaigns you have designed, built, or significantly managed.

Strong understanding of CRM principles, marketing automation best practices, sales funnel psychology, digital marketing analytics, and process design/improvement.

Demonstrated ability to understand how different tools integrate and how to build robust, interconnected automations.

WORK STYLE AND COMMUNICATION:



Good at talking, listening, problem-solving, and working as part of a team.

Able to follow strategic direction while also proactively identifying opportunities and working independently.

Highly organized and able to manage your time effectively to meet deadlines and manage multiple projects.

Eager to learn new things and get better at your job (you want to MASTER YOUR CRAFT in GoHighLevel and related technologies).

It helps if you understand how marketing automation directly impacts business growth and client acquisition.

Some understanding (or moderate skill) of copywriting is a huge bonus, but not required.

Some understanding of or passion for real estate is a plus, but not essential.

--- HOW TO APPLY (OUR HIRING STEPS) ---



STEP 1:

Type 'green kangaroo' in the application subject line so we know you read this.



STEP 2:

If we think you might be a good fit, we’ll ask you to do up to three small, PAID test projects. Each one pays $15 (USD) and should take about 1 to 2 hours to complete. (That's up to $45 USD total!)



STEP 3:

If you do well on the test projects, we’ll invite you for an interview to talk more about your experience and approach.



STEP 4:

Before we offer a trial job, we’ll talk to people who know you (your references), particularly those who can speak to your GoHighLevel expertise.



STEP 5:

If all goes well, we’ll offer you a 90-day PAID trial job as a Senior GoHighLevel Specialist. This is your chance to show us your skills, work with the team, and do a great job. If the trial period is a success, we’ll offer you a permanent job on the team! ALL our permanent tea
mbers have been with us for almost 3 years and counting, and we are very proud of that!

title: TikTok / Reels / Shorts Editor – Part-Time / Freelance
description:
???? TikTok / Reels / Shorts Editor – Part-Time / Freelance



Are you chronically online? Do you instantly know which clips have viral potential? Then this gig might be for you.



I’m looking for a dynamic, young, fun, and hungry short-form video editor to help me turn simple footage into scroll-stopping TikToks, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



My content is mostly art tutorials, creative process videos, and aesthetic lifestyle/vlog content, so your edits will need to feel clean, trendy, and native to short-form platforms.



What you’ll do:

 • Edit vertical short-form videos for TikTok, Reels, and YouTube Shorts

 • Add captions, trending sounds, and light effects/graphics when needed

 • Keep things engaging while staying true to my creative/art niche

 • Help me pump out content that looks effortless but performs well



Who you are:

 • Chronically online (you live on TikTok, IG, or YouTube Shorts)

 • Have a natural sense of 
 timing, trending audio, and what makes people watch to the end

 • Fast, flexible, and ready to experiment

 • Experience isn’t required—I care more about taste and vibe than your resume



The Gig:

 • Freelance/part-time (perfect as an extra side hustle)

 • Remote, flexible schedule

 • Paid per edit or per batch of videos



???? Bonus: Earn an extra $100 for every 1M views your edits generate across all platforms.



If you’re the kind of person who can turn raw clips of painting, sketching, or a simple day-in-the-life vlog into something people want to watch to the end, I want you on my team.



To apply:

Send me 1–2 short edits you’ve done (even for fun) or a TikTok/IG account you run that shows your editing style.

title: Part-Time Opportunities & Outreach Assistant
description:
Part-Time Virtual Assistant for Outreach, Opportunities, Grants, and Tracking



Location: Remote

Hours: Part-time, approximately 10–15 hours per week to start

Type: Contract / Freelance



About Me



I’m a Los Angeles–based artist, creator, and creative entrepreneur working at the intersection of art, content, media, and culture. My work spans creative projects, brand partnerships, content creation, applications, funding opportunities, and long-term career-building across multiple lanes.



I move quickly, generate a high volume of ideas, and am focused on growing both the creative and business side of what I do. I’m looking for someone who can help support that growth by keeping outreach moving, finding strong opportunities, submitting applications, researching grants, and, most importantly, tracking everything in a clean and organized way.



About the Role



I’m looking for a sharp, proactive, highly organized part-time virtual assistant to help me generate and manage opportunities across brand outreach, creative and contract applications, auditions, artist grants, fellowships, residencies, and other aligned opportunities.



This is not a passive admin role. I am specifically looking for someone who can help create 
ntum.



A major part of this role is tracking. I need someone who is excellent at keeping score so we can clearly see how many opportunities are being pursued, what stage they’re in, what needs follow-up, and what is actually working. If you are someone who naturally likes creating order out of chaos, this role may be a strong fit.



Key Responsibilities

Outreach and Lead Generation



Send initial outreach to brands, collaborators, agencies, media contacts, and other aligned opportunities using my existing system



Personalize outreach templates when needed



Research and identify new contacts, opportunities, and potential partnership leads



Support outreach efforts across brand partnerships, creator opportunities, media, and other relevant channels



Opportunity Research



Proactively seek new opportunities that align with my work and goals



Research brand partnerships, creative contracts, auditions, creator programs, fellowships, residencies, grants, and open calls



Filter for strong-fit opportunities rather than sending or submitting randomly



Surface the most relevant opportunities in an organized and efficient way



Applications and Submissions



Fill out and submit applications using my saved materials, links, and information



Help with applications for contracts, jobs, creative opportunities, auditions, fellowships, grants, and other opportunities



Keep reusable materials organized, including bios, resumes, portfolio links, media kits, headshots, artist statements, and related assets



Draft first-pass responses when needed for review



Grant Research and Grant Support



Research artist grants, funding opportunities, fellowships, residencies, and public/open calls



Track deadlines, eligibility requirements, and submission materials



Help identify which grants are worth pursuing



Assist with preparing and submitting straightforward grant applications



Organize recurring grant opportunities and seasonal funding deadlines



Tracking and Pipeline Management



Maintain clear, accurate trackers for outreach, applications, grants, deadlines, submissions, responses, follow-ups, and outcomes



Keep records organized so we know what has been sent, what is pending, what needs attention, and what is moving



Help monitor volume, response rates, warm leads, and active opportunities



Create and maintain a clear scoreboard so we can measure progress and make better decisions



Follow-Up and Organization



Follow up on cold and warm leads so opportunities do not fall through the cracks



Keep notes on where conversations stand and what the next step is



Organize information so active leads can be handed off smoothly when needed



Help bring structure, consistency, and follow-through to a fast-moving workflow



Ideal Candidate



You are someone who is:



Extremely organized and detail-oriented



Strong at tracking multiple moving parts without letting things slip



A solid writer and communicator



Good at online research and information gathering



Comfortable with repetitive tasks, but smart enough to use judgment



Proactive and able to take initiative without waiting for constant instructions



Resourceful, reliable, and discreet



Comfortable working independently in a fast-moving creative environment



Bonus If You Have Experience With



Brand outreach



Grant applications or artist funding research



Creator support



Casting or audition submissions



Research-heavy assistant work



Building or maintaining trackers, CRMs, spreadsheets, or Notion systems



Working with artists, creators, entrepreneurs, or media professionals



What I’m Looking For Personality-Wise



I move fast, work across several lanes at once, and have a high volume of ideas and goals in motion. The right person for this role is someone who can bring structure to that motion.



You do not need to be overly formal, but you do need to be sharp, proactive, dependable, and good at follow-through. I’m looking for someone who can help build 
ntum, not just someone who waits to be told what to do.



Success in This Role Looks Like



More outreach being sent consistently



More strong-fit opportunities being surfaced



More applications and grants being submitted on time



Better tracking across everything in motion



Fewer missed follow-ups



Clear visibility into pipeline, progress, and outcomes



Less admin and opportunity-management work on my plate overall



Compensation



Please include your hourly rate when applying.



To Apply



Please send:



A short introduction about who you are



Relevant experience



Any examples of outreach, assistant work, opportunity research, grant support, application work, or tracking systems you’ve managed



Your hourly rate



Your weekly availability



Optional but helpful: a brief note on why you think you’d be a strong fit for this role



If you are someone who enjoys finding opportunities, keeping things organized, and helping creative people grow, I’d love to hear from you.

title: Lead Graphic Designer
description:
NOTE: please read every word very carefully and only respond until you have read everything in detail and understand it.



WANTED: lead graphic designer who can design well and lead my project and (oversee my graphic design team who are available part time) to create one cohesive project of 16 high end storyboards for videos that range from 60 seconds to 10 minutes each. You would need to be able to not only design your own storyboards for the videos, but also to give the designers feedback, directions, and corrections as an art director. 



AVAILABILITY: MUST NOT HAVE A FULL-TIME JOB. Must be strictly freelance and fully available to work full-time for the next month or two. (My previous graphic designer worked full-time for another company and burnt out. I do not want the new candidate I hire to burn out.)



PAY: $14hr at 40 hours a week = $560 x 4 weeks =$2,240 - month. One month guaranteed. Then week by week after that with the expectation the job will take two months. Willing to work week by week until the project is completed and the client is happy.



SKILLS: fluent in Adobe Illustrator, fluent in Figma, Adobe InDesign & Adobe Photoshop knowledge and beta are a plus, able to manage a team, years of experience with: graphic design, typography, creating graphics and ideally talking heads training videos would be a plus.



REQUIREMENTS: 

- experience working with Americans (must be able to take constructive feedback and matter of fact comments- keep business business... it's not personal) 

- experience overseeing a team of at least 7 graphic designers 

- experience executing projects with high quality and meeting deadlines

- able to communicate well and speak English well and understand English well

- able to follow directions and take directions well

- detail oriented/able to double check and triple check your own and their work before you show it to me.

- be able to meet with me via video chat, communicate with me via Slack and WhatsApp, during my time zone hours of 9am-5pm Pacific standard time

- able to meet (from once a day to once a week depending on how things are going with the project) with my team of at least 7 motion graphics designers in the Philippines during normal Filipino hours.



START DATE: AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. Today or tomorrow! 



NOTE: 

- please DO NOT respond to this job listing if you do not qualify with the information above.

- this is a very high-end client, so unfortunately, you have to sign an NDA and you will not be able to post or share this work, but you will be able to tell people which client you worked for through my company and I will give them a good reference about you if you do a good job for me.

- if you do a good job and the project is successful, I will give you another chance for the next project I get with this big client

- if you normally do not work for $14 an hour and you prove yourself to me from this job, I will be willing to pay you more on the next job. If you normally work for more and this is a big step down-I'm looking for a quality-so I will be willing to give you a bonus that we can negotiate the amount on if you do perform well.



REQUIREMENTS TO APPLY: 

- you must qualify and agree to everything above

- you must send me your graphic design portfolio links OF YOUR BEST WORK so I can view your work to make sure you are qualified

- I do NOT want to see everything you've designed - I want to see what you are proud of 

- only show me your best work - ideally in a scrolling pdf or website. I do not like viewing a Google Drive folder of multiple individual files. 

- your best work can be anything you designed (not just storyboards) I want to know you can design at my caliber of elevated design you see on my website 

- I want to see storyboard designs as well so I know you know how to do it - even if you don't like the design because the client dictated the design

- if you do not follow this direction, I will not consider you.



HIRING PROCESS:

- I am guaranteeing at least one month of work and then week by week after that (if you perform well)

-I have the power to cancel our agreement at any time if you do not perform or meet my requirements.

- I will review your portfolio and d
 if I want to interview you with a video Zoo
eting. I will want to interview you between 8 AM and 1 PM Pacific standard time.



ONBOARDING PROCESS: 

- if you are hired, I will have you sign my NDA, fill out a W8-BEN document for tax purposes, connect you to Slack, the assets for the job via Dropbox, Figma, and have a tea
eting so you can meet everybody and you will get started immediately. I will be available for any questions via video chat or WhatsApp during my Pacific standard
  waking hours.

title: Revit Drafter
description:
Company Description

Since 1973, the team at Griffiths Engineers Australia have been helping shape Sydney and beyond. Designing smart, reliable structural engineering solutions with a focus on industrial projects. We partner with builders, developers, architects, REITs, and owner-occupiers to create high-performance, future-ready structures that stand the test of time.



Our consultancy is built on innovation, technical excellence, and a deep understanding of the construction industry. With over 1,000,000 square meters of structural engineering designed and delivered, we have earned a reputation as dependable, highly competent consultants.



About the Role

We're looking for a motivated Revit Drafter to join our engineering team on a contractor basis. Working remotely, you'll contribute to drafting delivery across a range of industrial and commercial projects for our Australian clients, producing high-quality Revit models and documentation that support efficient design and construction outcomes.

You'll work closely with our Australian-based engineers, project managers, and drafting team, contributing technical accuracy and practical detailing in a collaborative remote environment. This is a hands-on role ideal for someone who takes pride in delivering quality drafting work and thrives in a structured, deadline-driven setting.



Key Responsibilities

• Produce detailed Revit structural models and documentation for a variety of projects.

• Convert engineer mark-ups and site sketches into accurate CAD drawings.

• Collaborate with engineers to translate design intent into accurate, buildable drawings.

• Coordinate documentation with other disciplines and external stakeholders.

• Ensure drawings comply with industry standards, project requirements, and QA processes.

• Assist the Lead Engineer in the preparation of preliminary sketch designs from architectural drawings as required.

• Maintain drawing standards and project documentation.

• Handle project correspondence via document management sites, such as Aconex.

• Assist with planning and project delivery to help meet deadlines.



About You

• Relevant qualification in Drafting, Engineering Technology, or a related field

• Experience in a similar role

• Proficient in structural drafting using Revit

• Exposure to or working knowledge of Australian building standards (BCA and relevant Australian Standards) is highly regarded

• Strong attention to detail and commitment to high-quality work

• Excellent level of English written and verbal communication skills

• Ability to prioritise work, manage deadlines, and work independently in a remote setting

• A collaborative and proactive approach to problem-solving

• Comfortable working across time zones and coordinating with an overseas team



Please submit a CV and Cover Letter.

title: Off-Page SEO & Link Building Specialist
description:
Full-Time Position | Remote

Position Overview

We are seeking an experienced Off-Page SEO and Link Building Specialist to join our digital marketing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing comprehensive link building strategies that improve domain authority, increase organic traffic, and enhance our online visibility. This role requires expertise in white-hat link acquisition techniques, relationship building, and advanced SEO methodologies including the skyscraper technique.

Key Responsibilities



Develop and implement strategic off-page SEO campaigns focused on high-quality link acquisition from authoritative websites

Execute the skyscraper method by identifying high-performing content in target niches, creating superior versions, and conducting strategic outreach to secure backlinks from websites linking to competing content

Conduct comprehensive link gap analysis and competitive backlink research to identify link building opportunities

Build and maintain relationships with webmasters, bloggers, journalists, and industry influencers for ongoing link placement opportunities

Create compelling outreach campaigns and personalized
 pitches that generate positive responses and secure quality backlinks

Manage guest posting campaigns, including identifying target websites, coordinating content creation, and securing publication with proper link attribution

Monitor and analyze backlink profiles using tools such as Ahrefs, Moz, SEMrush, and Majestic to track performance and identify potential issues

Identify and disavow toxic or spammy backlinks that could harm domain authority

Collaborate with content and social media teams to create linkable assets such as infographics, research studies, tools, and comprehensive guides

Prepare monthly reports on link building performance, including metrics on new backlinks acquired, domain authority improvements, and referral traffic increases



Required Qualifications

title: Video Editor needed for regular, ongoing work
description:
THE COMPANY

Avalon Creative Group is a dynamic and innovative company headquartered in the heart of the San Francisco Bay Area and Silicon Valley in California. We specialize in the creation of captivating and immersive content for corporate clients, offering comprehensive content design, production, and creative services. Working with Avalon Creative Group presents an exciting opportunity for individuals seeking to collaborate with renowned brands, while also offering a continuous learning environment that fosters personal and professional growth.



JOB DESCRIPTION

Avalon Creative Group is seeking a talented and experienced video editor and 3D animator based in the Philippines to work with us as an independent contractor. Our work includes videos to inspire audiences at corporate events, on-demand marketing webinars, internal corporate training and sales enablement, product demos, highlight reels, social media ads, interviews, customer testimonials and more.



Our goal is to establish a long term working relationship with a creative, reliable and ambitious video professional. After successfully completing an initial trial period, the right person will become an integral member of our creative team on a full-time contract basis.



RESPONSIBILITIES

> Edit high quality videos from a variety of sources, including single-camera, multi-camera, stock footage, AI generated video, graphic elements, music, sound effects, etc.

> Effectively and efficiently generate video footage and elements using the latest AI tools

> Manage accuracy and correction of color and audio

> Understand and apply corporate branding and style guidelines and templates (MOGRTs)

> Manage, organize and backup video assets and deliverables, including raw footage, graphics, sound files, stock footage, projects, files, etc.

> Adhere to budgeted time constraints while incorporating client feedback and changes through multiple rounds of review and revisions

> Contribute to and consistently apply efficient workflow processes and standards (SOPs)

> Document guidelines and process details for tea
mbers and clients

> Pursue ongoing professional development and skill enhancements



REQUIRED SKILLS

> Having a proven track record of punctuality, reliability and professionalism is essential

> Excellent attention to detail and adeptness at managing multiple concurrent projects is required

> Strong communication skills and the ability to work collaboratively in a remote team environment

> English fluency (written and spoken) along with excellent communication skills are essential

> You must be based in the Philippines with fast, reliable internet access and a robust computer

> You must have a quiet workspace where you can work without distractions and join Zoom calls



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE

> At least 2 years of professional experience and proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite, specifically Premiere Pro and After Effects

> Bonus if you have experience or proficiency with using 3D software like Blender, Cinema4D, or anything similar.

> You must have strong creative skills and a portfolio of work that demonstrates your passion and experience with video editing and motion graphics

>> Your portfolio must include examples of the type of work listed in the job description section

> Expertise in video editing fundamentals and techniques, including pacing, storytelling, and continuity

> Knowledge of different video formats and codecs for various delivery platforms



PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

> 5 years of experience with Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects.

> At least 2 years of experience and proficiency with Blender or Cinema 4D.

> Proficiency in color correction, audio editing, and mastering

> Familiarity with team communication and project management tools like Smartsheet, Slack, ClickUp, or similar platforms

> Familiarity or experience using AI post-production tools

> Strong understanding of visual composition, typography, and graphic design principles

> Completion of training and/or certifications in key software used

> Knowledge of social media platforms and video encoding specifications for each platform



COMPENSATION & ENGAGEMENT

> Compensation rate for full-time, independent contractor will be $1000 - $1300 USD per month

> Ten paid holidays and ten days of accrued paid time off (PTO) will be included annually

> Rate will be based on qualifications and experience

> This is a remote work position

> Work hours will need to overlap with standard business hours in California (9:00-6:00pm PT)



HOW TO APPLY

If you are interested in working with us as an independent contractor and you meet the required qualifications listed above, please APPLY HERE -

title: eCommerce Junior CRO Specialist
description:
As a Junior CRO Specialist at CRO Gurus, you will be the key link between data-driven optimization strategy and tangible client results. This is a CRO-first role focused on experimentation, analytics, and user behavior — not digital marketing execution.



You will be a vital part of the client team, working closely under a Senior Strategist to help build a clear, evidence-based testing roadmap. You will manage the day-to-day details of project execution, support client communications, and drive action items to completion. We use smart systems and lean processes to accelerate analysis, freeing you up to focus on high-level strategy and building incredible client relationships.



About CRO Gurus: Our Mission & Culture



CRO Gurus is a fast-moving, fully remote team specializing in Conversion Rate Optimization. We are committed to delivering measurable ROI for our clients by identifying the "why" behind user behavior and executing intelligent A/B testing roadmaps.



We've built our culture to empower professionals who thrive on impact and autonomy.

Full-Lifecycle Exposure: This isn't a siloed role. You will work directly with a senior mentor and be exposed to the entire client lifecycle, from strategic hypothesis to final report, contributing to real client outcomes.

Strategic Speed: We prioritize moving quickly while making intelligent, data-informed decisions. You are empowered to take initiative, ensuring your time is spent on high-impact strategy.



Key Responsibilities:



Implement Data-Driven Strategy: Assist Senior Strategists with comprehensive website audits, analyze user behavior, and support the creation of customized A/B testing roadmaps based on data-driven insights.

Own Project Execution: Manage the day-to-day details of the Asana board, translating the team's strategic plan into an executed project. You will track and update tasks, timelines, and milestones to ensure timely delivery.

Support Client Relationships: Act as a reliable daily point of contact. Support senior strategists on client calls, help prepare findings, and learn how to build strong, effective partnerships.

Report & Track Business Impact: Monitor and analyze A/B testing results, helping to compile regular reports with actionable insights that summarize clear business impact and ROI.



What We’re Looking For:

We are seeking a proactive and detail-oriented professional with a high-ownership mentality:



- Experience: 1–2 years of experience in Conversion Rate Optimization, Analytics, eCommerce optimization, or experimentation-focused roles — OR a strong portfolio of CRO-related projects.

- Exceptional Organization: Strong organizational skills; you are proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable keeping a project's tasks on track. Proficiency with tools like Asana is a huge plus.

- Confident Communicator: Excellent communication skills, with the confidence and desire to support client-facing meetings.

- Foundational Analytics Skills: Required understanding of Google Analytics 4. Familiarity with heatmapping and A/B testing tools is a major bonus, but we are willing to train the right candidate.

- Mindset: A strong passion for delivering measurable results and an intelligent approach to problem-solving.



What You'll Get (Benefits & Compensation):

Dedicated Growth Time: 10% of your weekly paid hours are reserved for learning and upskilling, ensuring you remain an expert in the field.

Remote Flexibility: Join our fast-moving, fully remote team.

Direct Impact: Work on a lean, intelligent team where your work has a direct, measurable impact on client success.

Compensation: Up to 420 per hour for the most qualified profiles.



Our Recruiting Process:

Apply: Submit your application here, and fill in the application form:


/AWSZWWo1jZmMTMJdkYt1Db



Important:

We prioritize candidates who can demonstrate hands-on CRO or experimentation experience (even from personal or side projects). Generic digital marketing backgrounds without CRO exposure are unlikely to be a fit.



1. Skillset Interview: If you qualify, we will contact you to schedule a 40–60 minute skillset interview.

2. Paid Skill Test.

3. In-depth Interview.

4. Offer.



We’re aiming to find the right fit as soon as possible. If you have any questions or feedback, please reach out to 
 to Join the Team? If you are a problem-solver who also loves to make sure the plan happens, we’d love to hear from you.



Links to find out more about us: 
/

title: Cloud & Endpoint Support Engineer (Tier 2)
description:
Role Overview

The Cloud & Endpoint Support Engineer (Tier 2) is responsible for day-to-day endpoint operations and Microsoft 365 support across multiple client environments. This is a hands-on role focused on consistent execution, endpoint hygiene, patching, troubleshooting, and clear documentation. 



Key Responsibilities 

• Administer Microsoft 365 and core Azure/Entra ID services (user/mailbox management, Conditional Access changes, retention and mailbox policies). 

• Configure and manage Intune, Autopilot, Group Policy, application deployments, and configuration baselines. 

• Execute scheduled Windows and third-party patching, including reporting and remediation. 

• Monitor and maintain endpoint security baselines and EDR/RMM agents (e.g., SentinelOne, Arctic Wolf, NinjaOne). 

• Troubleshoot endpoint, mail flow, DNS, authentication (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), and basic firewall issues. 

• Resolve Tier 2 escalations and collaborate with senior engineers for complex i
. 

• Maintain runbooks for onboarding/offboarding, device builds, patching, and routine maintenance. 

• Use PowerShell for basic automation, validation, and reporting. 

• Document all work clearly and accurately. 

• Serve as the primary, hands-on owner of scheduled maintenance windows—executing, validating, and documenting patching and maintenance activities—and perform emergency after-hours changes as required. 



Qualifications 

• 3–5 years of experience supporting Microsoft 365 and Windows endpoints. 

• Strong hands-on experience with Intune, Autopilot, Group Policy, and patching workflows. 

• Experience with EDR/RMM tools in a support capacity. 

• Solid troubleshooting and documentation skills. 

• Clear and professional communication skills.
