To apply, please complete the application form below:







Important:



Please start your application with the words Trainer HQ so we know you have read this job description.



Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be considered.

title: FULL-TIME VIDEO EDITOR - eCommerce ADS & Short-form Content
description:
ABOUT US

We are a fast-growing ecommerce company operating multiple brands across Beauty & Skincare, Fitness & Apparel, Home & Kitchen, Tech & Gadgets, and more. We launch new brands regularly and move fast. 

Our content pipeline never stops — and neither do we.



We sell primarily across Europe, meaning our ads run in multiple native languages including but not limited to English, German, French, Swedish, Norwegian, Danish, Finnish and more. This is a core part of the role — not an occasional task.



We are looking for a talented, self-driven Video Editor who can produce high-converting short-form content every single day without needing to be micromanaged. 

If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, have strong creative instincts, and understand what makes someone stop scrolling and buy — this role was made for you.



YOUR ROLE

As our dedicated Full-Time Video Editor, you will be responsible for producing 3–5 polished, ready-to-publish video ads per day across our brand portfolio, localized for European markets.



Your daily output will include:

- Short-form product ads for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- UGC-style and AI UGC ads designed for paid traffic

- AI avatar videos using tools like Heygen, Arcads, or similar platforms

- AI voiceovers in multiple European languages (German, French, Spanish, Italian, Dutch, etc.)

- Localized captions and on-screen text in the correct native language for each market

- Animated captions, motion graphics, and branded text overlays

- Color-graded, sound-designed content that feels professional and scroll-stopping

- This is a fully remote, async role. You own your schedule — but you own your deadlines too.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

- 2+ years of video editing experience with a strong focus on ecommerce or paid ads

- Proven ability to produce 3–5 complete video ads per day at consistent quality

- Experience generating AI voiceovers in multiple languages using tools like ElevenLabs, Heygen, or similar

- Ability to produce accurate, properly formatted captions and on-screen text in European languages

- Expert knowledge of animated captions, subtitle styling, and motion graphics

- Strong understanding of hooks — you know how to win the first 3 seconds

- Hands-on experience with AI UGC and AI avatar tools (Heygen, Arcads, D-ID, etc.)

- Solid color grading and sound design skills

- Creative independence — no style guides, no hand-holding, you bring the vision

- Reliable async communicator who hits deadlines and flags issues early

- Experience across multiple ad formats: UGC, VSL, mini-VSL, unboxing, testimonial, AI avatar



WHAT WE OFFER

- Stable, long-term full-time employment

- 100% remote — work from anywhere

- Fully async — own your hours, just deliver on time

- Exposure to multiple exciting niches and new brand launches across Europe

- Creative freedom — your style, your instincts, your work

- A fast-moving team that rewards output and initiative

- Real growth opportunity as our portfolio of brands expands



HOW TO APPLY

Answer every question below in full. Applications with incomplete answers or no portfolio will not be reviewed. There are no right or wrong answers — we want to understand exactly who you are, how you work, and what you bring to the table.



APPLICATION QUESTIONS

1. Have you worked for a fast-paced ecommerce or dropshipping company before?

If yes, describe the company, your role, and how many videos you produced per week.



2. How many finished, ready-to-publish video ads can you realistically deliver per day?

Be honest. We value consistency over promises.



3. Are you available to work full-time (40 hours/week) and commit to this role long-term?

We are looking for a dedicated tea
mber, not a freelancer juggling multiple clients.



4. Which AI tools do you have hands-on experience with?

List every tool you have actually used — e.g. Heygen, Arcads, D-ID, ElevenLabs, Runway, CapCut AI, Pika, etc. Do not list tools you have only heard of.



5. Have you worked with AI voiceovers in multiple languages before?

If yes, which tools did you use and which languages have you produced content in? Give specific examples.



6. On a scale of 1–10, how would you rate your video editing skills and why?

Be specific. What are you genuinely great at, and what are you still developing?



7. Which of the following ad formats have you personally produced? 

List all that apply and give a brief example for each:

VSL · Mini VSL · UGC-style · AI UGC · AI Avatar ads · Unboxing videos · Professional/branded ads · Testimonial ads · Short-form hook ads



8. What are your greatest strengths as a video editor working in ecommerce?

Think beyond technical skills — include your work ethic, communication style, and creative approach.



9. What type of video ads are you most experienced with, and which ones perform best from your experience?

Tell us what formats you have seen convert well and why you think they worked.



10. What editing software do you use and how proficient are you in each?

List your primary tool and any secondary tools. Include your proficiency level — beginner / intermediate / advanced / expert.



11. Please share your portfolio.



Provide a link to your best ecommerce or ad work (Google Drive, Notion, personal website, or similar). If you have a specific AI UGC, AI avatar, or multilingual ad example, include it separately. Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



Best Regards Mikael

title: AI Video Editor & TikTok Automation Specialist (Full-Time)
description:
We are looking for a tech-savvy and creative AI Video Editor to join our team for a long-term project. We manage a large-scale network of over 200 TikTok accounts in the USA market (Dark NPC / MONTA niche). Your job is to create high-engaging AI videos and ensure they are technically modified so TikTok’s algorithm treats them as 100% unique content.

Daily Tasks:

AI Content Creation: Generate 8 high-quality AI videos daily using tools like HeyGen, Kling, Runway, or similar AI video generators.

Video "Unique-ification": You must process these videos so they can be posted on hundreds of accounts without being flagged as "Unoriginal Content."

Technical Editing: * Perfor
tadata Scrubbing (removing all EXIF and device data).

Apply Pixel Manipulation (Mirroring, subtle zooming, color grading, and speed ramping at 1.02x).

Change the MD5 Hash of every file.

Mass Processing: Use tools like FFmpeg or batch-editing in Premiere/CapCut to create 200 unique variations of each master clip.

Requirements:

Expertise in AI Video generation (please specify which tools you use).

Deep understanding of TikTok's Algorithm (specifically how to bypass the "Unoriginal Content" and "QR Code" flags).

Proficient in FFmpeg or the ability to learn it quickly for automation.

Knowledge of US Mobile Proxies and how to avoid IP-detection is a big plus.

Reliable high-speed internet and a powerful PC for video rendering.

title: Bookkeeper (Required to have an AU experience)
description:
Role Purpose

The Bookkeeper is responsible for the end-to-end delivery of core transactional finance processes, including accounts payable, bank reconciliations, corporate cards, payroll processing, and financial data administration. This role is critical to the smooth running of the finance function, ensuring accurate, timely, high-quality financial processing that supports strong reporting, compliance, and organizational decision-making.



Role Responsibilities

A. Accounts Payable:

Process all supplier invoices, employee & volunteer expense claims, ensuring correct coding, approvals, GST treatment, currency, and documentation.

Manage the AP inbox and triage queries.

Maintain accurate supplier records, including bank details and documentation checks.

Prepare AP batches in line with cut-off timelines and approval workflows.

Conduct first-pass AP review before Management Accountant review (accuracy, completeness, coding).

Reconcile AP accounts and investigate variances.



B. Accounts Receivable:

Prepare and send invoices to partners, funders, and internal stakeholders.

Maintain AR schedules and follow up on outstanding amounts.

Reconcile AR balances and ensure all receipts are allocated.



C. Corporate Credit Cards:

Manage card issuance, cancellations, limits, and user onboarding.

Review monthly card claims, ensuring receipts, coding, and notes are provided.

Follow up late claims and unresolved discrepancies.

Reconcile company card accounts and ensure accurate EOM processing.



D. Payroll:

Prepare and process fortnightly payroll in line with contracts, and organisational policies.

Maintain employee master data with Xero, ensuring accuracy of bank details, tax information, superannuation, and entitlements.

Process new starters, changes, terminations, and pay adjustments.

Reconcile payroll reports, checking for variance and anomalies.

Prepare workpapers for superannuation payments, payroll journals, and leave reconciliations.

Work with P&E to ensure payroll accuracy, and timely updates to employee records.



E. Bank Reconciliation:

Complete daily and monthly bank reconciliations across all accounts.

Investigate and resolve unreconciled transactions.

Ensure all receipts, payments, and transfers are accurately recorded.



F. End of Month Processes:

Draft prepayments, accruals, apportionments, and routine journals.

Prepare EOM workpapers to a standard ready for first review.

Ensure all transactional processing is complete before close deadlines.

Maintain high-quality data hygiene to support forecasting, reporting, and analysis.



G. Data Entry and Record Keeping:

Maintain accurate, organised financial files and documentation for audit readiness.

Ensure data entry is correct, complete, and aligned with financial policies and accounting standards.

Support system updates, automation improvements, and process changes.



H. General Administrative Support:

Provide customer-focused support to internal stakeholders on finance and payroll queries.

Assist the Finance Team during peak periods (audit, EOFY, EOM, etc).

Participate in continuous improvement projects.

Contribute to team discussions on process optimisation, automation, and better ways of working.



Key Skills and Experience

-Experience in a finance support, accounts, or payroll role.

-Solid understanding of accounts payable, accounts receivable, and payroll processes.

-Proficient with Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets.

-Experience with accounting software (Xero preferred).

-Strong numeracy and data-entry accuracy.

-Understanding of basic accounting and payroll principles.

-High attention to detail and ability to deliver consistent accuracy.

-Excellent time management and ability to work to tight deadlines.

-Strong communication and customer service skills.

-Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks.

-Comfortable with change, learning, and improving processes.

-Ability to handle confidential information with integrity and discretion.

-Certificate, Diploma, or Degree in Accounting, Finance, Business, or related field

title: Senior Accounting & Billing Coordinator  (Remote) – Healthcare Operations
description:
Evergreen Rehab & Wellness | Greater Vancouver, BC, Canada



About Evergreen Rehab & Wellness 



Evergreen Rehab & Wellness is a leading multidisciplinary healthcare organization serving the 

Greater Vancouver area, with clinics located in Coquitlam, Surrey, Langley, and Burnaby 

(Brentwood). 



With a 4.9/5.0 patient satisfaction rating and a growing team of 70+ healthcare practitioners, 

we provide integrated healthcare services including: 

? Physiotherapy 

? Chiropractic Care 

? Registered Massage Therapy 

? Naturopathic Medicine 

? Kinesiology 

? Rehabilitation & Wellness Services

 

As our organization continues to grow, we are expanding our finance and operations team to 

support the increasing complexity of our clinics. 



Position Overview 



We are seeking a Senior Accounting & Billing Coordinator to support the financial operations 

of our healthcare clinics. 



This role is responsible for overseeing key accounting functions including billing reconciliation, 

financial reporting, contractor payment processing, insurance payment tracking, and 

operational financial analysis. 



The ideal candidate has strong accounting knowledge, high attention to detail, and experience 

managing financial workflows in a fast-paced organization. 



This position will work closely with clinic management and leadership to ensure financial 

accuracy, operational efficiency, and compliance with healthcare billing procedures. 



Key Responsibilities 

1. Insurance Billing & Revenue Monitoring 

? Monitor claim submissions for private insurance providers

? Track unsubmitted claims 

2. Billing & Claims Processing 

? Submit WSBC Invoices; Initial Reports and Extension Reports

? Ensure billing documentation is accurate and compliant 

? Identify billing discrepancies and coordinate corrections with clinic teams 

3. Financial Reporting & Analysis 

Prepare recurring operational and financial reports including: 

? Monthly EBITDA analysis

? Revenue and payment reconciliation reports 

? Operational performance tracking 

? Financial summaries for clinic leadership 

4. Independent Contractor Accounting 

? Prepare semi-monthly Independent Contractor payroll payments

? Update practitioner payment records 

? Reconcile practitioner revenue with billing records 

5. Tax & Compliance Support 

? Compile quarterly GST summaries

? Maintain accurate financial documentation for accounting and tax reporting 

? Assist with financial records required for external accounting review 

6. Insurance Payment Reconciliation 

? Monitor payments received from private insurers 

? Identify missing, delayed, or incorrect payments 

? Maintain organized payment tracking records 

7. Patient Scheduling Monitoring 

? Monitor unscheduled patients who have not booked recommended follow-up visits 

? Coordinate with clinic reception teams to support patient follow-up scheduling 

? Assist in maintaining continuity of patient care 



Compensation & Benefits 

? Full-time position (40 hours per week)

? Competitive monthly salary 

? 13th-month bonus after 12 months of successful employment 

? Fully remote work environment

? Professional development opportunities 

? Opportunity to grow within a fast-growing healthcare organization



Required Qualifications 

? 3–5+ years of accounting, finance, or billing experience

? Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel and financial reporting

? Excellent attention to detail and analytical skills

? Strong English communication skills 

? Ability to manage financial workflows independently in a remote environment 

? Experience managing accounts receivable and financial reconciliation



Preferred Qualifications 

? Experience in healthcare accounting or clinic billing

? Familiarity with Jane App or healthcare practice management systems

? Knowledge of ICBC, WorkSafeBC (WSBC), and private insurance billing processes

? Experience working with independent contractor compensation structures

? Multilingual abilities (Korean, Mandarin/Chinese, French, or Farsi) are considered an 

asset 



Work Environment 

? 100% remote role

? Structured onboarding and training 

? Support from the VA Manager and leadership team

? Collaborative and supportive team environment 

? Opportunities for long-term career growth

title: Real Estate Local SEO Specialist – Community & City Pages
description:
We’re looking for a Local SEO Specialist with real estate experience (or similar local-service industries) to build out high-performing community, neighborhood, and city pages. You’ll be responsible for planning, creating, and optimizing local SEO content that ranks on Google, wins the map pack, and converts traffic into leads.



Key Responsibilities

Research and map out priority city, community, and neighborhood pages for our target markets (Las Vegas, Reno, Henderson, Summerlin, etc.).



Plan and create SEO-optimized landing pages for cities and neighborhoods, including lifestyle content, housing stats, and internal links to IDX / listings.



Conduct local keyword research for each market (e.g., “homes for sale in [community]”, “best neighborhood in [city] for families”) and build on-page optimization around those terms.



Optimize existing community and city pages (titles, meta descriptions, H1/H2s, internal links, schema) to improve rankings and click-through rates.



Collaborate with our marketing and content team to brief writers or write drafts for neighborhood guides, relocation pages, and market updates.



Ensure content is unique and value-add (no MLS duplication), with clear explanations of market trends, pricing, and lifestyle for each area.



Implement and maintain local SEO best practices: internal linking between communities, city hubs, and blog content; clean URL structures; and fast, mobile-friendly pages.



Monitor performance of community and city pages (traffic, rankings, leads) and report on results with clear recommendations for improvement.



Support local authority building through citations, local directories, and relevant local backlinks when needed.



Must-Have Skills & Experience

2+ years of SEO experience, with clear results in local SEO or location-based businesses (real estate, home services, multi-location brands, etc.).



Strong understanding of on-page SEO (keyword research, metadata, headers, internal links, basic schema).



Hands-on experience planning or building city/ neighborhood / community landing pages that rank and convert.



Comfortable working in WordPress or similar CMS, and basic familiarity with IDX/real estate site structures.



Proficiency with SEO tools (Google Search Console, Google Analytics, rank trackers, and basic keyword tools).



Strong writing and editing skills for clear, local-focused website content.



Nice-to-Have

Prior experience with real estate websites, IDX, or brokerage/team sites.



Familiarity with Google Business Profile optimization and local citations.



Understanding of AI / LLM search visibility and how structured, local content supports it.



When replying to the Job let me know what real estate websites you have worked with in the past.

title: Video Editor / Animator (Part-Time ? Full-Time Opportunity)
description:
Video Editor / Animator (Part-Time ? Full-Time Opportunity)



Type: Part-Time (20 hours per week)

Schedule: Day Shift

Salary: $7 USD per hour (1,212 USD per month) – paid every Friday

Potential: Opportunity to transition to Full-Time



About Us



We are an Australian AI technology company building innovative tools for legal professionals. Our platform helps lawyers work more efficiently using artificial intelligence.



As we continue to grow, we are expanding our video content production to support educational content, product demonstrations, and marketing campaigns. We’re looking for a creative and reliable Video Editor / Animator who can help bring our ideas to life.



Role Overview



As our Video Editor / Animator, you will transform raw footage and concepts into engaging, professional, and visually compelling videos.



You will work closely with our team to produce content for education, marketing, and product storytelling, helping communicate complex ideas in a clear and engaging way.



We have a structured workflow and feedback system in place. Editors will be expected to document feedback and improvements using a checklist system we provide, helping ensure continuous improvement and consistent production quality across projects.



Key Responsibilities



• Edit and enhance raw video footage into polished final videos



• Create engaging narratives through pacing, transitions, and storytelling



• Add graphics, animations, captions, and visual effects where appropriate



• Improve audio quality through noise reduction, music integration, and voiceovers



• Follow editing guidelines and production checklists provided by the team



• Record feedback and improvement notes into the project checklist system



• Organize video files and assets to maintain a clean production workflow



• Collaborate with the team to deliver content aligned with project goals



• Make revisions and improvements based on feedback



Required Skills



• Proven experience as a Video Editor



• Strong portfolio demonstrating editing and storytelling ability



Proficiency in tools such as:



• Adobe Premiere Pro



• After Effects



• Final Cut Pro



• or similar editing software



Strong understanding of:



• Video formats and resolutions



• Export settings and compression



• Audio editing and sound balancing



• Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple tasks



• Strong attention to detail



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)



• Motion graphics / animation experience



• Experience creating educational or SaaS product videos



• Familiarity with AI tools for video production



• Basic graphic design skills



What We’re Looking For



We value editors who are:



• Organized and reliable



• Creative but detail-oriented



• Open to structured workflows and feedback



• Interested in long-term collaboration



This position starts part-time, but strong performers may transition to a full-time role as our content production expands.



Application Requirements



To help us evaluate candidates properly, please include the following in your application:



• Your resume



• A short cover letter explaining your video editing experience



• A link to your portfolio showcasing your past work



• Your LinkedIn profile



• Two professional references we may contact



Please ensure your portfolio links can be viewed in an incognito window (without login access)



Additionally, please include the following details:



• Your internet speed (download and upload)



• Your computer specifications (CPU, RAM, GPU)



• Your backup internet options



• Your backup power solution in case of brownouts or outages



How to Apply



To confirm you’ve read this entire job post, please include the word:



"kangaroo"



at the end of your application.



Join our team and help create high-impact video content for the future of AI in the legal industry.

title: EXPERIENCED Ecommerce Creative Strategist for Facebook Ads
description:
We’re a fast-growing Australian eCommerce brand in the sleep & wellness space, helping people sleep better through high-quality, thoughtfully designed products.



We produce a high volume of short-form video, ads, and creative assets across paid ads and social — and we care a lot about quality, consistency, and execution.



Requirements



2+ years of experience in eComm, direct response, or agency creative/project management



Worked with and helped scale brands doing at least 100k/mo, likely much more



Have written briefs for multiple winning ads



Strong understanding of what makes an ad perform on Meta or TikTok (you don’t need to edit — but you need to know what works)



Excellent written English and confident communicator



Proven creative strategy experience managing
/Instagram ad creatives for eCommerce brands



Strong understanding of direct-response marketing, hooks, and storytelling



Comfortable analysing ad performance data and identifying actionable insights



Excellent writing skills for ad copy, video scripts, and briefs



Familiar with tools like Meta Ads Manager, Google Drive, Sheets, Docs



Responsibilities




 performance data in
 Ad Manager to identify winning angles and creative trends



Develop new ad concepts, hooks, and ideas based on data insights and customer psychology



Write briefs and scripts for video editors and UGC creators



Review and give feedback on drafts to maintain high creative standards



Stay up to date on trends in DTC advertising, short-form video, and UGC



Our team:

We have a coordinator who will manage the editors and video production side, and help with revisions, to free your time up for strategy



You will work closely with the founder who is doing the media buying, we have a structured meeting and creative system to ensure we are creating the right amount and type of creatives



You will be responsible for tracking data, hit rate, angles etc, ensuring ads perform and the account scales efficiently



Do not apply if you do not have experience doing strategy for big accounts, this is not a junior role



What you get

Monthly salary based on experience, paid by Wise 1st and 15th

Australian/Philippine work hours

Remote job, freedom to get results, coordinator and team structure to ensure you can focus on strategy and growth and aren't doing the boring work

title: Editor (E-commerce Brand Experience REQUIRED)
description:
Video Editor - Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $3–$8+ USD Per Hour + Bonuses up to $60 per video!!



- MUST HAVE experience making ads for e-commerce brands

- Please list brands you have worked with and include work and ads that you have made :)



Hey there! We’re a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we’re looking for an eCommerce Video editor to join our team full-time. You’ll work closely with our ad strategists and creative teams to produce winning ads for our Shopify customers.



Why This Role is Crucial:

This is the most important role at our brand. If you're a skilled video editor who thrives on crafting ads that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your edits move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.



Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.



Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.



As a video editor, you'll bring our team's deep knowledge and insights to life through powerful visuals and storytelling. Your ability to craft scroll-stopping hooks, compelling pacing, and polished ad concepts will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your editing decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every edit reinforces the right message.

Crafting your visuals — Transforming raw footage, UGC, and creative briefs into high-converting video ads that stop the scroll and drive action.





Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Edit & create 1 batch of ads (1-4 videos) per day based on instructions from our creative team.

Add captions, motion graphics, text overlays, and sound design that elevate ad performance.

Collaborate with our copy and strategy teams to ensure creative concepts are executed perfectly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Analyze ad performance weekly and apply learnings to future edits.

Maintain a fast turnaround while upholding a high standard of quality.

Attend or watch recordings of monthly client strategy calls to stay in sync.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes video ads win or lose.



More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

As a video editor, you'll receive performance bonuses under management up to $60 per video depending on performance.

You'll also have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

+ BONUSES!



Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you’ve been waiting for, I’d love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $3-$8 USD per hour



Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to make ads from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology



Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday



Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience editing video ads for eCommerce?

What got you to start being a video editor?



Experience:

Video Editing: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience preferred. + Will to learn



How to Apply

Please include: A short video about yourself, any experience with sales, and video editing, and up to 5 videos MAX of past work (portfolio, social media, or case studies) Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day)





Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: Senior Google Ads Manager
description:
We are seeking an experienced Senior Google Ads Manager to lead and optimize high-performance advertising campaigns across Google platforms. This role is ideal for professionals with a strong background in performance marketing who can manage complex campaigns and deliver measurable growth.



Job Summary



As a Senior Google Ads Manager, you will take ownership of campaign strategy, account performance, and optimization across multiple advertising accounts. You will analyze data, identify growth opportunities, and implement advanced optimization strategies to improve conversions and return on ad spend.



Key Responsibilities



• Develop and execute advanced Google Ads strategies across Search, Display, and other networks

• Manage and optimize high-budget campaigns to achieve strong ROI

• Conduct in-depth keyword research, audience targeting, and competitor analysis

• Implement advanced A/B testing strategies for ads and landing pages

• Monitor campaign performance and provide strategic recommendations

• Prepare detailed performance reports and insights

• Continuously identify opportunities to scale and improve campaign results



Requirements



• Proven experience managing and optimizing Google Ads campaigns

• Strong understanding of PPC strategy, bidding models, and conversion tracking

• Experience working with analytics tools such as Google Analytics or similar platforms

• Strong analytical thinking and data-driven decision-making skills

• Ability to manage multiple campaigns and deliver consistent performance



Application



Interested candidates are invited to send their CV to:





Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Senior Google Ads Specialist
description:
Zest Digital Marketing is looking for a highly skilled and experienced Senior Google Ads Specialist to join our growing remote team. We are seeking a results-driven professional who has a deep understanding of Google Ads strategy, campaign optimization, and performance marketing.



This role is ideal for someone who is analytical, detail-oriented, and passionate about driving measurable growth through paid advertising.



Key Responsibilities



Plan, build, and manage high-performing Google Ads campaigns across Search, Display, YouTube, and Performance Max



Conduct advanced keyword research, competitor analysis, and audience targeting



Continuously monitor campaign performance and optimize for conversions and ROI



Implement A/B testing for ad creatives, landing pages, and bidding strategies



Analyze campaign data and provide clear performance reports with actionable insights



Manage advertising budgets responsibly and maximize return on ad spend (ROAS)



Collaborate with internal marketing teams to improve campaign performance and strategy



Stay updated with the latest Google Ads features, policies, and best practices



Required Qualifications



3+ years of proven experience managing Google Ads campaigns



Strong understanding of PPC strategy, conversion tracking, and performance optimization



Experience with Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, and tracking implementation



Ability to analyze campaign data and make strategic optimization decisions



Excellent attention to detail and strong analytical thinking



Ability to work independently in a remote environment



Strong communication and reporting skills in English



Preferred Skills



Experience managing high-budget campaigns



Experience with eCommerce or lead generation campaigns



Familiarity with landing page optimization and CRO



Google Ads certifications are a strong advantage



What We Offer



Competitive salary based on experience and expertise



Long-term remote opportunity



Performance-based bonuses



Professional growth within an international digital marketing team



How to Apply



Please send your CV and portfolio of Google Ads campaigns to:





Subject line: Senior Google Ads Specialist Application – [Your Name]



We look forward to reviewing your application.

As a Google Ads Account Manager, you will oversee advertising accounts, monitor campaign performance, and implement optimization strategies to improve conversions and return on ad spend. title: Part time CFO
description:
Part-Time Remote CFO (Philippines-Based) for Australian Business – InstroEX



InstroEX is hiring a part-time Remote CFO based in the Philippines to help lead the financial side of our growing Australian business.



We are looking for someone who can go beyond bookkeeping and provide real financial oversight, reporting, forecasting, and strategic guidance. This role will start with an initial setup phase, then move into ongoing monthly deliverables.



You must be confident with Australian tax, compliance, and business finance.



About InstroEX

InstroEX is a Western Australia-based Instrumentation, Electrical, and EEHA company servicing industrial clients. We are building strong internal systems and want a finance professional who can help us improve visibility, control, and decision-making.



What you’ll do

 • Set up and improve CFO-level reporting systems

 • Build and manage cash flow forecasts

 • Prepare monthly management reports

 • Create budgets and track performance against them

 • Monitor margins, overheads, and profitability

 • Identify financial leaks, risks, and improvement opportunities

 • Provide financial insights to support business decisions

 • Help improve financial controls and reporting processes

 • Support payroll, super, BAS, GST, PAYG, and compliance oversight

 • Deliver clear monthly finance updates and recommendations



What we need

 • Proven experience as a CFO, Finance Manager, or Virtual CFO

 • Strong understanding of Australian tax and compliance

 • Experience with GST, BAS, PAYG, superannuation, payroll, and reporting

 • Strong forecasting, budgeting, and cash flow management skills

 • Able to explain financial data in a simple, practical way

 • High attention to detail

 • Able to work independently and meet deadlines

 • Strong English communication

 • Experience supporting SMEs is preferred

 • Experience in trades, industrial services, contracting, or field service businesses is a bonus



Role details

 • Part-time

 • Fully remote

 • Philippines-based

 • Flexible hours

 • Monthly deliverables after initial setup

 • Long-term opportunity for the right person



To apply, send:

 1. Your CV

 2. A short summary of your CFO / finance leadership experience

 3. Your experience with Australian tax and compliance

 4. Examples of reports, forecasting, or monthly deliverables you’ve handled

 5. Software you’ve used

 6. Your hourly rate or monthly retainer



Important:

Please include the words “InstroEX CFO” at the top of your application so we know you read the full job post.

title: Appointment Setter
description:
Our lead generation system is strong - delivering 100+ warm leads per month - but we need someone with a track record to pick up the phone and get these prospects on the calendar.



This role is for you if:



- You have a verifiable history of hitting or exceeding targets.

- You know how to handle objections, qualify prospects, and secure commitment over the phone.



The Opportunity:



Set Your Schedule: Part-time or full-time options available (Minimum 25 hrs/week).



Work Aussie Hours: Shifts scheduled between 8 AM and 7 PM (Melbourne Time).



Uncapped Commissions: The more appointments you book that show up, the more you earn!



Must-Haves:

- Excellent spoken English with a confident, professional phone voice.

- Proven track record in outbound appointment setting, B2B sales, customer service or solving customer queries.

- Ability to provide references or past performance data.



If you are a closer who can pick up the phone and deliver results, you can start anytime with us! 



Apply now by filling out the short form below -




/jobs/17033.64053.59877.1



Once you apply, we will send you more information.



IMPORTANT NOTE.



We will ONLY consider candidates who submit their application to our candidate management system through the link above.



About Us



At Performia, we help businesses through our flagship product called the Performia Journey, to transition their culture from being a place where people go to 'do a job' to a productive, safe and fun space where much like a sports team, everyone is motivated by accomplishment, and working towards the same goals.



It’s unlike anything else in the market and we need someone who thrives on creating opportunities.



We give businesses a complete system to create a high performing, safe and fun team culture, and it starts with knowing how to hire the right people.



Clients who build their team the Performia way, see that work stops feeling like work, and becomes a game the team is motivated to play.



Performia is a Swedish company established in 2002 with offices in 27 countries, launching in Australia in 2006.

title: B2B Sales Representative - Remote (Food & Beverage Industry)
description:
Cheesecake brand based in Zurich, Switzerland. We produce premium, handcrafted cheesecakes that we sell to high-end bars, restaurants, cafés, and hotels. Our products are known for their exceptional quality and authentic Basque recipe.

We're looking to expand our client base in the Zurich market and need a motivated sales professional to help us reach more B2B customers.

We're seeking a remote B2B Sales Representative to identify potential clients and conduct outreach on behalf of Emilia. This is a performance-based role where you'll be responsible for generating leads, making initial contact, and setting up opportunities for us to close deals.

Your responsibilities will include:



Market Research: Identify and build a database of potential B2B clients in Zurich (bars, restaurants, cafés, hotels, bakeries, specialty food shops)

Outreach: Contact prospects via
, phone, social media (LinkedIn, Instagram), and messaging platforms

Lead Qualification: Screen prospects to ensure they're a good fit for our premium product

Appointment Setting: Schedule product tastings, demos, or meetings for the business owner to close deals

Follow-up: Maintain communication with prospects until first sale is confirmed

CRM Management: Keep accurate records of all outreach activities and prospect interactions





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

Required:

? Proven experience in B2B sales, lead generation, or business development

? Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal)

? Self-motivated and results-driven

? Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

? Comfortable working independently and remotely

? Reliable internet connection and ability to work during European business hours when needed

Preferred (but not required):

? German language skills (even basic level is a plus)

? Experience in food & beverage, hospitality, or restaurant industry

? Familiarity with Swiss or European business culture

? Experience with CRM tools (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

? Social media marketing or outreach experience

title: Admin Support
description:
We’re looking for an Administrative Agent to help support our sales and recruiting teams. This is an entry-level position that is eligible for promotion after 12 months of tenure.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********



You will fail the application process if you don't read the entire job description.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********





About Us



Started in 2017, and we're growing like crazy.

We expect to hire at least 4 salespeople, 3 admins, and 3 marketers in 2026.

Growing FAST - We sold 2663 lessons in 2025, and we're on pace to sell 3328 lessons in 2026

A small team of 1 American and 10 Filipinos.

We sell manual transmission driving lessons in the United States. Yes, really.

100% inbound leads from Organic Search (SEO). We don’t do cold calling.

No competition - in 90% of the markets we serve, we have no competitors. Because of this, our sale is pretty easy to make.





Compensation and Benefits

Competitive commission package - $3.50 per hour

Paid 5 Sick Days - Effective on day 1

Paid 10 days vacation - Prorated

Paid 14 Bank holidays - (Legal and religious Holidays are country-specific)

Paid Birthday Off - you pick a day off

Business Continuity Plan - In cases of calamity $40 hotel accommodations are permitted to ensure work will continue



Type of Employment

Full Time

40 hours per week

Schedule - 9 AM to 5 PM EST



Benefits to be provided after completion of 3 months:

Health Insurance

Office equipment, home office furniture, and anything else you need for work

Learning books, courses, training, or coaching that you want



Benefits to be provided after completion of one year:

Paid two weeks off for the Christmas Season



Entry Level Details

Note that this is an entry-level job.

We do NOT expect you to have any prior sales experience.

If you’re looking to switch careers and get your foot in the door, this could be great for you.

This is a great opportunity for anyone with a background in any of the following areas: Customer Service, VA Admin, Admin Data Processing, Clerk,
 Communications, General VA, Admin Support, Sales and Admin Specialist, Administrative Support, Operations Admin, Executive Admin Assistant, Sales Assistant.





Duties and Responsibilities

New Orders - Processing Product Order (Gift Certificate)

New Orders - Initial Order Confirmation (Level 3)

Instructor Onboarding, Offboarding and Reonboarding

Reactivate Unavailable Instructor

Secret Message: When you apply, under the section that says "Is there anything else you'd like to write or include?", write the word PINK ELEPHANT. This will show us that you read the entire job description.

Duplicate Record Check

Updating the "Daily Tracking" Process

CTM Prospect Staging





Qualifications

At least 2-3 years of minimum work experience in a relevant or equivalent role

Comprehensive background in Customer and Administrative support

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent English communication and comprehension

Proficiency in using and managing Google applications - Gmail, Calendar, Documents, Drive

Preferably with knowledge in using cloud-based CRM

Organized and has careful attention to detail

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

Strong Problem-Solving skills

Customer Service Oriented and the ability to adapt/respond properly to different types of scenarios

Equipped with good skills in office/admin management, and can suggest process improvements

Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a good quality headset and microphone.





What's Hard About This Job

Working Remotely - We're a remote-first company, and we never want to have an office. This is great if you like working by yourself in the quiet, but it can be terribly painful if you need the energy of coworkers nearby.

Our Cultural Values - We're an American company with an incredibly unusual culture. Even by American standards, our 7 cultural values are highly unusual. Our culture is challenging for people accustomed to corporate culture and especially difficult for people who grew up in Confucian cultures. It's a great culture for people who speak directly and have a great deal of self-confidence and ownership. If you identify as a misfit, you'll do well.

Multiple Software Systems - You're going to need to learn how to use 12 different software systems. This is great if you want to get exposed to and experience lots of technology, but it can be tough if you have a hard time learning technology. Secret Message - When you apply, you'll see a box that asks if you want to add anything else. Type in PINK ELEPHANT in all capital letters exactly as we've shown it here.





Cheat Code for getting a job with us:

1) Our application comprises the majority of our recruiting process. Because of that, we suggest that you give us thoughtful responses and rich stories. We typically only interview applicants who give rich and detailed answers to our questions. If you write short responses so that you can hurry up and finish the application, you will not get interviewed.

2) Tell us stories about how your actions match your beliefs and values. For example, if I say I value health and fitness, you don't know if I'm telling you the truth or if I'm just telling you what sounds good. But, if I tell you things I've done, I can illustrate my values of health and fitness with proof. For example, I go to the gym 4 days per week, I've done 6 triathlons, including an Ironman, and I can swim 3000 meters in one hour. My examples of things I've done prove that my actions match my values system.

3) Be vulnerable and honest. We take very detailed notes during the interview process, and we conduct extensive background checks. If the stories you tell about yourself don't match what your references say, we will not hire you. We'd rather hire a C student who is honest about being a C student than someone who is a C student but tries to pass themselves off as an A student. Remember, this is an entry-level job. We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for an excellent cultural fit.





How to apply: Please click on the link: 
/work-opportunities/administration-agent

title: Video editor high perfoming ecom brand - short form content facebook
description:
We are a fast growing ecom startup in the pet niche with a mission to scale fast. Currently, we have a team of two full-time video editors, and as we grow, we are looking for a third high-performer to join the pack. If you are a fast-paced editor who loves the efficiency of AI, this is for you.



We don’t need "starving artists" or perfectionists who spend hours on a single frame. We need Assembly Specialists: high-performers who can take raw components, AI avatars, brand B-roll, and snappy captions, and fuse them into high-converting short-form content.



The Role: What You’ll Be Doing



Your goal is to make the spoken message clear, engaging, and lightning-fast.



AI Integration: Generating and syncing AI avatars (primarily using HeyGen).



Rapid Assembly: Using fast cuts to maintain high viewer retention.



Visual Sourcing & Creation: Pulling B-roll from our internal brand folder, sourcing from the web, or generating custom B-roll using AI tools.



Precision Editing: Following detailed briefs to ensure every "piece" of the content puzzle fits perfectly.



What We Look For



Speed & Quality: You understand that "done is better than perfect," but you don't sacrifice brand standards.



Technical Agility: You are comfortable jumping between editing software and AI generation tools.



Reliability: We provide the instructions; you provide the output. You take feedback well and apply it instantly.



Compensation & Tools



We believe in rewarding efficiency and results. Instead of a traditional hourly rate, we pay per minute of finished content.



The Math: Based on our previous rate of $5/hour and an average editing speed of 1 minute per 2 hours, we offer $10 per finished minute of content.



Efficiency Bonus: If you are faster and more precise, your effective hourly rate increases significantly.



Winning Video Bonus: We scale fast, and we want you to grow with us. You will receive a bonus for "winning videos" that perform exceptionally well for the brand.



Feedback Policy: Detailed feedback is provided for every video. Revisions based on original instructions are part of the per-minute rate, rewarding those who are precise the first time.



Everything Provided: We cover the costs of all AI tools (HeyGen, Midjourney, etc.) and editing software subscriptions.



How to Apply



To be considered, please reply with the following:



Your Experience: A brief summary of your work with e-commerce or short-form brands.



AI Expertise: Specifically, tell us about your experience using AI tools to create B-roll or visual assets (e.g., Midjourney, Runway, Pika, etc.).



Portfolio: Links to your best fast-cut/short-form edits.



Tools: Do you primarily use CapCut or Adobe Premiere/After Effects?



Speed Check: On average, how long does it take you to edit 1 minute of high-quality short-form video?



IMPORTANT: To show you have read the entire post and follow instructions precisely, please include the word Yellow in your application title.

title: Video Editor - Founder Personal Brand, B2B Audience
description:
# About the Role:

We're a $2M/year B2B marketing company looking for a video editor who will own all video content production for our founder's personal brand and company channels.



You'll receive raw footage from our founder specifically recorded for the following formats/outputs:



1. Short-form clips (60-90 seconds) for Instagram Reels and Ads

2. Long-form YouTube videos / VSLs (10-30 minutes) with full post-production



About 70% of your editing will be for organic content & 30% will be for Ads and VSLs.



This is not flashy lifestyle content. It's business content aimed at agency owners and B2B founders. It needs to be sharp, clear, and built to retain attention — not overloaded with trendy transitions and 
 inserts.



# What You'll Do



- Edit 30-40 short-form clips per week from raw footage (no crazy motion graphics)

- Edit 2-5 long-form YouTube videos per week

- Add captions, text overlays, and b-roll where appropriate

- Write or refine hooks and on-screen text to maximize retention

- Repurpose long-form content into short-form clips

- Maintain a consistent visual style across all content

- Manage and organize raw footage and project files

- Hit deadlines consistently without being chased





# What We're Looking For



Required:

- Strong portfolio showing both short-form (Reels/Shorts) and long-form (YouTube) editing

- Proficiency in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Pro (for short-form)

- Understanding of hooks, pacing, and audience retention — not just cutting footage but thinking about why an edit works

- Experience with captions, kinetic text, and clean lower thirds

- Solid grasp of YouTube packaging (thumbnails are a bonus, not required)

- Reliable internet and the ability to handle large file transfers

- Responsive communication during working hours (we use async tools — Slack, Notion, Google Drive)

- Familiarity with B2B or business content (not just vlogs or gaming)



Bonus (not required):

- Experience editing founder-led or personal brand content

- Basic motion graphics or After Effects skills

- Familiarity with B2B or business content (not just vlogs or gaming)

- Ability to suggest content ideas or identify clip-worthy 
nts in raw footage

- Thumbnail design





# What You'll Get

- Stable, full-time role with a growing company

- Direct access to the founder — short feedback loops, no middle management

- Clear creative direction with room to develop your own editorial instinct over time

- Opportunity to quickly grow into a broader content role as we scale





IMPORTANT - this is a full-time role. We will expect you to be 100% allocated to us 40hrs a week, respond immediately within work hours and not work on other projects during the time allocated to us. You may have other gigs/clients on the side, but we need to have exclusive priority. You may not juggle 2 or more full-time roles.





# How to Apply



Your application must include:

- A link to your portfolio or 3-5 examples of your best work (both short-form and long-form if possible)

- A brief note (2-3 sentences) on what you'd do differently in one of your samples if you could re-edit it today

- 3-4 business channels who's content you consume



Applications without portfolio links will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: ECommerce Video Ads Editor - Full-Time
description:
We are currently seeking a dedicated, full-time video editor with proven experience in e-commerce advertising and direct-response ad creation.



This is a long-term role for someone who can work consistently, follow structured workflows, and deliver high-quality outputs on a daily basis. This is not a freelance or part-time position.



The focus of this role is to produce high-converting video ads (mainly Voiceover and UGC)  for Meta platforms 
, Instagram, TikTok) using a combination of provided assets and self-sourced visuals.



Role Overview

Our team will provide the core assets (script, voiceover, and final AI-generated UGC clips [if needed for that specific video]) that must be used in each video.



These assets are the foundation of the ad, and the AI UGC clips should remain the primary footage, as instructed.



Your role is to take these assets and build a complete video advertisement from start to finish by incorporating additional visuals, structuring the narrative, and delivering a polished final output ready for paid advertising.



Responsibilities

You will be responsible for transforming a script into a complete, high-performing video ad.

This includes:

• Structuring the video according to the script and creative guidelines

 • Using the provided assets (script, voiceover, AI UGC clips) effectively

 • Sourcing or generating B-roll and AI-generated clips to support the story

 • Editing the video from start to finish

 • Creating 3 strong hooks within the first 3 seconds

 • Adding captions, subtitles, and engaging text overlays (if needed)

 • Incorporating sound effects and background music

 • Delivering a final ad ready to run on Meta platforms

Videos will typically be 60–180 seconds long.



Required Skills

Applicants must have prior experience editing direct-response e-commerce ads.



The ideal candidate understands how to create videos designed specifically for performance marketing and conversions, not just visual appeal.



Required:

• Strong understanding of direct-response ad structure

 • Ability to create scroll-stopping hooks

 • Must be comfortable editing in different languages

 • Experience with UGC-style ad editing

 • Fast-paced editing for retention and engagement

 • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

 • Strong attention to detail and consistency



Tools & Technical Requirements

You should be comfortable working with:

• CapCut Pro, Premiere Pro, or similar editing software

 • AI video and image generation tools

 • Basic use of AI tools for visual sourcing and enhancement

You must be capable of independently sourcing or generating supporting visuals that align with the script and creative direction.



Work Details

• Full-time position

 • 25 working days per month

 • Turnaround time: Maximum 24 hours per video

 • Consistent and structured workload

 • Remote role

This position requires someone who is reliable, responsive, and able to meet deadlines consistently.



Compensation

• $
USD per month (full-time)

 • Based on $20 per video × 25 videos per month

 • Opportunities for increased compensation based on performance and output quality



Application Process

To apply, please complete the application form below:

Google Form Application:

 

Only applications submitted through the form will be reviewed.



Important

This role requires someone who can take ownership of the final output, not just perform basic edits.



You will be expected to think through the structure of each ad, source appropriate visuals, and deliver a complete, high-quality result with minimal supervision.



If you meet the above requirements and are looking for a serious, long-term opportunity in e-commerce advertising, we encourage you to apply.

title: Home Care Recruiter
description:
About Us



At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home care agencies in America. We believe in creating a true partnership where our employees act and feel like a true member of the American team they are matched with. Our goal is to help them create a compassionate, innovative, and efficient care experience for their clients and their families. To achieve this, we’re looking for a Helper Hero to join our team and help us shine even brighter!



About You



What sets us apart is YOU. You’re not just any virtual tea
mber—you’re a Helper Hero! If you’re passionate about making a difference, have a knack for organization, and thrive in a fast-paced, mission-driven environment, you’re who we are looking for. If you’re the kind of person who loves tackling behind-the-scenes tasks with a smile, ensuring that our clients' caregivers and clients receive the best possible support, apply today!



Job Overview



We are seeking a proactive, detail-oriented Recruiter to support recruitment, caregiver

onboarding, and administrative tasks for a growing home care business. This role is

ideal for someone with experience in healthcare recruitment and a passion for

streamlining operations. You will work closely with the owner to alleviate their workload,

enabling them to focus on business growth and client care.



Key Responsibilities



1. Recruitment & Onboarding:



- Manage end-to-end caregiver recruitment: screen applicants, schedule interviews, and coordinate orientation/training.

- Process onboarding documentation via ADP Workforce (e.g., electronic I-9s, employee handbook distribution).

- Track and ensure completion of state-mandated caregiver training (e.g.,via Active Insights).



2. Administrative Support



- Answer inbound calls during peak hours and manage voi
s/lead inquiries.

- Assist with client intake calls and referral source coordination.

- Provide general administrative support (e.g., scheduling, data entry).



3. Systems & Collaboration



- Utilize platforms like WellSky or Axiscare (training provided) to streamline workflows.

- Collaborate with the owner to refine processes and maintain organization.



Qualifications:



- Excellent written/verbal communication (fluent English).

- Strong organizational and time-management abilities.

- Proficiency with CRM systems,
 management, and cloud-based tools (e.g., Google Drive).

- Proactive mindset—anticipate needs before they arise.

- Proven experience in recruitment, specifically in healthcare or home care staffing. 

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to build rapport with candidates and tea
mbers.

- Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a fast-paced environment.

- Familiarity with recruitment platforms and CRM tools

- A positive attitude, sense of humor, and a passion for helping others.



Attributes of a Successful Helper Hero:



- Empathy: You genuinely care about people and want to make a difference in their lives.

- Organization: You’re a master of multitasking and can keep everything running smoothly.

- Communication: You speak impeccable English. You’re a clear and friendly communicator, both written and verbal.

- Problem Solver: You can see the big picture when resolving complex issues and follow through until you reach full resolution.

- Self Starter: You work effectively without supervision and follow processes precisely.

- Reliability: You’re dependable, punctual, and always ready to step up when needed.



Why You’ll Love Working with Us:



- Competitive Base Pay: $6.50/hr for the first 6 months. (Among the highest in the homecare industry)

- Make a Difference: You’ll play a key role in ensuring that clients receive the best

care possible.

- Growth Opportunities: As we grow, so will you! There’s plenty of room for

advancement and learning.

- Fun & Supportive Team: We’re a tight-knit group that values collaboration,

compassion, and a good laugh.



Ready to Be a Hero?



If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated,

have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more

compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! Apply today and let’s

make a difference together.



IMPORTANT:  Directly apply and send your resume on our website:

title: Facebook Ads Specialist
description:
We are looking for a skilled
 Ads Specialist to manage and optimize paid advertising campaigns on Meta platforms 
 and Instagram). The ideal candidate has strong experience in campaign strategy, audience targeting, and performance optimization to generate leads and improve return on ad spend (ROAS).



Key Responsibilities:



Plan, create, and manage
 and Instagram advertising campaigns.

Conduct audience research and implement effective targeting strategies.

Monitor campaign performance and optimize ads to improve conversions and reduce cost per lead.

Perform A/B testing on ad creatives, copy, and targeting.

Analyze campaign data and provide performance reports with actionable insights.

Collaborate with the marketing team to align ads with overall marketing strategies.

Manage advertising budgets and ensure efficient allocation of ad spend.

Stay updated with the latest Meta Ads trends, policies, and best practices.



Requirements:



Proven experience managing
/Meta Ads campaigns.

Strong understanding of ad targeting, retargeting, and lookalike audiences.

Experience with
 Ads Manager and Meta Business Suite.

Ability to analyze campaign performance using data and metrics.

Knowledge of conversion tracking, pixels, and event setup.

Strong communication and reporting skills.

Experience running lead generation or e-commerce campaigns is a plus.

title: Funnel Builder & Paid Traffic Specialist (Full Time – Remote)
description:
Funnel Builder & Paid Traffic Specialist (Full Time – Remote)



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are a UK-based lead generation company building funnels for home improvement, property and financial services.



We are hiring a Funnel Builder & Paid Traffic Specialist to turn ideas into live funnels and ad campaigns.



This is a technical execution role — not strategy or copywriting.



You will work directly with the founder, who provides the funnel ideas, copy and direction.



Your job is to build, launch and optimise quickly.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Funnel Build & Launch



• Build landing pages, advertorials, forms and thank-you pages  

• Ensure pages are mobile-friendly, fast and clean  

• Launch funnels quickly and efficiently  



Paid Ads



• Set up and manage Meta Ads & Google Ads  

• Campaign setup, targeting, basic optimisation  

• Monitor performance and make adjustments  



Tracking



• Install Meta Pixel & Google conversion tracking  

• Set up lead tracking and analytics  

• Ensure all data is accurate  



Tools



• Go High Level (preferred)  

• WordPress / Elementor  

• Other funnel builders  



REQUIRED SKILLS



• Funnel / landing page building  

• Meta Ads Manager  

• Google Ads  

• Conversion tracking  

• Basic automation  



NICE TO HAVE



• Go High Level  

• Zapier  

• Canva / basic design  

• CRM automation  



WORK STYLE



• Detail-oriented  

• Fast executor  

• Follows instructions well  

• Works independently  



This role is execution-focused, not creative strategy.



HOURS & PAY



Full Time  

$800 – $1,200/month (depending on experience)  

Long-term role with growth potential  



HOW TO APPLY



Send:



• 3 funnels / landing pages you built  

• Screenshot of Meta Ads account  

• Screenshot of Google Ads account  

• Short message about your experience  



FINAL QUESTION



What makes YOU the most appealing candidate for this role?



IMPORTANT



Start your application with:



PowerHouse



Applications without this will be ignored.

What We Value

 • Strong communication



How to Apply:

Send an
 to 
 more mondays . io (remove spacing)

Step 3 — Within 24 hours: Job offer will be sent to the successful candidate.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our team. This role is focused on creating clean, modern, and conversion-focused designs across digital platforms. You’ll work closely with the marketing and content team to bring ideas to life through strong visual storytelling.



If you have a strong eye for design, understand layout and branding, and are confident using Figma, we’d love to hear from you.

mbers to turn ideas into polished visuals

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a creative and reliable Part-Time Social Media Specialist who genuinely understands and enjoys car culture. This role focuses on growing our online presence, creating engaging automotive content, and building strong connections within the car enthusiast community.



If you enjoy storytelling, staying on top of trends, and engaging with niche audiences, this could be a great fit.



Responsibilities



Content Creation

Create engaging automotive-related content including captions, short-form videos, images, and graphics

Highlight trends, products, and topics that resonate with car enthusiasts

Research relevant industry updates, events, and conversations to share with our audience



Social Media Management

Manage and maintain social media accounts across major platforms

Plan and schedule posts based on a consistent content calendar

Respond to comments and messages to foster community engagement

Monitor conversations and trending topics within the automotive space



Marketplace Content

Create product-focused posts for marketplace feeds to improve visibility and engagement

Track post performance and adjust content based on results



Community & Growth

Engage with automotive groups and communities online

Identify opportunities to increase reach and grow the audience organically



Reporting

Track engagement, reach, and content performance

Provide simple insights and suggestions to improve results



Qualifications

Experience managing social media accounts and creating content

Strong interest in car culture and automotive trends

Comfortable creating short-form video and visual content

Strong writing skills with a conversational tone

Basic understanding of analytics and performance tracking



Nice to Have

Basic graphic design or video editing skills
