title: HubSpot Project Manager (RevOps / Implementation Support)
description:
Overview



We are a HubSpot consulting practice seeking a Project Manager with hands-on HubSpot experience to support client implementations and internal delivery.



This is not a data entry or admin role.



You will work directly with the founder to:



Manage active client projects



Translate strategy into execution



Support HubSpot builds, QA, and ongoing optimization



This role sits between project management and light/moderate HubSpot execution.



Responsibilities

Project Management (Primary)



Manage client projects in Click Up (tasks, timelines, priorities)



Turn meeting recordings into actionable tasks



Track deadlines and follow up on deliverables



Maintain SOPs and internal documentation



Prepare weekly project updates



HubSpot Execution (Required)



Build and QA workflows (basic to intermediate)



Create and manage lists and segmentation



Update and manage contacts, companies, deals, and properties



Build reports and dashboards



Perform QA and troubleshooting on workflows and CRM data



Support pipeline and data structure organization



(Advanced architecture and integrations handled by lead consultant.)



Requirements

Must Have



Hands-on experience working inside HubSpot CRM



Experience building or editing workflows



Experience creating reports or dashboards



Understanding of:



Contacts, Companies, Deals



Pipelines and lifecycle stages



2+ years in project coordination, operations, or CRM support



Experience with Click Up, Asana, or similar tools



Strong written and verbal English



Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously



Nice to Have



Experience working for a HubSpot agency or consulting firm



Familiarity with RevOps or CRM implementations



Experience QA testing workflows or CRM builds



Experience documenting SOPs and processes



Tools



HubSpot



Click Up



Google Workspace



Slack



Hours



5–10 hours per week to start



Opportunity to grow



**Application Instructions (Required)**



To be considered, you must answer the following:



1. Workflow Experience



Describe a workflow you have built in HubSpot:



What was the goal?



What triggers and actions did you use?



2. Reporting Experience



Describe a dashboard or report you created:



What metrics were you tracking and why?



3. Problem Solving / QA



Describe a time you identified and fixed an issue in HubSpot:



What was wrong?



How did you fix it?



4. Project Management Process



When working with a client, how do you turn a meeting into tasks and ensure nothing is missed?



5. Tools



List the tools you’ve used for project management and CRM work



Thank you in advance for applying.

title: Product & Supplier Sourcing Virtual Assistant
description:
About Envibe

Envibe is a fast-growing, solutions-led business focused on solving the unresolved across supply, logistics, and customer needs.



We operate at pace, think commercially, and take ownership. We build dependable, creative solutions and expect our people to do the same. This is a high-performance, in-person environment for people who want accountability, 
ntum, and progression.



We’re looking for someone in the Philippines who’s smart, proactive, and a fast learner. Experience matters less than attitude, initiative, and adaptability.



What you’ll do:

   - Source products based on specs, budget, and goals

   - Find, shortlist, and vet suppliers/manufacturers (local & international)

   - Send RFQs, compare quotes (price, MOQ, lead time, terms), and support negotiations

   - Coordinate samples and track timelines

   - Keep sourcing data organized (supplier lists, quotes, comparisons)

   - Provide clear updates and recommendations to the team



What we’re looking for:

   - Strong online research + problem-solving

   - Confident with Google Sheets/Excel (tracking, comparisons, basic formulas)

   - Fluent English (written + spoken) and comfortable on calls

   - Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple tasks

   - Takes ownership and follows through without being chased



Sourcing skills (preferred):

   - Familiar with sourcing platforms/directories (Alibaba, 1688, GlobalSources, local directories)

   - Basic supplier evaluation and risk awareness (quality, lead times, landed cost, compliance)



Work setup & hours:

   - Remote, Philippines-based, with core UK hours: 3:00 PM–12:00 AM PH time

   - Daily 1-hour catch-up with the Commercial Director (Australia-based), plus limited AU overlap as needed

   - Not a 24/7 role, but you’ll need to handle follow-ups during UK/AU business hours

   - Must have your own WFH setup and reliable internet



To apply, include:

   - Resume link + short intro

   - Your steps for sourcing a new supplier (brief)

   - Internet speed + work setup

   - Confirmation your availability matches the schedule above

Turn raw clips, product footage, and concepts into polished content

Help create promotional and conversion-focused content for ecommerce products

Work with our team to improve content quality over time

one direct portfolio link

title: Ecommerce Executive/Specialist (Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada Seller Center)
description:
URGENT HIRING. MUST HAVE EXPERIENCED IN ECOMMERCE



Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



We are seeking a confident and experienced tea
mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.



Key Responsibilities:



- Serve as the Point-in-Charge (PIC) and technical expert for the BigSeller platform, providing system guidance, troubleshooting, and workflow optimization.

- Stay updated on BigSeller feature releases and system enhancements, implementing updates to improve operational efficiency.

- Manage product listings across multiple online platforms (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop), ensuring accuracy, quality, and completeness (basic photo editing and product research).

- Monitor pricing strategies and campaign promotions (e.g., 11.11, 12.12, Payday Sales) to drive sales growth performance.

- Track and analyze sales data, competitor activity, inventory levels, and shipment status, preparing actionable performance reports.

- Confidently present weekly and monthly data to management, translating complex metrics into clear strategies.

- Maintain overall e-commerce account health, coordinating with teams to resolve customer service issues, refunds, returns, and fraud cases.

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams and provide ad-hoc support for campaigns and special projects.



Qualifications:



- 2–3 years of hands-on experience managing e-commerce operations on Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Seller Centre or Account, or similar is required.

- Strong understanding of online campaign management, pricing strategies, and platform algorithms.

- Proficient in Google sheets and Excel. Managing large datasets, utilizing advanced formulas (e.g., VLOOKUP, Pivot Tables), and generating performance reports.

- Highly organized, able to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

- Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in multicultural teams.



Benefits:

- Stable full time employment with leave benefits, up to 14 days annual leave, public holiday leave, birthday leave.

- Travel Opportunity to Singapore based on performance.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

- Seeking a dedicated full-time and long term role.



To apply, please answer a few short pre-screening questions via the Google Form linked below. This helps us better understand your background and fit for the role before the interview stage.







We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you!

title: Sales & Admin (Cold Calling) – Sewer Cleaning Services
description:
***** Important Location Requirement *****

title: Virtual Assistant – CRM & Database Management (Real Estate)
description:
Position Overview

We are seeking a highly organised and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage and maintain our CRM system (LockedOn) within a fast-paced real estate environment. In this role, you will be working directly with one agent, managing and optimising their personal database to support prospecting, marketing, and sales performance.



This is not a basic data entry role. This is a personal, high-trust position where you will work very closely with the agent, becoming an extension of their business and playing a key role in driving results.



Key Responsibilities



CRM & Database Management



Maintain and update all client records within LockedOn CRM



Ensure all contacts are correctly categorised (buyers, sellers, landlords, investors)



Tag and segment database (hot, warm, cold leads)



Clean and organise database to ensure accuracy and usability



Call List & Prospecting Support



Create daily and weekly call lists (hit lists) for prospecting



Identify priority contacts such as past appraisals, warm leads, and follow-ups



Prepare structured lists aligned with prospecting goals (e.g. Magic 75)



Communication & Campaign Support



Send bulk
s to database (newsletters, updates, campaigns)



Send SMS campaigns and individual follow-up text messages



Upload and distribute marketing materials to the database



Ensure all communications are logged within the CRM



Contact Updates & Follow-Ups



Update notes after calls and interactions (based on agent input)



Set and manage follow-up reminders and tasks



Track client activity and ensure no leads are missed



Data Processing & Lead Management



Input new leads into CRM promptly and accurately



Manage buyer matching processes and update buyer requirements



Assist in preparing database segments for new listings and campaigns



Skills & Experience Required



Experience using CRM systems (LockedOn experience highly preferred)



Strong attention to detail and data accuracy



Excellent organisational and time management skills



Ability to follow structured processes and systems



Strong written communication skills (for
s and SMS)



Real estate experience is highly desirable



Key Attributes



Proactive and reliable



High level of accountability



Able to work independently and meet deadlines



Strong communication skills and ability to work closely with an agent



Strong understanding of confidentiality and data handling



What Success Looks Like in This Role



A clean, well-organised and segmented CRM



Consistent and effective communication with the database



Daily call lists prepared and aligned with business goals



No missed follow-ups or lost opportunities



Strong alignment with the agent’s workflow and prospecting strategy



Additional Notes



You will be working closely with one agent, becoming an integral part of their day-to-day operations. This is a hands-on, collaborative role where your contribution will directly impact listings, client relationships, and overall performance.

title: Real Estate Transaction Manager/ Listing Coordinator
description:
PLEASE READ FULL DESCRIPTION AND FOLLOW APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS FOR CONSIDERATION



ABOUT US:

We are currently seeking 1-2 motivated and experienced Real estate Listing Manager/ Transaction Coordinator professionals as a dedicated hi-level support staff  for our Real Estate Team.  This is a full time position and the intention is for this to be a long term role.  Our current support staff have all been with us 3+ years.  



JOB OVERVIEW:

This position requires an experienced and highly skilled candidate who will primarily focus on supporting the real estate transaction process, ensuring smooth and timely closings. Previous Listing coordinator and MLS experience and in depth knowledge of the contract to close process is REQUIRED. Please do not apply if you do not have high level, hands on Listing and Transaction management experience. We are not looking fort general support.  Experience with eXp Systems is a plus. You’ll also provide general administrative support. This is an exciting opportunity for someone who is detail-oriented, highly organized, and looking to grow in the real estate industry.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Transaction Management: Oversee and support the full real estate transaction process from contract to closing, including coordinating timelines, documents, and communication between agents, clients, and other parties.

- MLS Listings: Create and manage property listings on Multiple Listing Services (experience with OneKey/HGAR MLS is a plus)

- Property Descriptions: Write compelling and accurate property descriptions to showcase listings.

- Administrative Support: Assist the with tasks such as managing
 inquiries, organizing documents, and scheduling appointments.

- Social Media & Content Creation: Post and create content for listings  on social media platforms.

- Client and Partner Outreach: Manage outbound calls, texts,
s to agents, attorneys, lenders and clients to assist in deal follow ups and transaction management



LOOKING FOR:

- Minimum 1 year of real estate experience, preferably with eXp Realty systems like SkySlope.

- Previous direct support of top producing listing agents managing listings from start to finish.

- In depth understanding of the Real Estate transaction contract to close process

- Experience with managing and responding to communications on behalf of CEO

- Ability to manage 20+ transactions at once and keep track of changing status and priorities. 

- Strong proficiency with Google Drive, MLS, CRM, Canva and eXp tools.

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English.

- Highly organized, quick thinking and able to manage multiple tasks and deadlines simultaneously.

- A positive, team-oriented attitude with a strong desire to grow and succeed in the real estate industry.



APPLICATION (MUST BE FOLLOWED IN DETAIL OR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE REVIEWED):
